__ Trump,**_a convicted felon and fraudster_** , aims to eliminate the Department of Education, dismissing it as a "con job." This reckless plan would have devastating consequences, particularly for students with disabilities who rely on the Department for essential support and resources. From ensuring access to specialized services to enforcing the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA), the Department of Education plays a crucial role in leveling the playing field for students with disabilities. _We can’t lose it!_ **Join us and FIGHT BACK for the future of our education system and the empowerment of individuals with disabilities!** [**Able Dems is dedicated to electing Democrats with disabilities and their allies, ensuring that we have access to education and our voices are heard in the halls of power. Will you chip in to our mission?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8Qh9jkKzoHgDlenfIyxDNP3VT2sBfy9QVmEuWbLSEurfAVjdRoilDXZPni58uhA12HNV9V7MZCLHxsy7UHUOxusNJS0_FyrHez9aBOlAgD2R3VuP2YHIq3AKQ1trTTYiRrYOar73Mh52E72vwg-WaILUTsfTb_lWJdp5J4rWquoZVzDTUeQab8v-qatY3Sv4cKgPZdSNf31OT6NLUs43GoUBU9kPn5L1G-sPXt6Oipx3XMa21PYc2jBYP0EUJtk9YZYpZfZLi6ub0d2ApzFwIEa8/4e3/1fIxc4ZNQKmadE9PEV-RpA/h2/h001.pmj8HkyMBmRcda7LZWl3Iyf5rUBZ3OQyCdjMmTdIQz4) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A photo to brighten your day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I want
to share a throwback photo with you today and tell you the story alongside
it.

Here I am at 13 years old, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]Adam as a 13 year old boy at his Bar Mitzvah

I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow
tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity
to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.

Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the
Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the
last few years, a lot has been broken, and there’s a lot to fix. It’s been
my cause.

I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my
father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman
and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.

We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in
Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out
of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during
the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing,
and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.

This photo is from a time when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in
Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the
Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I
even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of
that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all).

While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly
lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day.

In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but
to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.

These principles have guided my public service. They have led me to pursue
criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to
attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally.
They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the
most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.

And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our
democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours.

That’s why I put everything I have into my work for the cause of our
democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the
morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3987?c0=q12025_abs_em.XLVH51&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to
continue that work by chipping in $18 or another meaningful amount to my
campaign.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q12025_abs_em.sOF3cu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3358?c0=q12025_abs_em.R7_PN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]EXPRESS DONATE $18

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q12025_abs_em.yoPhsC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q12025_abs_em.rGpVdd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em.zzYphW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more
insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause.

Thank you for reading more about me,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5115?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q12025_abs_em.-jDD3p&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250216_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=8309%2E5257348%2ExNbbSE ]Privacy Policy

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The bottom line:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The mantra of the vote suppressors must be "if you can't beat 'em," Team, "just try and get their votes thrown out". By waiting until after Election Day and the recounts, it's clear that the challenger's campaign only sued to get these votes tossed out because he lost.
The scarier part is that -- if this challenge is successful and these votes get thrown out -- opponents of voting rights will absolutely try and do this in every other election around the country.
We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and their voices silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and defend these votes in North Carolina before this becomes precedent? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021625_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021625_2&amount=25]
NC Newsline: Republicans on the NC Supreme Court block certification of the Democratic incumbent’s election [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021625_2&amount=25]
This case is still going on in North Carolina, Team, and we have to spread the word because the media continues to ignore election theft in plain sight.
The North Carolina state Supreme Court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court , which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties.
For background: On Election Day, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead.
Now Judge Griffin has sued to remove 60,000 voters' ballots from the count , even though they've been validated in the recount. The state Board of Elections dismissed his request , but now his partisan, would-be colleagues -- the court has a 5-2 Republican majority -- have stepped in to adjudicate the election and possibly kick off one of their own.
Justices Anita Earls (D) and Richard Dietz (R) dissented while Justice Riggs properly recused herself, so the judicial stay on election certification was put in place by a 4-2, mainly party-line vote.
The bottom line is that the partisan Supreme Court is stepping into an election for one of their own members to try and reverse the results of the vote because their party didn't win. Opponents of voting rights are trying to steal this election in plain sight.
We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and defend these votes in North Carolina and so many other votes across the country? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021625_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021625_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021625_2&amount=25]

The bottom line is that the partisan Supreme Court is stepping into an election for one of their own members to try and reverse the results of the vote because their party didn't win. Opponents of voting rights are trying to steal this election in plain sight. We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and defend these votes in North Carolina and so many other votes across the country? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Peter, I JUST saw President Trump
body:
Due to your record of support, I want YOU to be one of the first signatures on this Thank You card for President Trump!

| |
---
| | | Peter,

I JUST saw President Trump! It was so great to see him and thank him for everything that he is doing for our country!

The golden age of our nation is HERE!

President Trump is putting America FIRST! And we are making America GREAT AGAIN each day under his strong leadership!

_**[After seeing the President, I had an idea to put together a HUGE card full of signatures from MAGA patriots nationwide to thank him for everything he has already done for our country and express our support for all that is to come!](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/eZzE4u9aBgtL5v7uX95bIzXxYYh8Tt_Ybx0ZrhXU5fxN7SW_f0NngT0_74Kmoy4-a3gM2Jj547MQZBLkmKGtRTDZ0CvCEw8Kd4bMvM4kBtiDa60ej-qjHGPb28Kw7k-TjNdLMMyvs30E0W0jW692aFuS2bLEso8_QbRsn8Mo_hlwGn8HKnMeEpmZ44HM4S1APgxbT-xzb9bWLpNyTRyMJ0-YB5lHBhPVt4b5uRYAIAafeVILlmvJEUOzj-I1ZA4fsQ03u9yZ-yf2jeM-4daMngfDpmEvepSdrmhcgG-srPKTJoVxegbv4iEjp0STviFSqdlF7ErbYgb2j0HoMcNXZ7G7l-d8OY3Q4Ndb3KroobuqUEGjXsLyzG0zii3I69pAgdSh_fwY0intCJlwwatOjoQcpRwJj-ZVOFPXYppXRIMZw3004AnXTuWooihXNQ4l2JAMIbjlPGDxje1rJHIIUVqZOkLnTAzMDrexI3Mc_G2Gn1ZcCLWfwtYI_Zz-Gz_Dh67lGjIjD72Kw2fmjJM7Dd5QgZiB-nUkiK1JJQ/2UwXOXyxN_gJ1v-wV4Ee_dOH0IW17shD/6 "After seeing the President, I had an idea to put together a HUGE card full of signatures from MAGA patriots nationwide to thank him for everything he has already done for our country and express our support for all that is to come!")**_

_My team is getting ready to open this card up to all the TOP patriots on our file ..._

**But before they do that, I wanted to reach out to YOU - due to your long history of support for both me and President Trump - to ask if you would do me the honor of being one of the FIRST signatures?**

clean_body: Due to your record of support, I want YOU to be one of the first signatures on this Thank You card for President Trump! | | | | | Peter, I JUST saw President Trump! It was so great to see him and thank him for everything that he is doing for our country! The golden age of our nation is HERE! President Trump is putting America FIRST! And we are making America GREAT AGAIN each day under his strong leadership! "After seeing the President, I had an idea to put together a HUGE card full of signatures from MAGA patriots nationwide to thank him for everything he has already done for our country and express our support for all that is to come!" My team is getting ready to open this card up to all the TOP patriots on our file ... But before they do that, I wanted to reach out to YOU - due to your long history of support for both me and President Trump - to ask if you would do me the honor of being one of the FIRST signatures? | | | "“THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP!”" | | | "ADD YOUR SIGNATURE HERE >>" We are hoping to break a signature record of names on this card, but by signing right here and now, the spot right at the top will be reserved for you! "What do you say? Will you join me in thanking President Trump for everything he is doing for our country and add your name now?" Hey there, it’s Gabe. Tonight marks our mid-January fundraising deadline — our first fundraising deadline since our race was named one of the first toss-ups of 2026 by the Cook Political Report. This is our first and most important opportunity to build up our war chest and brace for the challenges that lie ahead, and right now we’re just short of our goal. We set out to raise $6,000 by tonight at midnight, and right now, we’re just over $1,000 short. That’s why I’m asking one last time: Will you stand with me by making a donation to fuel our fight and give us the resources we need to take on MAGA extremism in Washington? If everyone reading this email chips in $5, we’ll reach our goal in no time. name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: sights set on the VA Governor’s race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
National Republicans are making it clear: they’ve set their sights on the Virginia Governor’s race, and they’re going to pull out all the stops to keep this seat red.
Peter,
National Republicans are making it clear: they’ve set their sights on the Virginia Governor’s race, and they’re going to pull out all the stops to keep this seat red.
In the last week, top Republicans in Washington have announced their support for Abigail’s opponent, and we’ve already seen thousands of dollars flowing in. We know this is just the beginning – in the coming months, Republicans will fly in headline names to campaign for Abigail’s opponent and pour millions of dollars into this race against us.
**_Why? Because they know this race is neck-and-neck and that Virginia is a bellwether, so what happens in Virginia could set the stage for the rest of the country._**
That’s why building our support and momentum now is so important and will help us set the stage for November. If we want to flip this seat blue in November, we need to make sure Abigail has the resources to compete at every level.
**[So, can you split a contribution today between Abigail’s campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us prepare for this tough race ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85885?refcode=em20250216-8772&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8772%2E614464%2E7tKErl)**

name: Tim Scott
subject: Thanks to folks like you, here’s what we accomplished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter, last month I said our goal for January was to make it our best January yet.

Thanks to the support of folks like you, that's exactly what we did. _**[The NRSC had its best off-year January ever.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/OZ6iVGB1lFNOsoib1KGoLhAEwmu6ys062uWPOp7eKRiH9xpNa4exr1LrJol23EbFUtqyARq8KPoNK7Cb322b0ucZIViyKoKrGzK-bF-wzimbHUYjJc8OaNYElSesPFkdvr9-9QAzbryq9O8lffmZaK0Z7-81l2jD8hnq-6WrpMz8gs9UaMgeHQZla0TPWFaT62z7zl3gHgn0Lx6jg-JV-pulGvCq_RcKv7OAPsCTsKIOYoYe7t426FIvZ3zkeT4RE52es6zP6PBvOZHnjgQ-RRQZ6YvC2vXpUu3ABU0RGF341gMYSRJ3PTzJ7D_Sy3wZ4jiAxVtcSlhRLCekwPCw4y3cxP395MHpRxMefOwdug6mcya98hUIXj7eurFel8Bir_-dR9NO_E0zVH5A-9FqTPm46Uct916ZqdytwCaIMD-2sUM_h7FGywK5_vB04Mp0fd8vYz4uGUSMGCVEHk93R9ZoSO_nan65eKH3U_oe-wzkbLUCiJJe2GGOw-wDOejWL2_kPIy3XbKftPBAviMmBuruT_omBPaYKJ4WTKeS_bsApQ3jnvDtlCEU1ubNX05Xwc72d2SW3zB_JIWiL6_NByFQYng/JSJ7_GE7fwTYWV0yHVI8aP3YmCtVa0O2/6)**_

That kind of early fundraising now is what will make the difference in a tough fight to defend Senate seats and grow our majority next year.

**[But, Peter, we can't let up. # **[Ecologists at center dedicated to St. Kateri help children integrate faith and nature](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9NTE2ODUifQ/KwJytlUhtTbvS0eLcckgRQ)**
---
A statue of St. Kateri Tekakwitha. / Credit: Saint Kateri Conservation Center CNA Staff, Feb 16, 2025 / 06:00 am (CNA). When Kathleen Hoenke and William Jacobs aren’t working as professional ecologists by day in their secular jobs, they’re using their backgrounds to serve the Saint Kateri Conservation Center, a national Catholic nonprofit that promotes faith, ecology, biodiversity, and climate resiliency — especially with the next generation.The two colleagues have written a new book titled “God Made That!” that aims to inspire kids to explore nature, deepen their faith, and discover the beauty of God’s creation. It introduces a Catholic perspective on ecology, with accessible explanations of how Scripture, the saints, and Church teaching encourage care for creation.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9NTE2ODUifQ/KwJytlUhtTbvS0eLcckgRQ)

| | | Friend,
There’s a new sheriff in town.
**The Trump Administration has filed a lawsuit against Governor Kathy Hochul and Attorney General Letitia James** for violating federal law and jeopardizing the safety of New Yorkers with the state’s pro-illegal immigrant policies.
**[Stand with us.](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs1nBziNH1kNYwbHLEI3ig)**

**First, Hochul’s Executive Orders made New York a Sanctuary State** by preventing law enforcement from working with federal immigration officials to deport illegal immigrants convicted of crimes.
**Second, Hochul and James violated federal law by refusing to provide information to federal authorities about illegal immigrants** who apply for drivers licenses under New York’s Greenlight Law.
Even worse, the Trump Administration uncovered massive fraud in a $2.1 billion Hochul program that gave **$15,600 cash payments to illegal immigrants** living in New York.
| | | **The Democrats have failed New York and President Trump and the House Republican Majority are standing up for us.**

body:
Critical reproductive health resources are being denied!?
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T502b0e68-ece5-49b9-b08d-bd37906d8bc7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee919616-f238-4dbf-9a8e-35ea7f1b43fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, within hours of anti-abortion President Trump taking office, a KEY RESOURCE for reproductive healthcare information was DOWN.

This government-run website helped COUNTLESS Americans find access to CRUCIAL health services – including breast cancer screenings, prenatal care, and HIV testing!

It’s clear that the Trump administration blocked this website because they don’t want ANYONE to know their RIGHT to abortion access – even in states where abortion is 100% LEGAL.

His administration is willing to cut access to information about LIFESAVING health services just to DENY Americans knowledge about abortion care. It’s more than ridiculous, Peter– it’s dangerous.

We’ve set an emergency $50,000 goal so we can stand up to ANY attack on our reproductive healthcare access. [Will you join us in the fight to protect this fundamental freedom with a donation today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5208ee3-f0af-4e8e-a7fa-5420e64fd14e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T741bc2a5-002a-46f2-9dac-2fdb07828e9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Trump’s Chaos on the World Stage
body:
America Can’t Afford This.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wgv34-v0yg4x-kyd76rh0/)
---
# **Trump’s Chaos on the World Stage**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wgv34-v0yg4y-kyd76rh1/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump’s recklessness is making America a global embarrassment—**and the consequences could last for years.** Right now, European leaders are in an emergency meeting because they no longer trust the U.S. under Trump’s leadership. Instead of standing with our allies, Trump is cozying up to Putin and isolating the very nations that have had our backs for decades. Trump’s administration is undermining NATO, throwing our European allies under the bus, and **making America weaker.** This isn’t just bad policy—it’s dangerous. The world is watching, and they see a president who would rather appease dictators than strengthen democracy. America needs leadership that restores trust, protects our allies, and keeps our country safe. We cannot sit back while Trump trashes our reputation and threatens global security. [**_It’s time to take action. Donate whatever you can to support the fight against Trump’s disastrous foreign policy and ensure we elect leaders who will rebuild our alliances and defend democracy._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wgv34-v0yg4z-kyd76rh2/)**_Our country deserves better, our alliances deserve better, the world deserves better than Trump's MAGA chaos._** In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

name: The Flyover
subject: Ukraine Talks in Saudi Arabia, Three-Peat Slam Dunk, and Cake-Eating Opossum
body:
High-level diplomatic efforts to end the war in Ukraine are accelerating, with U.S. and Russian officials set to [begin talks in Saudi Arabia this week](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOqzAQQNGvsbug8RgyULh4DV1euyUy9gCTNRAZC5S_X2X7ra90pPv1GB5ekmzzf7-yK9M-IGBzA7wZGqKX9B5qHd3EjGw1O0O2ow6hAb04GruGJgroow2t5RFaEy227d2O1nSTFvfRAA0ZY2uoq7bzAbmJlqgBBlY1cJSy5-q5y1YWntJ7PzlXYV91ckspr0PZfwp7hf11XdU4hk9T2G98HQr7JCcr7EPOMG_z9zOfRWcXX5ekJMedVA3z6iX9iuWvw9PhTwAAAP__yt5SJQ), though European allies have not been invited.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFPwzAQBeBfY2-Nzme7Fw8ekKogAS1iQmKJ3PjaGpymSkyi8utR2Nne8Ok96b3v231IOV3Ph9CzL6ehRUC7AdwoamNI-d4aGf2JGVlL9oq0I4dgQV58tATHzjkgtkqb6GrlDDjqXG0QEWXyaxugIqW0AVPVLnTINmoiCwwsDHBMZRirzyFdy4VP-T7MPFbd0MvsL6XcJqEfBDYCm2VZqv4nXqe6jF-rENjUL08Hrdbw8UyPbyvUTTdyKGnmNkWhd9Y5gdvp-6iE3jWvqEiOPt6WlHOatiQMnPuQ8t9k-e-C2eNvAAAA__9nkVjX) | |
# Monday, February 17, 2025
---|---
**Happy Presidents' Day!** On this day in 1864, the CSS _H.L. Hunley_ became the first submarine to sink an enemy warship, taking down the USS _Housatonic_ off the coast of South Carolina during the Civil War, though the Hunley itself was lost shortly after. [See why it sank](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO4yAUAL8Gd1jwgBAKimvc5dorLWwe4Z2wiWwunP9-le23H41G8-cxPwIV2p-_w4a-pTqDAMMFcGnnGKhcsx6iT4iAakAvrXLWgTBiyH6x9qZMEnqRCVVyy-oWJ4w2KSZnJA7kPzYB0kqptNDj3YUV0ERlrREokGmBkVo9xr-V9pYxlau-8RjXug3F59ZeJ1O_GEwMpt77eG7U8ll3CvsWnh-MwZTpbPW4GEw7do7_X6We9EbeMtbj4j2HxmOtG0a-Hth5_rcXvLi8C2e1NI7BNBw-vjqVQufNMi2eW6DyXdF-uvL28BUAAP__qnNlVA). Imagine typing on your computer [using only your thoughts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn-N6SYyBmIoXFxDl2uvRAMeYE7GjuwhEfvrV9l-6-_T09P795geyIHj9hcPcrKmyWjTgTZQ28kjh2tqK-9WIkNNRa62zWAHoztd7c5ibfu5HZDm2ZuZ2rrv5w71SgOu3X2o2H1o2tS2rptWt7d-wMVQ5xtrO02aVKvJs6R8-584yk5ruNKL8m1JRxXcLvIsqvmjzKjMuJDnjELlsyozRnoXZcaDBGHBCHLmCFc6M8iezm2XAhwlwTtlX0CuJ3lIERDKkoki8Pp5g09R4ODoIZzbxnEDhAOXnSOB7ASFvwjSCgg5pQMwpzN6ZcYqO_98cwhc7la1ejuQw4-4_Bby5cx3AAAA___l93kr). Meta is testing a half-ton, room-sized machine that can turn brain signals into text. It’s not ready for everyday use, but the research is turning heads. Read more in our _Science_ section. We're sponsored today by [Colonial Metals Group](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFPwzAQBeBfY2-Nzme7Fw8ekKogAS1iQmKJ3PjaGpymSkyi8utR2Nne8Ok96b3v231IOV3Ph9CzL6ehRUC7AdwoamNI-d4aGf2JGVlL9oq0I4dgQV58tATHzjkgtkqb6GrlDDjqXG0QEWXyaxugIqW0AVPVLnTINmoiCwwsDHBMZRirzyFdy4VP-T7MPFbd0MvsL6XcJqEfBDYCm2VZqv4nXqe6jF-rENjUL08Hrdbw8UyPbyvUTTdyKGnmNkWhd9Y5gdvp-6iE3jWvqEiOPt6WlHOatiQMnPuQ8t9k-e-C2eNvAAAA__9nkVjX). If you're looking to get started buying precious metals, be sure to check out their free guide to buying gold and silver in 2025.
|
---
## High-Level Talks Push for Ukraine War End
High-level diplomatic efforts to end the war in Ukraine are accelerating, with U.S. and Russian officials set to [begin talks in Saudi Arabia this week](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOqzAQQNGvsbug8RgyULh4DV1euyUy9gCTNRAZC5S_X2X7ra90pPv1GB5ekmzzf7-yK9M-IGBzA7wZGqKX9B5qHd3EjGw1O0O2ow6hAb04GruGJgroow2t5RFaEy227d2O1nSTFvfRAA0ZY2uoq7bzAbmJlqgBBlY1cJSy5-q5y1YWntJ7PzlXYV91ckspr0PZfwp7hf11XdU4hk9T2G98HQr7JCcr7EPOMG_z9zOfRWcXX5ekJMedVA3z6iX9iuWvw9PhTwAAAP__yt5SJQ), though European allies have not been invited. U.S. National Security Advisor Mike Waltz and Middle East envoy Steve Witkoff were scheduled to arrive in Saudi Arabia on Sunday to hold preparatory discussions with Russian negotiators ahead of a potential meeting between President Trump and President Putin in the near future. [A Ukrainian delegation is also in Saudi Arabia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQBp8GOkdrY1goXFyTLtdeiRa8TvZiMLJNorz9Kdf_5adPGo3mz22-kUTZ779pY1dDmg2YXoFRGmdPEj-zbb0LzIa7lp3GbsLJQA_tw_l1GC2E3k8AoDUyaBx4DGAJlwFtK-5LA6NR686CvYwTrYZ73yH2wMCNBfZSU778TbLXB4f4SS_OlzVtbXSPWo_SdL8ac23MlY6d3-V7fUeuskZuzDWfpQip85lJdlZvyqrmcztUpfgsaud7qkJV0l5UodOL6vWCuPowTFPQHXk9rAvAsoQO9TJaaLPzx1tilDJgY-G-kcT_SvWnRC9n_gUAAP__yvtn9g), officially focused on economic agreements, though there is speculation about a possible visit from President Zelensky and links to the broader talks. The exclusion of European leaders has prompted heads of state [to gather in Paris today](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WcUBIBoYu3tK1o4W5c0yLjWWjoLx95e7dPumTftL_6zE8QsppfX6GhX2dyoCA9gJ4UW6gkPJ7MJL8xIysJXvl9N3dESzI2Y9EYzThdiWKDnWIdrI0USDFoG4BZPKnBqicUtqA6W73EJEtaecsMLAwwJRq2bvvktY685Tf5cV7F8sis59r3Q6hPwT2AvvWWjeO8fwE9iu3Q2Af9ppi5nNGMGtT21P_YJG7p62lnNNxdcLAcwkp_6n1v8qXx98AAAD__wYOVD4) for an emergency meeting to coordinate their response.
## Severe Weather, Flooding Hits Eastern U.S.
A major storm in the Eastern U.S. has brought [devastating flooding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGK8zAQhJ9G7mRWK9myCxU__LjLNcdxpVGstbNBloIsEvL2h6-_dmYYPr7vy3zxHDltH34nV9c8I2AnAaWyc_Ac37NpgluJkHRDTlk92hGhg-bmFJmwWtWphQD6EYMJ_dItqK9WrXrQDbvzDVBZpbQB0w6jX5C6oK3tgICEAQpcc2nvmVO90Rrf-UmlXfLeRHer9XEI_U_gJHDy1yXR62i3fNYCp69PgdPu77nIo-ayS_JHldfCaeO0ySPll-SF5BpzDmdSPCeB0zl-Cz1xEPq_UsPQmx6hKS48XhwjH70VBrbdc_wFqX-JeTr8CQAA__-umWQt) as more than 110 million people were under weather alerts Sunday. In Kentucky, flooding has led to at least [1,000 rescues](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvWEdhwn2wNAlW7p2tC5wjqkIREBi5d9X7tKp29P3pKen7-uyXCjEkG6fdGfb1rwgoBaAQprFU4jvZey9XZmRVc9WGjWbGUFDv1kpPeKknSOcaJxIXaW-rngCMoDGnPpgjzVAaaRUI4zDNJND1l4Zo4GBuxHYh5bL8J1Dahuv8Z1fXAaX7320W2uP2qmPDs8dnvd9H9LVJd7r0R-EqW1cjhRS4yL-wBpz9iHdxLOKmp9tY6pNRKYXVyGFZ_KiuERyRjXpvlj_2EOMoZ5MN8LtTiH-nmj_SXlZ_AkAAP__cHVkPA) and eight fatalities, including the deaths of a mother and her 7-year-old daughter whose car was swept away in flood waters. _"This is one of the most serious weather events we’ve dealt with in at least a decade,"_ said Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear, whose request for federal aid was approved by President Trump on Sunday. Tennessee, West Virginia, and North Carolina have also been impacted by the storm. In some areas, snow followed severe flooding on Sunday morning. ## Byron Wins Daytona as NASCAR Season Opens
The 2025 NASCAR season roared to life with the 67th running of the Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway, where [William Byron captured his second straight victory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGPtCAQgOFfA51mHEC0oPgau_3aK80cjCsXFCOcG__9Za-_-k2e5P14zA-KKe7P_7Sxq0ueEdA0gE1n50Ax3bOWwS3MyEqy66wa7YhgQK4OPbPvuWcMPFjWHj550NYMuCyj8kpG99YAO9t1SoNuh5E8sgnKWgMMLDRwiDWf7VeOe115SXe--Gx93mRya61HEeqfwEngRMfOr_JOAqcULxY4Bbpr3qkxAM1OxdPZfB-BKhd5unC8Ykqx9FZoeG4U069b__q8HP4EAAD__2WUVP0) in a dramatic finish on Sunday. The race was delayed for more than three hours due to rain, with [several late crashes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb8GO83jiT4pKLahm223NIzgyIQBA-wY_37jFtttdZuTm5PzdZtvxgcfH5_m5VRd04yAQwvYcpqt8eGcRWPV6hy6vnGKUy9JIgzQbOoONAqcRiKLSKuhiaSUXAoLZpzg3nh1vQFy4rwXILpJmgXdYHuiARw4JsBZX1PunsnHurk1nOntcrekVxPUVuteWP_BUDPUx3F00R2lfabvHE1IMfjoLpShLjXl89o95VoY6mjKYjJDfSkw1IAMNR8ZamvOmqJpB4B2yaZs7R9LE5EEJABiqJus7H74EHwZiQl4vIwPv2r1v1RvhT8BAAD__5dqZuQ) shaking up the field. Tyler Reddick finished second, and Jimmie Johnson placed third, while Kyle Busch blamed Joey Logano for a wreck that knocked out several contenders. President Trump attended the season opener and took ceremonial laps in his armored limousine, known as "the Beast," before leaving during the rain delay. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GK7CAUxvGn0W7C8ahjUlhcGNLlwlYL2wQ1x4mLGYeMk5C3X7L9tt8HP_h_DuPgUk6P-3-3kK2xjAioL4AXYcbJpXyMik82EiFJTlYY2ZkOQQOfbdAepNEKgzcdxNZ3Dq7eQ5ShNRqQJ3tqgMIIIRWopu1cQNKTNEYDATEFNKVa1ua7pEedKeajbLQ2oSw827nW54vJfwx7hv2-781R3vXt6fzPxdUwM9lvTN6-Bi28um0f7cBXOz33lHN6XQ1TcF9cyr9k_Stxs_gTAAD__-CkUWc).

name: History Facts
subject: Astronauts snuck this onto the moon
body:
When Apollo 12 departed Kennedy Space Center on November 14, 1969, the spacecraft was carrying a tiny artwork titled “Moon Museum” — albeit unknowingly to the astronauts aboard.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dofvwn4es32pb7kd6246d26bcxy19oaiykvrrjlfmzep1f9iqh5g5np4aapoioo4txrgl8k111esvelfc4sk7679t3uw5v0gnsixy9x9h3mpqqrj3jwxnevfwmtwok3lxsjjgkr5n88gn1g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srttjr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Apollo 12 left a piece of art on the moon.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srttjr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srttjr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srttjr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hen Apollo 12 departed Kennedy Space Center on November 14, 1969, the spacecraft was carrying a tiny artwork titled “[Moon Museum](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srttjr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” — albeit unknowingly to the astronauts aboard. The piece was a ceramic tile measuring less than an inch, inscribed with designs from six contemporary artists. However, the idea was never sanctioned by NASA, and “Moon Museum” had to be smuggled into space.
---
“Moon Museum” was the brainchild of concept artist Forrest Myers, who collaborated with artists Andy Warhol, Claes Oldenburg, David Novros, Robert Rauschenberg, and John Chamberlain. Each artist sketched a unique image on the tile. Warhol signed his initials in the upper left, forming the shape of a phallic rocket; Rauschenberg drew a line next to it, and Novros created a black square in the upper right. From left to right on the bottom row, Myers added an interlocking drawing, Oldenburg sketched Mickey Mouse, and Chamberlain drew an image based on a circuitry diagram.
Myers tried to get NASA’s approval to stow “Moon Museum” aboard the Saturn V rocket, but was met with radio silence. He then contacted an anonymous NASA engineer known today as John F. to help smuggle the artwork into space. The employee responded two days before launch, stating, “YOUR [sic] ON A.O.K. ALL SYSTEMS GO.” It’s believed “Moon Museum” was covertly attached to the lunar module and deposited on the moon during landing, though it’s impossible to confirm without sending another mission back to check.

## NASA sent two golden phonograph records into space.
In 1977, NASA sent Voyager 1 and Voyager 2 into space, and each probe continues to explore the far reaches of the galaxy today. NASA included a “[golden record](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srttjr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” aboard each spacecraft — a gold-plated disc serving as a sort of time capsule in case the probe ever encountered extraterrestrial life. Each record contains 115 images depicting life on Earth, such as people eating and cars stuck in traffic. They also hold audio recordings of naturally occurring sounds such as waves and thunderclaps, as well as spoken greetings in various languages and classical music from different cultures. To ensure longevity, NASA made each record from gold-plated copper mixed with a pure sample of uranium-238, the latter of which has a half-life of 4.468 billion years. The cover of each record was then hand-etched with the inscription, “To the makers of music — all worlds, all times,” along with diagrams instructing how to play the record.

clean_body: When Apollo 12 departed Kennedy Space Center on November 14, 1969, the spacecraft was carrying a tiny artwork titled “Moon Museum” — albeit unknowingly to the astronauts aboard. | W hen Apollo 12 departed Kennedy Space Center on November 14, 1969, the spacecraft was carrying a tiny artwork titled “” — albeit unknowingly to the astronauts aboard. The piece was a ceramic tile measuring less than an inch, inscribed with designs from six contemporary artists. However, the idea was never sanctioned by NASA, and “Moon Museum” had to be smuggled into space. “Moon Museum” was the brainchild of concept artist Forrest Myers, who collaborated with artists Andy Warhol, Claes Oldenburg, David Novros, Robert Rauschenberg, and John Chamberlain. Each artist sketched a unique image on the tile. Warhol signed his initials in the upper left, forming the shape of a phallic rocket; Rauschenberg drew a line next to it, and Novros created a black square in the upper right. From left to right on the bottom row, Myers added an interlocking drawing, Oldenburg sketched Mickey Mouse, and Chamberlain drew an image based on a circuitry diagram. Myers tried to get NASA’s approval to stow “Moon Museum” aboard the Saturn V rocket, but was met with radio silence. He then contacted an anonymous NASA engineer known today as John F. to help smuggle the artwork into space. The employee responded two days before launch, stating, “YOUR [sic] ON A.O.K. ## Best Large Employers in Texas
Ten Texas companies are among the [100 best large employers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrSAUheGngU6z2aJIQXEbu3PbKQ3KRklwMECOx7efOP20ayVf8n-95pcNMXxv_-1Bpn58mhGwbwAboWZnQ7xnyZ1ZwGnByQjVaaV7OQi-G6XXcVTocNSotewBLLh10f0wDmCF4sE8GKBQAlF1upXgwa9ODyt4EJaYBHKhptzWnSp9bPHxTm_K7ZoOHs1e61lY94_hxHC6rqv1KS9UnpvhFEOpheG0UKlNtHmjho4zppvyM_Ns3HmFGEMZFJOwHTbEX7n-mfo2-BMAAP__78lVyA) in the nation, according to _Forbes_ ' latest annual ranking based on anonymous employee surveys. Half of these companies, led by Houston Methodist at No. 3, are in the healthcare services sector. Other [healthcare-oriented companies](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1jcawfigaGLt3TtaPFzHZBwsIDEydtX7t7tkz7pHOn83JabiSk-7t9mI93ea15Q4IUL5KAWb2L6LGPntRV-go40qGFS02WU0AUtLVlvjVJWEiBIb6-IBINTDkaFly7qEyYQFCCqYepHsYrV-Uk6sQowxEZBPrZc-hao0dvUNX3yi0rv8tYlHVrbKxu-GM4M5-M4ehdKfpwvw9k9U3sWYjib0qJL52p557TtKX-oVL7mYqnyjVrIPtbGA1mOApSQV-j3sHdF-_2IKcUqFRvFfTMx_cnbvzVeGn8DAAD__7lBYsw) include Cook Children’s Health Care System in Fort Worth (No. 22), Baptist Health System in San Antonio (No. 27), MD Anderson Cancer Center in Houston (No. 32), and Texas Health Resources in Arlington (No. 100). Southwest Airlines (No. 54), H-E-B (No. 55), and Toyota North America in Plano (No. 71) also scored well. Irving-based Commercial Metals Company (No. 36) and Conroe Independent School District (No. 69) round out the Texas firms [on the list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrSAUheGngU6z2aJIQXEbu3PbKQ3KRklwMECOx7efOP20ayVf8n-95pcNMXxv_-1Bpn58mhGwbwAboWZnQ7xnyZ1ZwGnByQjVaaV7OQi-G6XXcVTocNSotewBLLh10f0wDmCF4sE8GKBQAlF1upXgwa9ODyt4EJaYBHKhptzWnSp9bPHxTm_K7ZoOHs1e61lY94_hxHC6rqv1KS9UnpvhFEOpheG0UKlNtHmjho4zppvyM_Ns3HmFGEMZFJOwHTbEX7n-mfo2-BMAAP__78lVyA).
## Bee Cave Accuses Former City Manager of Fraud
Following a January ruling from a Travis County judge that allowed construction on a large distribution center in Bee Cave to continue, the city amended its original lawsuit by alleging that the project’s developers [colluded with former City Manager](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGupCAUQL8GOwxcGV0Kim3sZtstzRWuSh7KBFDGv3-Z17_6JCcn5_9zeqIP_lj_4U6mvJc4gYAHF8DlMDn04Z5U48wsnJYNGTl0etAP1ctmM70Uf0iLzqkZe43aPlSnYCGcrQYlZOPNRyZADhJg6HSrxCIW63RvxSIkElOCnC8xtWWjQm_MS7jjRam1cW-C2Up5Zdb9ZTAyGGut7dcbjw9kMB5UM4MxRIuBwVgSXj5zG8-j3AzGJaadEp-JuMWLuPXl5jseuFLi6Bw5XiIPWPPpC8cV_ZEL94c7c0keA6-YaItnJgZjk4x7VR-Cz_3AlFh39OEnsvx67TLwHQAA__-qanJp) Clint Garza to conceal information from city council members. The lawsuit claims Garza received cash and gifts in exchange for [keeping the council in the dark](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEFjQ0AuXLyGLq_d0hrwACM5GOEJDn-_ym699b06OjpfD_9Ajrwt__FJTt5z8gbM_QbmpnsfkOPl2yq4EYLVFTndN7a397bT1erGiWbCpiOLZCGgxdECBEAKbQPNvWL3gYHRvTamb2zdwgzzFGw3wQwaSbVAgSUdtawk9MY8xyuddNRTelbRrSJ7Vs0_ZQZlhlJKPRJNeP5-6yWdygwblfxZV5TsNyrKDBPL5V97QKHsI5b8YvG4IG9ZPG_hleVgjD7QSTHtdOTqcGEvHCPnrlctLE_k-GMhf2Y5nfkOAAD__yQFal8) about a change in ownership and development plans for the property. The city is seeking over a million dollars in damages and wants the 270,000-square-foot business park torn down. A representative for developers KBC and Velocis denied the allegations, characterizing the new charges as “a desperate attempt to repackage these allegations to justify hundreds of thousands of taxpayer dollars used for this lawsuit.” A trial is [scheduled for August](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAQxfGnwR3WgD8IBcVt3OW2W1pjM8RI2ERATPz2q6Tf_uino__Pfb6jD_54_MedTHm7OEuQAwfJhZot-nDNfWPNAlaLhoxQnVZ66EfRbMbSCrelF4PSNC40jItSulOug2Fwt9E23nwwkEIJKVWn2x4cuNXqcQUHAon1QNaXmNqyUaE3ZheueFJq17g3wWylPDPr_jE5MTnVWlsX3wpfufjjM2FyOqhmJqeFiK94Ev8qPGDNL1-4i2mnxFdfLr7jgQ9K3NJJIT4pZV4x0RZfmZpk7LP6EHweFevhsaMP3xPlzyqnkb8BAAD__0lKZ68).
## Man 'Reunited' with Same Fish Two Years Later
Fisherman Ross Gomez [caught the same trophy largemouth bass](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_G7kDrxcG4cHENXa69Ehl7DSuZgMAKyd-fiK697mlGeiPNz324e878mL79Qq680jog4K0CrJQZouf8HrSMboRolSSnTGONvelWydlp0_kuxtR2ikbrkWA0mCxQaChBoyS7SwaojEI0ja01JEgh2jZAAuVJaKDIZd3rMlOhlz9Sfq9P2uuwLjK7uZTtEM2XwF5gf55nHeZ9fVytwD5zoivmHP_Q74VDvugjq0aeqtEfR4Wg2g5VV2_zJncXt5Nz5qM1QsO0eM6fwfLvA0-HvwEAAP__zzZdiQ) he snagged two years ago in Lake Alan Henry last week, earning a shoutout from the Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) on social media. Gomez initially caught the fish at the Lubbock-area reservoir on Feb. 10, 2023, when it [weighed 13.22 pounds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbEb2QTAePHRhS9eO6LDP4SQDEXbi5O-rdO_-9J70fq7zFTnxfvvGjVx5xWMGBRepQGozB-T0nvsmuEUFqxty2nTW2Es_6GZ1y2iRRord6CmqYMwl4kJ69ApNIBgadh-ZAm00gOls26uoog928CoqjSR6RYHLcbZlpUIvzDG9jyedrT-2Jrm1lHsW3ZeAScBUa20rnxQgcl4_iIBpp5oFTBk3krqX9-OxB7lgztLj47YWWSp7krxLkG_CMzenC_fKKXEejOjVbUNOf73y74Cng98AAAD__0zOXx0). The fish was transported to the Texas Freshwater Fisheries Center in Athens, where it was tagged. Its DNA was analyzed and used to spawn 33,649 fingerlings that were stocked into Texas lakes. When Gomez caught the fish again last week, it weighed 14.78 pounds, making it one of the biggest catches of the season. TPWD [congratulated Gomez](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngS3W5XIBMzBUqryl6lApo0UNxEg4jgxNnLev3L3b0Rk-6b-cx7PPJd-uH36Jru1pHRFQnQBPwozB5_IaiQf3DcEKHp0w0hqrSAs-O1DW-IRWKqW8FNrrgBSnhNirlILm2R0YoDAC0UjbESRIU7B6ggTCR0YQQ27r1rU5trj7msprfcStm9aFFze3dq9MvjEcGA778TIcvj4v77f4rAyH2nz7OYboLVCvDGmtrCZJSHxz4f7MpeSqDSO4Lj6XP7j9W_pw-BsAAP__C_9STg) on being “reunited” with the fish, calling it a “Bigger Better Bass bromance,” as both catches were made right before Valentine’s Day.

Half of these companies, led by Houston Methodist at No. 3, are in the healthcare services sector. Other include Cook Children’s Health Care System in Fort Worth (No. 22), Baptist Health System in San Antonio (No. 27), MD Anderson Cancer Center in Houston (No. 32), and Texas Health Resources in Arlington (No. 100). Southwest Airlines (No. 54), H-E-B (No. 55), and Toyota North America in Plano (No. 71) also scored well. Irving-based Commercial Metals Company (No. 36) and Conroe Independent School District (No. 69) round out the Texas firms . Bee Cave Accuses Former City Manager of Fraud Following a January ruling from a Travis County judge that allowed construction on a large distribution center in Bee Cave to continue, the city amended its original lawsuit by alleging that the project’s developers Clint Garza to conceal information from city council members. The lawsuit claims Garza received cash and gifts in exchange for about a change in ownership and development plans for the property. The city is seeking over a million dollars in damages and wants the 270,000-square-foot business park torn down. A representative for developers KBC and Velocis denied the allegations, characterizing the new charges as “a desperate attempt to repackage these allegations to justify hundreds of thousands of taxpayer dollars used for this lawsuit.” A trial is . Man 'Reunited' with Same Fish Two Years Later Fisherman Ross Gomez he snagged two years ago in Lake Alan Henry last week, earning a shoutout from the Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) on social media. Gomez initially caught the fish at the Lubbock-area reservoir on Feb. 10, 2023, when it . The fish was transported to the Texas Freshwater Fisheries Center in Athens, where it was tagged. Its DNA was analyzed and used to spawn 33,649 fingerlings that were stocked into Texas lakes. When Gomez caught the fish again last week, it weighed 14.78 pounds, making it one of the biggest catches of the season. | | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxN19FQS03RC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDQzMTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTdfRUEtN0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA0MzExLTI4OTkifQ/E-jEGpTq11CjODtpWDEBRA)

After years of turning their nose up to those of us in rural America, now Hollywood liberals and Wall Street billionaires are launching a new program to try and trick the good people of rural America into voting Democrat.

They didn’t give a rip about our so-called “flyover states” before...but now that they see their electoral future on the verge of collapse, they are planning to spend millions to spread their propaganda into our rural cities and towns.

We CANNOT let them get away with this, and I’m committed to stopping them. **[So, I’m reaching out to personally ask for your help to stop the Democrat takeover of rural America.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxN19FQS03RC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDQzMTEtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTdfRUEtN0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA0MzExLTI4OTkifQ/89X5tnm5WJJ7trrWi6Qspw)**

They want to erase our values, our traditions, and our way of life, and YOU can help me stop them.

Thanks for hearing me out,
-Troy

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102263907/528622825/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkOWEzNy0zMWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq-RsE3E8woPGsiEbpqbPSASs7SNRFpb8N3DmJe76o=)
Peter, President’s Day has taken a whole new meaning for me since I’ve joined Congress. **I regularly walk into the Capitol rotunda and sit by myself at night – right next to the statue of Abraham Lincoln, who also served Illinois in the House of Representatives. In fact, the 17th District overlaps with the district that _he_ served. (How cool is that?) ** Sometimes I sit for a few minutes. Sometimes I need an hour or more. The silence of this building has a lot to say if you take the time to listen. Not a day goes by that I don’t reflect on the honor of having your trust – for decades as your Meteorologist, looking out for families in bad weather, and now as a Representative of my home state and for my hometown. Abe understood that a House divided could not stand, and he also understood that we could not simply give into persecution of entire groups to keep a false peace. He chose the hardest path, because it was the only true path forward for our country’s prosperity. **While it’s not lost on me that the politics of hate and division have taken over the White House, I believe the light of tomorrow is brighter.** I will never stop believing that our best days are when we work together to solve problems, not scapegoat and target those without a voice, or evoke fear over our differences. I didn’t think it was possible, but each day I’m prouder and prouder to be from the Land of Lincoln and represent Illinois’ 17th District in Congress. And I believe, like Honest Abe, that we will solve real issues with relationships and hard work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102263908/528622827/1514584251?refcode=em-2.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkOWEzNy0zMWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq-RsE3E8woPGsiEbpqbPSASs7SNRFpb8N3DmJe76o=) Happy Birthday, Mr. President. As long as I’m trusted to serve IL-17, I will always abide by your lessons. \- Eric _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102263910/528622829/1514584251?refcode=em-2.17.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkOWEzNy0zMWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yaq-RsE3E8woPGsiEbpqbPSASs7SNRFpb8N3DmJe76o=)

name: Team USO
subject: Have you tested your knowledge in our Presidents' Day quiz?
body:
Take our Presidents' Day quiz now!
USO Supporter,
All of our presidents have played a role in shaping our nation, and our military, into what they are today -- beginning with George Washington's leadership during the American Revolution.
That's why, every year, we recognize all of the presidents and commanders in chief who have served our country throughout our history.
**[In honor of Presidents' Day today, will you recognize all the heroes who have served as commanders in chief by testing your knowledge in our new quiz?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[TAKE THE QUIZ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/8PN4hEqEz-sa/RVI0SUcrNm5VK1VHaVFSRjd3OGREQVdObTFnYnRDQmtjN3BhaysrQitqVXVOdEF4ZUFjMTFGWmRrM0FWYWxDUWMrbWx2TE9IeWRub3NRTXlDQStNSUZ5VmtSQ2hkVkdLazhkL3BqL1JqcGM9S0/VHRhODAreTAvQld0SUsxaFBCYTdxb0U1SjdjUkdYd0VEbGRoY3I4c0xqVjdtQUk1WmZyRkRSeERBQmF0eGlvMTdDNzl6dEpRTllOZVVlK3FFcENPU3g2aElQN2tBOUZuS0)

Thank you for honoring all of those who serve.
The USO

**Subject:** How much do you know about U.S. presidents?

[TAKE THE QUIZ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBpjp2vQ~/RVI0SUcrNm5VK1VHaVFSRjd3OGREQVdObTFnYnRDQmtjN3BhaysrQitqVXVOdEF4ZUFjMTFGWmRrM0FWYWxDUWMrbWx2TE9IeWRub3NRTXlDQStNSUZ5VmtSQ2hkVkdLazhkL3BqL1JqcGM9S0/VHRhODAreTAvQld0SUsxaFBCYTdxb0U1SjdjUkdYd0VEbGRoY3I4c0xqVjdtQUk1WmZyRkRSeERBQmF0eGlvMTdDNzl6dEpRTllOZVVlK3FFcENPU3g2aElQN2tBOUZuS0)

How much do you know about our presidents? **This Presidents ' Day, we wanted to give you the opportunity to learn more about this important holiday -- and its connection to our military.**
**[Will you please take our quiz now to learn more about the history of Presidents' Day and honor our U.S. presidents?](https://links.e.uso.)**
After leading the Continental Army to victory and leading our nation to independence, President George Washington stepped down after just two terms. His presidency and the precedent he set were a shining example for everyone who came after.
That's why we celebrate all our presidents on Presidents' Day -- which takes place around George Washington's birthday every year.
In honor of this important day, we wanted to give you the opportunity to test your knowledge about the history of our presidents and the role they've played in the USO and our military. **Are you ready for the first question?**
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JWPW-LBP/RVI0SUcrNm5VK1VHaVFSRjd3OGREQVdObTFnYnRDQmtjN3BhaysrQitqVXVOdEF4ZUFjMTFGWmRrM0FWYWxDUWMrbWx2TE9IeWRub3NRTXlDQStNSUZ5VmtSQ2hkVkdLazhkL3BqL1JqcGM9S0/VHRhODAreTAvQld0SUsxaFBCYTdxb0U1SjdjUkdYd0VEbGRoY3I4c0xqVjdtQUk1WmZyRkRSeERBQmF0eGlvMTdDNzl6dEpRTllOZVVlK3FFcENPU3g2aElQN2tBOUZuS0)

subject: I went on Bill Maher’s show again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump

| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze0iuscqui1bq26ut7vnp77o2jfa83i2ivg45mm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3i6ep72c3h2bs)

Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn5oqj7uig048emc6ha6qqet4rtgsv35m7kfukoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3i6ep72c3h2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|

Byron Donalds _****_

I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one. Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump. But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA. Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA. It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only INCREASED since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand. Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight. | | Thank you and god bless, Byron Donalds **** | | | | Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress 138 Conant Street Beverly, MA 01985 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

### "Instead of stopping the stupid spending, Democrats attack the guy who's exposing it?!!"
Feb 17
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=157315588&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzE1NTg4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczOTgwMjU0OSwiZXhwIjoxNzQyMzk0NTQ5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.idu8ob1zquDCsmPgH0WQVeVnW3JgG_COcNdiEWv_8Gw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=157315588&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzE1NTg4LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MDI1NDksImV4cCI6MTc0MjM5NDU0OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.yJLkGWXHE0kaOiwTKFxokOfLF9BK6MkbFD9cv-qnbjs)
---
| | [](https://substack..Bt1uhblnmHSfuJgP4NN_5WXhm6VR6Hkj8j2GGsSsto0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/jim-jordan-snaps-at-jerry-nadler?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

GOP Rep. Jim Jordan **[snapped at Democrat Rep. Jerry Nadler during a heated congressional hearing](https://substack.com/redirect/baae52ca-2537-45e9-91b0-d95e7dde8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for challenging the legitimacy of Elon Musk's DOGE efforts to cut the federal government down to size and eliminate waste
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/baae52ca-2537-45e9-91b0-d95e7dde8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/baae52ca-2537-45e9-91b0-d95e7dde8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"While we witness these incursions on the law and the constitution, my Republican colleagues do nothing!" Nadler said. "They cheer on Elon Musk as he usurpes congressional authority..."
Jordan was **[waiting for is moment to give Nadler a piece of his mind.](https://substack.com/redirect/baae52ca-2537-45e9-91b0-d95e7dde8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Instead of stopping the stupid spending, Democrats attack the guy who's exposing it!!" he lashed out. "Elon Musk is exposing in the federal government exactly what he exposed when he purchased Twitter,... Big Government was pressuring Big Tech to censor Americans!"
**["Musk is now doing that for the federal government, we think that's a good thing!"](https://substack.com/redirect/baae52ca-2537-45e9-91b0-d95e7dde8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he continued.
Jordan continued to call out the Democrat's misplaced outrage over a man who is objectively helping the American people by making sure their tax dollars don't go to waste, and the people responsible for wasting them are fired.
"You want to get mad at Musk, go right ahead!!" Jordan dared Democrats. "The guy who got 77 million votes on November 5 says he wants Elon Musk working for him,... to expose stupid things our government is spending money on!"
Watch Jordan absolutely go off at Nadler and the Dems:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/baae52ca-2537-45e9-91b0-d95e7dde8af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# CBS News host faces backlash for blaming the Holocaust on "free speech" in bizarre live interview with Marco Rubio
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa42bce-8375-49f5-8850-fc510448d05d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
CBS News' "Face the Nation" host Margaret Brennan faced strong backlash **[after suggesting on air that free speech was "weaponized"](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa42bce-8375-49f5-8850-fc510448d05d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Nazi Germany to perpetrate the Holocaust.
During a segment Sunday, Brennan commented, "There's a real concern about free speech being weaponized, which is what happened in Germany, that allowed the Holocaust." This statement drew sharp criticism from social media users and historians alike.
Secretary of State Marco Rubio countered Brennan's claim, stating, "I have to disagree with you. Free speech was not used to conduct genocide. The genocide was conducted by an authoritarian Nazi regime that happened to also be genocidal because they hated Jews... There was no free speech in Nazi Germany. There was none."
"To equate free speech with the atrocities of the Holocaust is not only historically inaccurate but also diminishes the severity of what happened," said Jonathan Greenblatt, CEO of the Anti-Defamation League, in a statement.
Brennan's comments were part of a broader discussion with Rubio on the balance between free speech and hate speech.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa42bce-8375-49f5-8850-fc510448d05d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Jim Jordan for challenging the legitimacy of Elon Musk's DOGE efforts to cut the federal government down to size and eliminate waste "While we witness these incursions on the law and the constitution, my Republican colleagues do nothing!" Nadler said. "They cheer on Elon Musk as he usurpes congressional authority..." Jordan was "Instead of stopping the stupid spending, Democrats attack the guy who's exposing it!!" he lashed out. "Elon Musk is exposing in the federal government exactly what he exposed when he purchased Twitter,... Big Government was pressuring Big Tech to censor Americans!" he continued. Jordan continued to call out the Democrat's misplaced outrage over a man who is objectively helping the American people by making sure their tax dollars don't go to waste, and the people responsible for wasting them are fired. "You want to get mad at Musk, go right ahead!!" Jordan dared Democrats. "The guy who got 77 million votes on November 5 says he wants Elon Musk working for him,... to expose stupid things our government is spending money on!" Watch Jordan absolutely go off at Nadler and the Dems: Gold Breaks Another Record Under President Trump! | | ---|---|--- The start of the Trump Presidency has been good for gold! The shiny yellow metal has yet again broken another record high in price since Trump has taken the reins, and could go much higher! It's really no surprise... Under Trump's first term, the price of gold soared a staggering 53%. He's even talked about the U.S.A. going back to a gold standard! "We used to have a very, very solid country because it was based on a gold standard." \- Donald J. Trump. He's also been quoted saying that... "Bringing back the gold standard would be very hard to do, but boy, would it be wonderful. We'd have a standard on which to base our money." - Donald J. Trump. Here's the thing: Gold has been used as a store of value for centuries, the government can't easily manipulate it, and it's known as a hedge against market risk and inflation. How high will the price of gold go under Trump's second term? Will gold continue to break record after record in 2025 and beyond? You'll even learn about an IRS Loophole Trump has kept open that allows you to diversify your savings with gold and silver tax and penalty free! Plus, you could get up to a 10% Instant Match in BONUS SILVER! So, don't wait a second longer. Get your hands on your free copy of this kit and start your gold and silver journey today! CBS News host faces backlash for blaming the Holocaust on "free speech" in bizarre live interview with Marco Rubio | | ---|---|--- CBS News' "Face the Nation" host Margaret Brennan faced strong backlash in Nazi Germany to perpetrate the Holocaust. During a segment Sunday, Brennan commented, "There's a real concern about free speech being weaponized, which is what happened in Germany, that allowed the Holocaust." This statement drew sharp criticism from social media users and historians alike. Secretary of State Marco Rubio countered Brennan's claim, stating, "I have to disagree with you. Free speech was not used to conduct genocide. The genocide was conducted by an authoritarian Nazi regime that happened to also be genocidal because they hated Jews... There was no free speech in Nazi Germany. There was none." "To equate free speech with the atrocities of the Holocaust is not only historically inaccurate but also diminishes the severity of what happened," said Jonathan Greenblatt, CEO of the Anti-Defamation League, in a statement. Brennan's comments were part of a broader discussion with Rubio on the balance between free speech and hate speech. * | | POLL Which agency should DOGE slash next? | ? ? ? ? ? 1️⃣ **_Target Map:_ The DLCC launched our cycle target map, identifying key power building opportunities **
State Democrats are sounding the alarm as MAGA’s dangerous power grab at the federal level makes states the next battleground to stop Project 2025. [Winning a majority in our target states means having the power to fight back against the Trump administration. → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1RHA-_gftpK7KWi_Uh9RlotMAcLvUF3zSs5t5sxoeozxevY3pGjYMSXXrIo6sra8Svc558qLt8GSJ1l02oBBmSbK2dU89AtbJ0x5KQefREdNMiir7wSpUJVKeyCOC-GIHftoNS9JIY4EiTVEjLSzMCoMUq_kpxSQsreSPKeswmzaLPU--SuqWEK0SumwEPEzQO0bEh2N_4Nv9lIHjGC6RHkZAtuvjhpt-d10CLLw-_kPoUxuT_NHRRSUo6WKM7OxEhPsswvuerbZRi89NxgLIILNofjmcAuDakRqr82HI3wvVzA04UDC7ZaQU-bpfxiPcAtDsypya7e2jxG4S_pjN-_0XTNjaEdchH4WAoRPJoME3LZ8Nep4vJs_qXutfRR_SklhRkO_2Xqa1v4JVyJujxcpgyu9P67-xeGJkzCyDDDSW6MnF6v1L69qCKYGVO3ucj86RNTrOwhyVM9-rsnfD_JbphWod4n8NuqmOFVjo9E3U9MoExLFZLXNfpGR24keZPZ_syUtZY676ApGb73xqfIP38fVXszz3dTNZXCJi96R0JMHpRWrgZ8hWfIlBrB5OXhrndg7B4xt8LBp64hK0dQMLlf04e-1fsEPCKiFhA4OA/4e3/TYJIXF4LRuiqCo0jVaM5gQ/h1/h001._0I0WZHtwdvx1WjasH2uJbf00NCdtmegYanFkrTmFec)
2️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats target Virginia as key battleground state for 2025 and 2026 **
All 100 Virginia House of Delegate seats will be up for grabs this November, and these races are being eyed as a national test for power ahead of the 2026 midterms. [The DLCC is laser-focused on securing the most power in Virginia during an era of total GOP power in Washington → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbLiaHJ-U5TfDcFwGLuhaTXKVeo4Xs6es9Nkj0aWv8bfsxq41uQQkDri5wvMK0SHgN0wbcMCaIb2AccKfUcmJLnb029EYay-hqEkcFD-RvMb_pvqWNOHSxqVWeUuC01__FxXyzwwt1GAW1o-Y7qjnqppiZhybOQZhUWTSGbauSe0qPnjfcjD82sBA4EG78aqoQ1m5mUymMxM3CoR9g33--TPXPhEX1LunQ9RHZ8Rnw_CUel2mmaDw6Z556BsDL7sKZIkzBapff_Q4C7STegYjD3AhvARSXzeQd4K7Yf5_hg0QfIrnMiG-l2ecRGf83getPux3hDjbSD6dZ3dlNqsYmxO8DZ1xCVECdo_2TQmZ9RujHSXA25ZM9kMlGYICCcQQWpAxDPTCbhzfyKm_ZBvLFSFtnYrTTH_l-wQ5a5g1au8u3jpjci7nh5sToJdrI3xA1MjumDv0v-Z8piUlZD5-SaUxy40na8EzswTpcW_nuAfPRNz345WukHUy3s3kMbxs78ZGRPhKwuKKgwu-xkNtXa05ET82SZUIWdYJRtUQq1rZMuiP4-QIwwxIZ9bM401NwVotIwJJv8F-dbQ5FfFqjkwqjwWsa2Ru2-pDI7jCvW-/4e3/TYJIXF4LRuiqCo0jVaM5gQ/h2/h001.A07k2d8cXiN2CPB7p90LlVj2YZb-TtpPuKyUjNWnl4c)
3️⃣ **_Trump Firewall:_ Republican-led states are seeking to implement measures to slash critical services from state governments **
In an attempt to mirror the Trump administration’s “DOGE” initiatives nationwide, Republican legislatures in red states are making dramatic cuts to government programs, and they are using Trump’s Project 2025 as their blueprint. [Republicans are just getting started, read more about how Democrats are safeguarding our democracy → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pBUYHk_9rBVL6shyqawlDeeB0OWT3caV_icSI1vh4fbCL89-iFTk4LMv-gbiyxShZZkCNVCGAHwKIH7S2RqAVcZGSvCHet64mNf_Szupu5nTv6XRhRL5BCCLFlL9m12bICSzaVTzw3iSz-sJ7dGh1Yu1xkRdkSuZjeqPvkQDvJM1T35I9qn7vcFBEfN7GdSTtuK8Y4rHGeD9P_CHLdOV34mLLNEPOdff97OPjkLyW9JBW0qJ2TDFTjXobbMX6HM4kH20p5q8gvUcodYJN_x0giZINsFqUMIncf9FIAJ81IBeumhnXLKa09bD985fGYmFlZ4hYzYgqjjkIwOUoBRdra9ogMH4p374hRMt95U1M9q79hYXrxQDs2RYUCiE5Tld25WqX37QdfiV_o0QEwkoy0lo-Kpa70CsI00KVAngAtDB45MvOZYECb5JRbqbmg_sMkAyayXeX8h7SeqGXaPGw8aDSK644K6J6E3_T8j7cBV7Z3tPqpx_G-U-vJJGbAKzjzq6fgcVMBRrtFZ-H-C8ymZchx6jXwAfjARsbf0DI00yEZCpKDOCjW25Js9Kt-HF_0WbUxk1hEbnzx-bABiLRJ5uNcuMAowwnnzXC_5sFdfVppYEQpn4p_JWALCOYAQ8sQ/4e3/TYJIXF4LRuiqCo0jVaM5gQ/h3/h001.Th6WSC-YE02Oq9QNvGDhzs1Kmhl6WBSySeuD-ws85Ko)

The DLCC announced support for FOUR spotlight candidates who are facing critical races in the states. [**Read more about our spotlight candidates →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pB67dGVixFv3g62Lrur5TzWCinNCDN8eOAv92j9-xnbdzxzWunIY16T4F7oPYwDJWJOAiBbzICimR6-reehmRW2KdTMqRKsgLK6zwuTQ6Gd1R6dldEb6eX_haZojP3ilF0oWHY9PR3YHQv6zlF-lvw5lCZlcF4UOHlP826QnfEnwnnoSvZ5BKMi1Iv8f0w1e2NIogWjevd34kkX_bUtW82Hpm_9925sXY7Is7aFDKt0lYFbpiXcB1qQ_luUYtK1c_BoMYcZi97IcsWPvHgNkaDkbA8QgWGHbmO1jIrUCv1QW6ty95O1PvoJkJP9bnDV7Rr2moMtoN4cuQL1zs1pt0ivluN1OKaKrelMRPwSDbrZTd-taI16qAY12TGVHQwjswwlqQC4SRwqGUnnteYZTR4fMY1gTMTVSTQQFq_WA-dzzJSvSmigWhrwPuG_-05w4_v2zGBgP-2sfACor7Pg7BXK5Ke1eKCMpr7QFM_4Kh8JIdoMU4YLbDtY6N-wk3pt5u3FX8K_Wj3FzCz-yL_psPT51R7YOEEqfSOZJgtvb-Jy5g/4e3/TYJIXF4LRuiqCo0jVaM5gQ/h4/h001.T2zsDr6vdfIoyfk5pEkyxuQWemboX-fAaDM2Ha0s-EI)

[**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDxrBNcNHXqACsGS7rvbl8ETU3DLibhXWMNddjYOXOVS9ajIhRALC9_X2Rwy3JitNIKl1xoZi3LqG8H8U3qKj0Y_AZWT-VqcsyTox7UoXeTAlYM_PRyEDsCy5mPW-7ZDzxnnobzrQA2T_2al7YdLwzpamaMo3wlTtbYAxknN0c79YOcihCxGeco2jTx6qG4wRERfpBa64l1BSrxrjF7-pSqd7BRp8Tt_5huakkAD0WvwOLwDDOgGzx33fXCfOrwmWJf1TXjq1MIrfjindYyR4uPac2VqK7pN6XPkVcakmAN4FU3LLRT_Qz7jQCJ6lZcr0lf50cQNnt3kVL99TfhXf_6xbCWNyQOKJ_1uz3b2lP90iozMur5tbFgx9vPmoc7-C_GxV1hpPuIcjTvvKahpw7SeYCREGN_tZf5YyTiAwHdVBlPZaCcl2_-3fNNC1V1HlSGiwO6PWNKcTlVjqGrOejD_Op0jVJ7I0tOb7-gTOEouOqSHxL0qMu53Ns_J_M6C7b1l9wAJYCQYuuF1nG8rCwUQ/4e3/TYJIXF4LRuiqCo0jVaM5gQ/h5/h001.ZVPMKSqsvgs_lWKsWkVaIhZlwdJ4KF-nqc2fz4dSi3Q)

clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Monday, February 17th, 2025. | | | | | 7 | 1️⃣ Target Map: The DLCC launched our cycle target map, identifying key power building opportunities State Democrats are sounding the alarm as MAGA’s dangerous power grab at the federal level makes states the next battleground to stop Project 2025. 2️⃣ Virginia: Democrats target Virginia as key battleground state for 2025 and 2026 All 100 Virginia House of Delegate seats will be up for grabs this November, and these races are being eyed as a national test for power ahead of the 2026 midterms. 3️⃣ Trump Firewall: Republican-led states are seeking to implement measures to slash critical services from state governments In an attempt to mirror the Trump administration’s “DOGE” initiatives nationwide, Republican legislatures in red states are making dramatic cuts to government programs, and they are using Trump’s Project 2025 as their blueprint. 🔦 Spotlight: DLCC highlights top candidates The DLCC announced support for FOUR spotlight candidates who are facing critical races in the states. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: AMAC Action
subject: Elon Musk is right
body:
American elections should be decided by American citizens. | |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7dc6c7a6b03643f1a6da6343b217aad6&_e=8_JtCAHGWipl3Ghf4I7WQQHD9nN-kqV0FSMyMLjdG99KJXGwaFAvFzmqN2u_sNXvaHcJ1Cg-4ZHUzpoOA3CcLNrvDdxt3HxkM3az6ifk7-Ny-ylrxtiDb7MhNxqNVSEzR7AuXT_6jD98ivWjEdEjguMQUTZQ7YcAoTTksNgcW5HkYhMnYjeMlQNvzYdyucaV0YV-m-WcCS8Kq7RgYvBy2sqVCGC8dTwWZ9Skxc0ryikGFFlysm4A73FIMfeyAXnBtXqD69A9O3OYDZ76PDlsm8ixOSpCAgdZlYmqEI2pwYKuftWTros9BzRkzoPju0IYDgyww_45r6n_dBGlo7A_HMGVr-a4j0adI4CrBVvlv7U%3D)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7dc6c7a6b03643f1a6da6343b217aad6&_e=8_JtCAHGWipl3Ghf4I7WQQHD9nN-kqV0FSMyMLjdG99KJXGwaFAvFzmqN2u_sNXvaHcJ1Cg-4ZHUzpoOA3CcLNrvDdxt3HxkM3az6ifk7-Ny-ylrxtiDb7MhNxqNVSEzR7AuXT_6jD98ivWjEdEjguMQUTZQ7YcAoTTksNgcW5HkYhMnYjeMlQNvzYdyucaV0YV-m-WcCS8Kq7RgYvBy2g3bqjqElzNvveSVJwtkuJjBMoRI-dk-mfOFvdw2uzKttv_-hInxtlS5-9TZrPFWJRvuXCeM5QbNspytvA07x8Zug4LHQVaNmCU6RvpujXh4nZeljdBOu753aFqYA0OIPSqFOP4oRmm3n2SHnL-eKjM%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. name: Frank Wojtash - Political Director
subject: Big Week for Our Congressman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f9a068cf2b1d/big-week-for-our-congressman?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Rob had a busy week in our nation’s capital. He made some crucial votes to cut regulations and protect our Border Patrol Agents. He spent the week in D.C. and continues to fight for the people of NEPA.
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob had a big week! He celebrated the Eagles Super Bowl Victory, decorating 1133 Longworth in midnight green, held the line on benefits our friends and neighbors rely on, celebrated Valentine’s Day with Chelsea, and is helping to bring prosperity to our home.
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=f1096bb5cb&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Stephen’s Pharmacy, in Honesdale. Be sure to support local businesses like Stephen’s!
---
|
---
| The Democrats are already coming after our Congressman for 2026! They’re gearing up to lie and slander Rob, and we need your help to put our side of the story out there. If you are able, please donate to our campaign to keep NEPA out of the grasp of the far-left.
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!
---
| [Click Here to Donate ](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=8dcf32e730&e=131e83a3c2)
---
| Best Regards,Frank WojtashPolitical Director - Rob for PA

## Is It Still There? Rand Paul Wants Elon and DOGE to Audit Fort Knox and Its $425B Gold Reserve – RedState
Like father, like son. Former Rep. Ron Paul (R-TX) has been interested in auditing Fort Knox since the early 1980s to see if the hundreds of billions of dollars of gold are actually there as the government claims.
