| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Breakup Notice
subject: It's not you… It's your membership.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now’s your chance to reactivate, Friend.

|
---
| | |
Friend...

I'm not sure how to say this...

But I think it's time for us to face the truth...

**Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost.** We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. _**But now, it seems like you've moved on.**_

---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zol8prdpu5mn4op884n8rhib5er7s3u8egbsg258_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h68o76chh2bs)
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z42lunk721aokdqcna6j2dj6r007iskti6vgu4n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h68o76chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team. Your support meant everything to us, and we were unstoppable together. **But now, everything is at risk. **

---
| | | [STAND WITH HOUSE GOP](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0gatntuskvji4hp1kp6lpuv0j92pbqtkuv3oii8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h68o76chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

Look, I'm not here to beg you to come back. _**But I want you to know that we're not the same without you**_. Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled.

---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpgdg57k5dvoomgg205tckif2mg0mm1pnpne06jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h68o76chh2bs)
---
| | | [REACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2jqvqcn50qd8t638crnooj2ven89ci46glhjt70_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h68o76chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

**[If you're willing to try again, I'm here to give it another shot. Renew your membership, and let's see if we can rekindle what we once had.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5pes70euv133b8n081oqn4d14d5njtrn32mhvd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h68o76chh2bs "If you're willing to try again, I'm here to give it another shot. Renew your membership, and let's see if we can rekindle what we once had.")**

_Renewing your membership would mean the world to me, Friend, can I count on you to take this step and make a difference?_

---
| | | [REJOIN THE TEAM](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zc93u5o9taankqakbfiskolo0r630reo2027ltio_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h68o76chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

Yours truly,

Dan, Membership Services

name: DNC HQ
subject: We are not powerless →
body:
---
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250217_2786_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2786_22930333_Z-48bw&akid=2786%2E22930333%2EZ-48bw) We know your inbox is probably crowded, so we’ll keep this brief, Derek (we promise, just 60 seconds). Here’s where things stand: A new Trump presidency has begun. Trump and his extreme, billionaire allies in Congress and his Cabinet are hard at work passing destructive executive orders and legislation. Their plans threaten the very foundations of our democracy. But we are not powerless. Millions of people voted against Trump and his allies. There are millions of us — across the country — who won’t stand idly by and let Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress do whatever they want. We can — _and will_ — fight back against Trump and his allies’ Project 2025 agenda. But to do that, we’ll need a strong, organized Democratic Party leading the way. But this work requires a massive amount of resources. **That’s why we need your help today, Derek.** The Democratic National Committee is the organization best positioned to move resources to the places they’re needed most in 2025, 2026, and beyond as we work to elect the Democrats who will be a check on Trump’s power. [**If holding Trump accountable and electing Democrats at every level matters to you, we’re asking you to chip in $3 to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250217_2786_fr&refcode2=2786_22930333_Z-48bw&akid=2786%2E22930333%2EZ-48bw) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250217_2786_fr&refcode2=2786_22930333_Z-48bw&akid=2786%2E22930333%2EZ-48bw)**

name: Team Bell
subject: Public service is about people, not power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Happy Presidents’ Day, Peter! Peter –

On this Presidents’ Day, we recognize the leaders who have shaped our nation – _the ones who faced tough challenges, made difficult choices, and stood up for what was right, even when it wasn’t easy._

Because public service isn’t about power; **it’s about people.** It’s about making sure families have good jobs, kids get a quality education, and everyone – no matter where they come from – has a fair shot at success. That’s what real leadership looks like.

As we reflect on the past, let’s also look forward. The work of building a stronger, fairer country is never done. It’s up to all of us to continue pushing for justice, opportunity, and a democracy that works for **everyone,** not just a select few who would watch our nation's democracy crumble just for political power.

Thanks for being in this fight.

Team Bell | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102275362/528655079/541679611?refcode=em25_250217_presda_enask_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250217_presda_enask_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e706e9e5-3fed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTcwNmU5ZTUtM2ZlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BDGCTyX3cjX4WgOCsdnZRc5_jitagvb7eu_G_ayf5Ys=)

clean_body: Happy Presidents’ Day, Peter! Peter – On this Presidents’ Day, we recognize the leaders who have shaped our nation – the ones who faced tough challenges, made difficult choices, and stood up for what was right, even when it wasn’t easy. Because public service isn’t about power; it’s about people. It’s about making sure families have good jobs, kids get a quality education, and everyone – no matter where they come from – has a fair shot at success. That’s what real leadership looks like. As we reflect on the past, let’s also look forward. The work of building a stronger, fairer country is never done. It’s up to all of us to continue pushing for justice, opportunity, and a democracy that works for everyone, not just a select few who would watch our nation's democracy crumble just for political power. Thanks for being in this fight. Team Bell | = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Big Trump Knife
subject: Introducing The 10" BIG Trump Victory Knife 2024
body:
The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry...

Celebrate Victory with the 47th President Donald Trump in 2025!

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20337/6374453/420e2df185f77290ffb27c03cf449888673870af/1b19d3761bda0bd9d590212a2435c66e51b3ef78)

---
The patriotic handle scales are crafted of a **[blue pakkawood panel that has“Donald Trump” in white, surrounded by white stars, and a red andwhite-striped acrylic panel.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20337/6374453/420e2df185f77290ffb27c03cf449888673870af/1b19d3761bda0bd9d590212a2435c66e51b3ef78)**

The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry.
**Get Your Trump Knife Today &
Let Folks Know Where You Stand** The Limited Edition Trump Knife is not just a rare collectible, but a symbol of your support for President Trump, who always stood for "True American" freedom.

# [Our courts can't defend democracy](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=157301099&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzAxMDk5LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MDUxODMsImV4cCI6MTc0MjM5NzE4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4iz-9QLtmemLjMhyZ8BzLvsTiq2Vrfgr1Jsg7qH2LGo)
### The rule of law died long before Trump came to office. How it happened helps explain his return to Washington.
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Feb 17| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/our-courts-cant-defend-democracy?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Responding to the Trump administration, at least two federal judges have recently issued [rulings attempting to defend the international aid framework](https://substack.com/redirect/759eed7b-7867-47ee-b675-cb26c29eb3ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from being arbitrarily defunded.
These are important cases, which are likely unfortunately doomed. Why?
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=157301099&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzAxMDk5LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MDUxODMsImV4cCI6MTc0MjM5NzE4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4iz-9QLtmemLjMhyZ8BzLvsTiq2Vrfgr1Jsg7qH2LGo)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b1bf11a-3a23-48bc-b067-1d29ee407b92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Too few Americans pay any attention to history or law, let alone legal history or its implications for whatever passes for democracy in America. That overlooked set of issues helps explain why [relying on the courts to defend democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/22c9f681-efaf-4e5f-95db-f14e82a79a30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is something between foolish and hopeless.
### **The genius of our constitutional design**
Beyond the Bill of Rights, and the delineation of specific rights that would be free from government dimension, the central genius animating the U.S. constitution was the separation of powers. The framers designed three independent branches of government with separate powers poised to check and balance each other.
Many observers recently have observed the Trump administration's efforts to marginalize Congress, which the framers saw as the primary branch of government given its representation of the electorate.
Too few, however, have observed the institutional co-optation of the courts--not under the Trump administration, but over the 20 years preceding his first term in the White House. Beyond an object of history, this analysis also predicts how the Trump administration's agenda will ultimately steamroll Washington, despite the efforts of advocates to slow it.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..50pQQgr-PldnYki2NxLCyMlhMkg3TpQ1RAcMWIkf0uQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=157301099)
### **A gift that keeps giving**
25 years ago, the Supreme Court chose the president, disregarding both federal and state law to effectively decide a contested election. It was outrageous at the time, yet Democrats deferred to the rule of law with ultimately catastrophic consequences--not only for themselves and their party, but also the rest of humanity.
The arrival of George W. Bush to Washington in 2000 did not set off the earthquake that Trump's return did in 2025, but it set the stage for it in important ways that observers generally overlook.
Setting aside the illegitimate and illegal invasion of multiple countries based on laughably false pretenses, the creation of an unconstitutional mass surveillance regime that has managed to evade congressional and judicial scrutiny for a generation, and the decision to implement torture as a national security policy, the Bush administration left an even more enduring legacy: its judicial appointments, particular to the nation's highest court.
At the time, Yale law professor Bruce Ackerman [described the circularity](https://substack.com/redirect/bbea37a7-21e4-47bf-8648-fe215a4590e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that undermined the court's legitimacy: by choosing the president, the justices effectively chose their own successor, which the constitution was very careful not to allow.
Later events confirmed Ackerman's concerns. After the _Bush v. Gore_ decision installed him in office, President Bush appointed the next chief justice, John Roberts. Roberts continues to serve in the role, for which he had long been groomed as the personal protege of his predecessor, William Rehnquist.
Today, the court has been skewed, not only by the legacy of _Bush v. Gore_ and the right wing judicial appointments it enabled, but also the well-established chasm between the corporate political parties and their interest in championing their supposed ideals.
When Barack Obama was president, he nominated Merrick Garland to the Supreme Court. Republicans [contrived disingenuous reasons](https://substack.com/redirect/c99c6ed9-0618-48ba-a475-48be48ba1aea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to avoid considering his nomination, before later [violating](https://substack.com/redirect/9eab0ea9-cb3c-410d-8bdb-07c5e292532b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) those reasons when it suited their own purposes.
Many Americans finally [woke up](https://substack.com/redirect/d26a8f1e-daca-422c-b79d-db316f667e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the weaponization of a right wing judiciary when the _Dobbs_ decision in 2022 overturned _Roe v. Wade_. But that reversal had been brewing for the last 50 years since _Roe_ was decided, particularly over the last 20 since the court was co-opted and bent to the right by the _Bush v. Gore_ decision.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=157301099&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzAxMDk5LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MDUxODMsImV4cCI6MTc0MjM5NzE4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4iz-9QLtmemLjMhyZ8BzLvsTiq2Vrfgr1Jsg7qH2LGo)
### **A dilemma facing advocacy organizations**
One of the advocacy organizations that I worked for before running for Congress is the world's largest digital civil liberties organization. My role at the Electronic Frontier Foundation (EFF) involved creating a national grassroots network to extend the organization's advocacy beyond courts and Congress to include state, legislatures and even local city councils.
One of the first things I did when getting there was raise a question internally about EFF's historical reliance on impact litigation and federal courts to achieve its aims. By that point, one of its signature cases challenging the NSA mass surveillance regime had been languishing in federal court for years, waiting for a ruling from a federal judge who seemed disinclined to actually use the power of his office.
Whether a reflection of institutional judicial co-optation, or simply the personality of someone who maybe shouldn't have had the role, the judge's refusal to consider the case on the merits effectively deferred to the executive branch, allowing the continuation of the NSA's program despite multiple legal challenges observing its unconstitutionality.
Watching a prolific advocacy organization hamstrung by its deference to the courts--even when judges were more or less unwilling to show up for work--revealed to me the limits of the rule of law.
### **Today**
Years later, as advocates now rush to court to try to contain the Trump administration's [blitzkrieg](https://substack.com/redirect/fa0cdf95-cb7e-41c2-aa5d-92e0c2179571?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) laying waste to institutions from the Department of Education to USAID, they may be poised to learn the same lesson.
On the one hand, multiple district courts have reached decisions limiting the administrations decisions, or at least delaying them. On the other hand, all roads lead to Rome, and judicial appeals to the Supreme Court, which has [already publicly declared its fealty](https://substack.com/redirect/450d5ea9-79c6-4616-b8ef-9ddd36073665?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the new president.
Hoping for the Supreme Court to change its perspective and finally curtail executive power--when the [Justices were chosen](https://substack.com/redirect/9ec0f910-8bfa-4755-8515-800303390f3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) based on their deference to executive power, and when many of them have also chosen to [disregard any reasonable notion of judicial ethics](https://substack.com/redirect/0845d181-cddd-406e-841e-27cdcf102f42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--is like wishing a tiger might change its stripes.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=157301099&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzAxMDk5LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MDUxODMsImV4cCI6MTc0MjM5NzE4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4iz-9QLtmemLjMhyZ8BzLvsTiq2Vrfgr1Jsg7qH2LGo)
Many Americans presume that the rule of law will protect them and their interests in the face of arbitrary government. They hang their hopes for democracy in America on the courts, thinking them to be independent.
Imagining that the courts might defend democracy or the Constitution against the Trump administration, rather than the vision promoted by the new president (or the president himself) requires ignoring reality and forgetting history.
I fear they will eventually be forced to learn the same lesson that I did. Our courts were seized by the right wing a generation ago. It may have taken a generation for the impact of _Bush v. Gore_ to reveal itself to the public, but it set the stage for the rise of Trump by ending the era of judicial independence.
A constitutional coup doesn't require subverting the executive branch. That's simply when it becomes impossible to ignore. The constitutional coup happened 25 years ago.
_Paid subscribers can access a series of long-form articles that I wrote explaining the impacts of the_ Bush v. Gore _decision, culminating in a proposal for court reform that the Biden administration adopted 15 years later..._

# [Changing the World](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=157203930&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MjAzOTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MDUzMDMsImV4cCI6MTc0MjM5NzMwMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CVdsTKgRiKgli_KzOS-VN3DE7oJz8OM6x3A7C1tWMXU)
### How small acts can make a big difference

Since I suspect not everyone wants to celebrate all of our Presidents today, I will note that it is also Random Acts of Kindness Day. So today I'm celebrating a man whose random act of kindness changed the course of my life.
I know a lot of us are down, mad, frustrated, and worried, right now.
This is a reminder that there's always _something_ we can do--and sometimes the smallest of acts can have the biggest of impacts.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.jxdG1NNLd_M_CUh0475eYCjDkJKYH1wQ8ghF3g5b2So?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=157203930)
* * *
In ninth grade, I needed a hard lesson.
I was ashamed of where I came from.
My parents were recovering from a bankruptcy brought on by my littlest sister's heart surgery, her ongoing disability, and associated medical bills. We were broke, and it showed. I did what I could with my Salvation Army clothes and tried to hide as much of the rest as I could. Like our car, an old brown rusted out Ford van, that frequently rumbled and sputtered -- and had a knack for sliding out of service when we needed it the most and could least afford to fix it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4192ee9e-79a8-4d40-a345-098465a75ddd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_The Kunce family van in front of our old house_
Through a combination of skill, charitable billing, and forgiven debts, our neighborhood mechanic, Winston, a minor hero of this story, kept us on the road. Given the nature of that relationship and our predicament, however, non-critical issues with the vehicle had to be tolerated, including a set of brakes that screeched horribly every time we slowed down. I shielded this blatant proof of our financial position from the public eye by having my dad, on days when he drove me to school, drop me off at the bottom of the hill, far from the front doors, and then dashing away from him and the van as quickly as possible.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0f4b6dc7-22d1-4e86-8077-296ffd058f3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_At a turning point_
Things went well! I made some friends, almost dated my first ninth grade crush, and raised my profile from bottom rung uncool to slightly below average.
Then, a couple months into the year, I got my big break: I was assigned a project with Jennifer. Jennifer was a significantly cooler and surprisingly nice girl who lived across town by the mall and had attended our other middle school. Fortunately, this meant that she had no legacy impression of my social standing. One day, near the end of the project, she invited me over to her house to finish it.
_**It was a dream.**_
Her mom picked us up and drove us to their beautiful home in the fancy area of town. We breezed through the project, crushing name-brand snacks and soda (their house didn't have a single yellow box item in it!), sneaking in some TV time, and enjoying the afternoon. My imagination filled with future visits, introductions to friends, and maybe the occasional party invite.
After a few hours, her father, Mr. H, came through the garage door. Mr. H was, to capture it in one word, formidable. Tall, thick, deep-voiced, sincere, and, to me, imposing. He greeted me in a perfectly pleasant manner, and I replied as best I could, stuck somewhere between fear and awe.
He talked to Mrs. H for a bit while Jennifer and I wrapped things up, and then he came in and said something along the lines of "Son, you're welcome to stay, but I understand from Mrs. H that you're headed home for dinner?"
"Yes, Sir."
"Well, then let's get you on home."
That, of course, was the last thing I wanted. There was no way on earth that I was going to let Jennifer see my neighborhood or house yet, and I had prepared myself for the possibility.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc8d107e-bc06-4e06-b8b5-685a76b1094a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_My old house today_
"Oh no, don't worry, Sir, I told my dad I would call him when we were done. I'll walk down and he can pick me up on the corner."
Boom. Pickup on the corner. No sight or sound of our van. No view of our house or neighborhood. Foolproof.
_**Except ...**_
Mr. H was old school.
"No, no, no. There's no need to call your dad or for him to go to that trouble. You came over here to do the work. I'll give you a ride home."
I pushed back. "Really, Sir, it's ok. It won't be any trouble for him. We already planned for it (we hadn't). He'll probably be disappointed if things change. If I could just use the phone..."
Mr. H looked at me like I had lost my mind.
"Son, you're our guest," he said with an indisputable tone of finality. "Let's load up."
Jennifer smiled at me. I smiled weakly back and followed her to the garage.
I wasn't sure if I should be thrilled or even more concerned, but in the garage was a big beautiful black Cadillac. Jennifer got into the front seat next to her dad and I opened the door behind her and climbed in. It was far and away the nicest car I had ever been in.
"Alright, where to?" he asked as he backed out of the driveway.
"We're on the east side past school," I replied, the wheels turning swiftly in my mind. "I can just give you directions if that'll work."
"That'll work."
It was nearly six o'clock and the sun was starting to go down. As we left their neighborhood I began plotting a course. I needed to eat up as much daylight as possible and avoid the worst landmarks on the way in. I knew I had to approach our house from the far side to avoid the corner gas station known locally as "ghetto" gas, but the street before ours was way too ragged, so I couldn't have him turn there. Plus that street had public housing on the other end that he might be aware of. The only real option was to loop all the way around the south side of town and then back up to my house from the east.
I gave him the occasional direction. Left. Right. Straight. A few blocks down. At first he followed the directions without paying attention, chatting with Jennifer and me about school and our day. But at some point he gave me a long look in the rearview mirror.
"Son, are you sure you know where you're headed?" He asked me after a particularly strange turn.
"Oh yes," I replied, "I've lived in the same neighborhood since we moved here when I was really little."
"Where is it again?"
"Kind of down from the highway patrol..." I answered, which was vague enough to encompass a massive area.
"Streets?"
"Dunklin... and... um... Ewing." Ewing was a super tiny street by that house basically no one would know.
He looked back at me again, but didn't say anything this time. From that point on he let me guide him without question.
As we turned to go up the hill on Dunklin I felt a sense of relief. We had gone the nicest possible way and Jennifer had hardly paid attention. I winced a little as we rolled past the crumbling house two doors down from ours, but I diverted their attention by starting my good-byes and pointing ahead to our house so he would know where to stop. Following the line of my own finger, though, my heart sank. I never came up to our house from that direction or paid any attention to it, but at that moment I realized that that whole side of the house was shedding paint. Like a molting lizard. Big chunks missing everywhere and paint scales just barely clinging to it.
My parents had recently done their best to paint the house -- my mom nearly caught it on fire at one point with a heat gun -- but they hadn't had the time or money to paint the entire thing.
So they hadn't done the east side, presumably reasoning that people rarely came that way and it was the least exposed.
As the car slowed to a stop in front of our house, for the first time I looked at our house with fresh eyes and really truly noticed everything . The patchy yard. The broken curb and twisted sidewalk. Our stuff scattered everywhere. I mumbled something nondescript about working on things or how busy everyone was or something like that, said a weak good-bye, and fled the car. I don't remember hearing anything from Jennifer or her father. I was just trying to get out of there and move them along as quickly as possible.
Then, as I hurried down the front walk to our porch, I heard the worst noise imaginable: a second car door shutting behind me. Someone else had gotten out. The sound took me to a new low.
With nowhere to go and nothing else to do, I fortified my will and, slowly, I turned around. Looming across the top of that big beautiful black Cadillac stood Mr. H, looking down at me. The car was still running. He had closed his door so that Jennifer wouldn't hear what he had to say.
"Son," he began, in his big deep voice. I forced myself to look at him. I was going to take it like a man, so he wouldn't think less of me.
He continued.
"I want you to know that we were honored to have you at the house today. I am glad I got to meet you and that you're my daughter's friend."
He paused, looking past me at our house, and then looked back down at me. With complete sincerity, that I believed in my soul, he added: "You have a beautiful home and you're going to do great things. I'm proud to know you and I'd be proud for Jennifer to come back anytime."
He didn't wait for me to respond. That was it. He just opened the door back up, climbed in, and put the car in gear. Jennifer waved as they drove away, obviously not noticing a thing.
To this day I tear up when I think about that moment. The moment when a man I didn't know made the effort to understand me. And then took a moment to let me know, without telling me directly, that I could be proud of who I was and where I came from.
That lesson couldn't have come from my family. It couldn't have come from inside the world I lived in. It had to come from outside. And if it hadn't been for Mr. H, I don't know if I would have ever been comfortable enough to just be me.
I never saw him again, but that year was a turning point for me, a kid who had been entirely undistinguished up to that point.
I studied hard and practiced hard. I made it to Yale on a Pell Grant. I went to that fancy east coast school and was never shy about where I came from and who I was.
I looked up Mr. H. I wanted to tell him thank you. For everything. For lifting up a kid he didn't know when he didn't have to. But I never got a chance. He passed away unexpectedly while I was at school.
Now, I make sure his legacy lives through me by never missing an opportunity to lift a kid up and let him know that he can be proud of where he comes from.
Lucas

There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government.
This may be the best idea yet.

| | |
This is genius, Friend.

**The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)** will cut down on wasteful government spending and make it MUCH more efficient.

Elon Musk has been selected to lead this effort, and he's already off to the races.

**House GOP has authorized the release of our new DOGE Survey, and you are 1 of 10 patriots from your area given clearance to complete this important survey.**

---

There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government.

**And draining the swamp has been part of our mission since DAY 1.**

House Republicans are with DOGE every step of the way. We just need to know you are, too. **[Will you complete your DOGE Survey today and join us?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b634ced6b7204f5d8a3a4300b1b95c8e&_e=Y9BdYUfRDqbqkZb7G92IPHoYK5_RnQQaSOgYJko4uPw7HG5l--X4h4XBm1iINzuyxEEG1-VlDZ9BBxxBrC73FVNA9fkc2g8nwWJ-nWAnzLHFL4cC2K82hgH-8o0pVUCcFKapgA4BSxgvsdYXppVObsad9EPP6u37XUuwghQ3fOOqqtlgzidY7N43C5zh16lFiv6HM3TqFIwmS1MhFh3gE1umWrZyNqzAm7k38mkHDz6P2oGdLjQnqvRoqUj01aSJ6Zti65257VfrpFyDEcdOQI6xprrwZpM4n-KgEiPOMaiqMtGQ6SmoBgSR58vCxnz5_7G2MLHnlFt2xtCRD8HUoK4q2AXVl_W6NSY-dEuVwTNq2jkoppNKs_ybHPA0KiTL5DRzYYyYeAKoDWMTuqRDvg%3D%3D "Will you complete your DOGE Survey today and join us?")**

**DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY**

clean_body: There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government. This may be the best idea yet. | | | | This is genius, Friend. The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will cut down on wasteful government spending and make it MUCH more efficient. Elon Musk has been selected to lead this effort, and he's already off to the races. House GOP has authorized the release of our new DOGE Survey, and you are 1 of 10 patriots from your area given clearance to complete this important survey. There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government. And draining the swamp has been part of our mission since DAY 1. House Republicans are with DOGE every step of the way. We just need to know you are, too. | | Friend: **_"The best way to predict the future is to create it."_** _These timeless words by President Abraham Lincoln serve as a powerful reminder that leadership is about vision, action, and responsibility._ _As we celebrate Presidents’ Day, let us honor the wisdom, resilience, and unwavering leadership of Presidents Washington, Lincoln, and all those who have shaped our great nation. Their legacies remind us that America’s strength lies in unity, perseverance, and a commitment to our founding values._
---
| |
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/s/c/Zz7kn0o2EemIW-2AeZdvZ9qrfhVZrHFcjVc-KqQNGNsj2c_hiSvp3GSZbcqvA5trkvJsqpDfqUjTLdZih38KfVcDj7KgdtSEE_Sb_Nrkr6kfdBENj1fLestlt8K0-Jc5tiXRwYw9tEclh4LelzqoqPgcXifK-cUKDCWjw-YcyhxtyOj3bmbGx4N4Lnjjj38VlU2IBC6wDMYa2KSgeKQC4Zrtk__VEr_1n8_W_VzdkD7RZ9rKegCL25GWN2Ze/OWG7Y6eU3U5oPvPpb_aC-fRNrzUFmD0w/6)
---
| | _With these principles in mind, I approach each day as your Congressman with humility and deep respect for the shared values that guide us—working to bring people together._ _I invite you to stand with me in shaping the future. Together, we can uphold the principles that define our nation and ensure a future for America that is rooted in freedom, opportunity, and respect for the values that have made us strong._ 🇺🇸
---
| | _Sincerely,_ _Tom Kean, Jr._

clean_body: | | | | | Friend: "The best way to predict the future is to create it." These timeless words by President Abraham Lincoln serve as a powerful reminder that leadership is about vision, action, and responsibility. As we celebrate Presidents’ Day, let us honor the wisdom, resilience, and unwavering leadership of Presidents Washington, Lincoln, and all those who have shaped our great nation. Their legacies remind us that America’s strength lies in unity, perseverance, and a commitment to our founding values. | | | | With these principles in mind, I approach each day as your Congressman with humility and deep respect for the shared values that guide us—working to bring people together. I invite you to stand with me in shaping the future. Together, we can uphold the principles that define our nation and ensure a future for America that is rooted in freedom, opportunity, and respect for the values that have made us strong. 🇺🇸 | | Sincerely, Tom Kean, Jr. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2025 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

It’s President’s Day, Peter.

Today is a time to honor the legacy of presidents who worked to improve the lives of everyday Americans.

Most have upheld the dignity and civility that the office demands. However, our current administration is much more concerned with enriching himself and his Billionaire Bros than doing anything to support the American people.

This isn’t the leadership that we deserve, and if we’re not careful, our entire democracy will come crashing down, with Trump and Musk at the center of an oligarchy instead.

**[Peter, this President’s Day, I’m asking you to contribute $10 or anything you can to help me put a stop to Trump’s dangerous agenda. body:
Donald Trump’s first Presidents’ Day back in the White House is today so we’re cluing you in on a secret project:

| |
---
| | | **GOD BLESS PRESIDENT TRUMP!**

Donald Trump's first Presidents' Day back in the White House is today so we're cluing you in on a secret project:

**We 're (quietly!) preparing our official Presidents' Day Card filled with well-wishes from Patriots from every zip code in America!**

Unfortunately, we're missing a signature from YOUR ZIP CODE!

**_[Can we bother you to take a minute to sign our official Presidents' Day Card for Donald Trump? We left you a space for you to write him a personal message if you want!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2hea2m6tbsdbqeljo3rmg6ja4d03pcd62pqjna0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h62oj6chh2bs "Can we bother you to take a minute to sign our official Presidents’ Day Card for Donald Trump? We left you a space for you to write him a personal message if you want! ")_**

_Friend - Presidents' Day is TODAY so we have a tight turnaround here. _

We have a feeling this card will make his day!

Thank you in advance for your participation,
Team Scalise

| |

Steve Scalise

body:

Friend, This Presidents' Day help us thank President Trump for pardoning Officers Terence Sutton and Andrew Zabavsky and for backing the blue. Terence was wrongly convicted of second-degree murder because anti-police prosecutors wanted to use him for political purposes. Whereas Andrew was wrongly accused of attempting to "cover up" the "crime." But thanks to President Trump they've received full pardons! **[**Will you help us thank President Trump today for standing with our law enforcement by sending him a note of gratitude?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8FuozAQhp_G3ED22MZw4NCUkEPbPWSjVjkhxx4ar3CgBoLy9itHaS6W_M2n-efXfuxdd6uI2hCAs7MTASD8hQD8HFcfln_-bZcCPx7Tn_yPl3EKrw_1Ck_5YvTX7u1Vau1O063_OOM6fF3ZU59vIz7lR2iGXrs-UlUntuKdpSLBiileFlRJlSfnquMIWOQStFKyy0tmhaIWsKQyakXiKqAgKTDFpATBMio7XRYFlIXurBGUCHrPybTH4Ixm07zqEIbBZ2bwSV-d53mc7oc1BJoJzRIw0xe0wxwNAk2Pve0INBaEBKtYeio4pKI0JtU50rQzJ8tEIUTObdzCm2X27TQswSDh9abepfvtJ4E8Yo_WLZ7wevvxIDOG-F8DewCj_ajd94Xw-rdcu6l37fv2vW7aw_HQ7ref7d_Dyz6NTxIqO66u792UKyLo971uLHet4H8AAAD__-aXjzg)** Officers Sutton and Zabavsky and their families have been through so much, but they never gave up hope because they knew they had generous patriots like yourself supporting them every step of the way. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) and the officers we've represented have always been overwhelmingly grateful for the army of supporters who show woke anti-police politicians and prosecutors that our men and women and blue aren’t alone. Today is President’s Day, Peter.

As we reflect back on our nation’s past presidents, we are reminded of both the progress we have made as a nation and the work we have ahead to protect our democracy from those working in the White House to dismantle it.

This Presidents Day, the importance of being a leader for all Americans, despite their party or beliefs could not be clearer.

Our president fights for himself and whoever is on his good side at the moment. We deserve leaders who fight for _all_ Americans, who do the right thing, who do not put billionaires ahead of the hardworking people.

As we look back on the good leaders we have had, and on our disappointment in today’s administration, this is also an opportunity to take action. Together, we can work to put roadblocks in Trump’s way and stop his extremist agenda from doing more damage.

**[Click here to celebrate President’s Day with us by chipping in $4.70, $47, or anything you can to help us stop our 47th President.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102280698/528667969/553781765?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250217_FR_PresidentsDay_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQxMmMyNi00OGVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3iA04-p3slyKarpnyEL-LMY3SKmN1BGYETaafFItke4=)**

Happy Presidents’ Day!
Today, we celebrate the leaders who have shaped our nation and defended our freedoms.
From George Washington to Donald Trump, the United States has been led by presidents with bold visions and strong leadership.
This Presidents' Day is a reminder of the incredible legacy of American leadership.

name: Jay (personal)
subject: Reflecting on our next steps
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]

Team,

On this Presidents’ Day, we reflect on the life and legacy of George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, and the American presidents who have come after them.

As we observe this day, I want to express my gratitude for the opportunity that is ahead of us. With the new administration that is in charge causing havoc and chaos in our country, we have a chance to think about the next steps ahead – and the work that we need to do to protect our democracy.

There are two options: waive the white flag to a tyrant who will continue to fight for unelected billionaires while working families suffer. Or to pull ourselves up by the bootstraps and fight for every inch of progress.

Which choice will you make?

That is the question I ask each and every one of you. So please, take a minute to reflect on the leadership and legacy of all the presidents who have served our country. And let us continue to move forward toward a better future for all of America.

- Jay

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102281221/528669647/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250217presidents_N_JZ_90DO_11_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2YzUzZTQ0LTQ4ZWQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yxVJOv5kjT9Uoef4mnwRgbWzBqHXAkIH9w11polC8PI=)

Hi Peter,

Today is Presidents' Day. If you’re like us, you might be spending today thinking about the fact that America has now failed to elect a qualified woman as president TWICE in the last decade alone.

To add salt to the wound, the current President and his administration have brought misogyny and outdated views about gender back to the mainstream. They’ve gleefully rolled back women’s rights to reproductive healthcare, and continue to spread dangerous disinformation about abortion.

**At Her Bold Move, we are on a mission to elect women up and down the ballot until we have finally shattered our nation’s highest glass ceiling once and for all.**

There are qualified, brilliant women in this country who are just waiting in the wings to bring about real change. The would-be female presidents who have been waiting far too long for their turn to lead. Policymakers who, perhaps, haven’t been recorded bragging about grabbing people by the genitals... We believe these women are out there.

[**In honor of Presidents’ Day, help us continue to support and _uplift_ incredible, pro-WOMEN women candidates by donating $25 today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102281224/528669649/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250217presidents_N_JZ_90DO_11_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2YzUzZTQ0LTQ4ZWQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yxVJOv5kjT9Uoef4mnwRgbWzBqHXAkIH9w11polC8PI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102281228/528669651/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250217presidents_N_JZ_90DO_11_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2YzUzZTQ0LTQ4ZWQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yxVJOv5kjT9Uoef4mnwRgbWzBqHXAkIH9w11polC8PI=)

---
As research from the _Wilson Center_ points out, “Although the presence of a woman in leadership does not automatically ensure positive change, empirical evidence underscores the broader impact of having more women in public decision-making roles. **This shift is associated with higher economic growth, improved gender equality, and greater social investment in education, healthcare, and environmental protection.”**

Two-thirds of the world’s top 50 countries have had a female leader. As you know, the U.S. is not one of them. Last year, Mexico elected its first female president, Claudia Sheinbaum, making her the first female president in North America. But here’s the thing, women in Mexico didn’t gain the right to vote for president until 1953. Not to mention, as recently as 9 years ago, the country didn’t have even one female governor. Now, Mexico has surpassed the United States in gender parity.

**We want to see that kind of progress happen here.** That is why Her Bold Move has worked with female candidates from nearly every state in America – and have seen the challenges and disturbing realities women face when they enter politics in this country. On a daily basis, we see how our candidates deal with misogyny, double standards, sexism, and an onslaught of violent and sexual threats.

It’s harder to run for office as a woman – and it’s nearly impossible to combat the deep-seated sexism that has left countless glass ceilings intact for far too long.

As we honor some of the greatest past leaders of our nation, we also want to reimagine Presidents’ Day as an opportunity for reflection. What will it take to finally see a woman in the Oval Office? The work we do at Her Bold Move is getting us closer to an answer to that question.

[**We’re working with some of the most phenomenal female leaders in the nation – the ones who might have what it takes to be our first-ever female president. We have a chance to make the US a better country for ALL by electing pro-choice, qualified women into positions of power, but we can’t do it without YOUR HELP. Are you in?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102281248/528669672/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250217presidents_N_JZ_90DO_11_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2YzUzZTQ0LTQ4ZWQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yxVJOv5kjT9Uoef4mnwRgbWzBqHXAkIH9w11polC8PI=)

Happy Presidents’ Day,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & President
Her Bold Move
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102281254/528669673/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250217presidents_N_JZ_90DO_11_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2YzUzZTQ0LTQ4ZWQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yxVJOv5kjT9Uoef4mnwRgbWzBqHXAkIH9w11polC8PI=)

Friend,

We've tried to reach you multiple times, but we haven't heard back. As a result, your 2025 House GOP membership has officially expired.

Friend's Membership Status: **[EXPIRED.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z04f9vrep1ecrq2seeo6gthqhgde4ci6o3li8bk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h66o34cjh2bs "EXPIRED.")**

---

This means you'll no longer have access to exclusive insider updates from House Republican leaders and the chance to shape our party's agenda.

But we want you back on our team. **_We're offering you one more chance to renew your membership and continue fighting for our conservative values in 2025._**

So Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:

**Patriot, this is Tom Cotton, U.S. Senator for Arkansas and Chairman of the Senate GOP Conference.** I’m a sixth-generation Arkansan, born and raised on my family’s cattle farm in Yell County. After 9/11, I joined the U.S. Army. I served in combat and with the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery. I’m also a proud husband and father to two boys. Now, my mission is simple: implement President Trump’s agenda, confirm President Trump’s nominees, and put America first. Democrats and their Marxist Left pals are going to come after me with everything they’ve got. They’ve spent YEARS making up lies and smears about me — and so have their cronies in the liberal media. - In the fight to make America strong again and put Americans first, we must never retreat. We must never surrender. We must never back down. In service, Tom Cotton | | Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Back to School
body:
I was invited to speak at my alma mater, Brown University, last week. It was my first time on campus since I ran for President. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=a9dca7b703&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| Hello, I hope that your weekend is going well this Presidents Day. I celebrate this holiday every year by putting on a colonial-era George Washington wig. I was invited to speak at my alma mater, Brown University, last week. It was my first time on campus since I ran for President. It was a lot of fun. I’ve spoken at over a dozen universities these past several years, but at Brown there was a sense of camaraderie and pride. The students filled the auditorium and dozens were turned away. The energy was tremendous and heartwarming.

I spoke about my college years, when I was a fairly unremarkable undergraduate. I had very little figured out, though I did mention a couple of courses that impacted my thinking like Labor Economics and Ethics and Public Policy. I traced my steps from Providence all the way to the presidential campaign and making the case for democracy reform today. I tried to make my journey relatable and achievable.

I also talked about my friend Dean Phillips – another Brown alum – and his primary campaign in 2024, which I was proud to support. History has proven Dean to be correct. I tried to end on an invigorating note about how the future will be theirs to shape.
---
|
---
| Afterwards, I met and took pictures with dozens of students. One young woman asked me, “Was it all worth it?” I answered without hesitation, “Of course! I’d do it all over again.” Another student said to me, “Thank you for being here. My friends and I followed your campaign every day when I was in 8th grade.” It has been 5 years since 2020, and that 8th grader is now a college freshman. Several other students told me that they volunteered for my presidential campaign and showed me pictures to prove it. There were a lot of students who wanted me to run again. Several thanked me for helping them feel better about the current moment. Meeting with the students was uplifting. They were positive and idealistic and looking for a way to make a difference. I have no doubt that they will. They also reminded me of how much I have to be grateful for. Many of them understood the vision I was campaigning on. We may not get there as quickly as I hoped five years ago, but there are a lot of dedicated and passionate people who want to see that vision come to pass. The college freshmen of today will be out in the world working before we know it. We have a lot of work to do, but the next generation is on its way. To see what we are doing with Forward in your area, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=69787472d9&e=0f227c2ae3). For my interview of Jo Ling Kent of CBS News about DeepSeek and AI on the podcast this week, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=ed9ada3d62&e=0f227c2ae3). Have a great long weekend.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=fe6a610b3a&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=21054e8010&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=0ceb2e86ae) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=0ceb2e86ae).

name: John Fetterman
subject: standing with the trans community 🏳️‍⚧️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m calling on the Trump administration to rescind the transgender military ban.
#
Derek, it’s John Fetterman, and this is important.
It might not be popular to stand with the trans community right now, but I’m doing it anyway and calling on the Trump administration to rescind the transgender military ban.
**It’s not about woke sh*t. It’s about respecting the inherent dignity of every U.S. servicemember, regardless of race or gender.**
I’m unapologetically pro-military AND pro-LGBTQ, and I actually think they go hand-in-hand. ALL our servicemembers, including our trans troops, make our military stronger.
[**If you agree, will you join me by signing on to my petition calling on the Trump administration to rescind the ban?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/email-20250214-trans-military-ban?source=em20250217-9910&akid=9910%2E434096%2ENW_eRf)
**[Sign the petition »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/email-20250214-trans-military-ban?source=em20250217-9910&akid=9910%2E434096%2ENW_eRf)**
Thanks, Derek. I’ll never vote to degrade anyone, including our trans servicemembers. It’s not woke sh*t to have their back; it’s our duty.
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250217-9910-footer&t=1&refcode2=9910_434096_NW_eRf&akid=9910%2E434096%2ENW_eRf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9910%2E434096%2ENW_eRf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9910%2E434096%2ENW_eRf)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

**[In Case You Missed it - There is a Special Election for State Senate District 21.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a9a6b8cd-73c7-456f-ab03-c6889aae9a85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**ATTENTION: Shelton, Seymour, Monroe and Stratford**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..pG6p_P4Rpa53mz8y9drh0nzziGrdXYgEVQh60OqHbI4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157325314)
Happy Presidents Day.
Since the November Election, many CT Residents are looking to take more action - Well you have your chance - **one special election**. It is time to focus attention to one critical race. Fed up with high utility rate - get involved and keep an important State Senate Seat to protect your interests and your pocketbook.
It is time to elevate Jason Perillo from the State House to the CT State Senate. The special election will be held on February 25th with Early Voting February 20 - 23.

Jason has successfully represented Shelton in the State Legislature for over 16 years. He is poised to step up to the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly.
_**Jason has knowledge and understanding of the State Senate members and legislative processes and the pending legislation in Hartford and will have a seamless transition and hit the ground running immediately.**_
We have known Jason for many years and he has been devoted to representing Shelton. Jason is stepping up to take the seat vacated by Kevin Kelly, the Republican Minority Leader from 2021-2024. Jason is a Man of Service and help him win to continue to serve YOU!
**Get out the vote and volunteer - you can even do it phone banking from your home. Go to his[site ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a9a6b8cd-73c7-456f-ab03-c6889aae9a85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and get the word out.**
This is the opportunity to rally to unite CT. His opponent is a Rosa DeLauro protege. We have had enough of DeLauro - **you can Dump DeLauro by electing Jason. Learn more about Jason[Here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a9a6b8cd-73c7-456f-ab03-c6889aae9a85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/54adf46c-bdb2-4171-b947-694f510c3c11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
About Jason:
**A Voice for All** : Jason embraces the ideas and concerns of all residents of Monroe, Seymour, Shelton, and Stratford. This has allowed him to successfully support our small businesses, veterans, seniors, and children for almost two decades in Hartford. An advocate for job growth and quality education, Jason looks forward to continuing his common sense approach to the lawmaking process that we deserve as a community.
**Affordability:** Residents and families deserve a more affordable state, which is why Jason has been credited with passing the largest income tax cut in Connecticut history, a historic investment in education, and abiding by spending guardrails to help reduce debt and spend taxpayer dollars wisely.
**Public Safety:** Jason is the only experienced candidate who has collaborated with law enforcement in cracking down on 'street takeovers', car theft, and domestic violence crime, and juvenile justice reform. Jason is also the only candidate to openly support our police, establishing the Fallen Officer Fund and calling to repeal recent Police Accountability legislation.
To volunteer visit Jason's website [Here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a9a6b8cd-73c7-456f-ab03-c6889aae9a85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
## EARLY VOTING
**February 20, 21, 22, 23**
**10 am - 6 pm**
**SHELTON: Town Hall (54 Hill St)**
** STRATFORD: Baldwin Center (1000 W Broad St)**
**MONROE: Town Hall (7 Fan Hill Rd)**
**SEYMOUR: Town Hall (1 1st St)**
## ELECTION DAY - Find Out Where to Vote [Here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fac970e7-8233-4453-b2e7-ce39e503cde1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 25th from 6AM-8PM**
**Please vote at your normal Election Day Polling Location**
** ****_ **MONROE**_**VOTES AT ST. JUDE'S SCHOOL** (707 Monroe Turnpike)**
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein - WE BOTH FULLY ENDORSE JASON

Affordability: Residents and families deserve a more affordable state, which is why Jason has been credited with passing the largest income tax cut in Connecticut history, a historic investment in education, and abiding by spending guardrails to help reduce debt and spend taxpayer dollars wisely. Public Safety: Jason is the only experienced candidate who has collaborated with law enforcement in cracking down on 'street takeovers', car theft, and domestic violence crime, and juvenile justice reform. Jason is also the only candidate to openly support our police, establishing the Fallen Officer Fund and calling to repeal recent Police Accountability legislation. To volunteer visit Jason's website : EARLY VOTING February 20, 21, 22, 23 10 am - 6 pm SHELTON: Town Hall (54 Hill St) STRATFORD: Baldwin Center (1000 W Broad St) MONROE: Town Hall (7 Fan Hill Rd) SEYMOUR: Town Hall (1 1st St) ELECTION DAY - Find Out Where to Vote TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 25th from 6AM-8PM Please vote at your normal Election Day Polling Location ** MONROEVOTES AT ST. JUDE'S SCHOOL (707 Monroe Turnpike) Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word. Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein - WE BOTH FULLY ENDORSE JASON The father-son team continues on so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way. Please subscribe and support and SPREAD THE WORD. Thanks for reading Michael's Substack! We’ve already seen what can happen when grassroots supporters like you RAISE YOUR VOICE against Trump’s disastrous hostile takeover.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You'll want this in your home in 2025
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7905523a828e4e72a7d9dfd36987a10f&_e=ExcwpaoBXmKx97otnY_O_Ir2r_H0htMQd1RHH2mg0nsfmRp5ZfnYJTUaShpzjXzb8F6GSbAzi5qvema92YzwLQjAlgnjYf8HGKBRnUFUqMO2C1n8m96lujlh-ysJJwfoSg2dIrW3GaozlZHPGw01w3h43w9gOz1Z-zCPo01atGuEaqLtvuXvIjzfGBxAxoKd7KjErBQNvDQq-rdE3VYthTIkxrgumJoGI4P_TQaSmD1Ry088OdEceoj0B-3tmcR0faqE0xHkPieiaHY0F2i5C9tsMDj2dgLfoJOj8RuRVWyYSj5CZu2SRD3DU12XSUT6aq40Sjh40mA0E4DfJuf53ijcQwEfKNLrf8yJWlZMMhcd2gp4wbQPyLaou77TsVamOql4NAGE-ZOF957vliU0Bw%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7905523a828e4e72a7d9dfd36987a10f&_e=ExcwpaoBXmKx97otnY_O_Ir2r_H0htMQd1RHH2mg0nsfmRp5ZfnYJTUaShpzjXzb8F6GSbAzi5qvema92YzwLQjAlgnjYf8HGKBRnUFUqMO2C1n8m96lujlh-ysJJwfoSg2dIrW3GaozlZHPGw01w3h43w9gOz1Z-zCPo01atGuEaqLtvuXvIjzfGBxAxoKd7KjErBQNvDQq-rdE3VYthTIkxrgumJoGI4P_TQaSmD3LAXwsmbTbgq6fUw6od5BpYW9lWIxWayKaQVNRF0_jL6oY6i7gDYqffUV0K1lww0wzPg3k3cctHs4qmOFy7hpzAqaEQXfPr_HPWSbVIptDWmin6NrOonH6Be0VH4RRwmybcQ6MgQE4G29qUK7f9AIO7uJK21V1R_XSjGZjteAYww%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7905523a828e4e72a7d9dfd36987a10f&_e=ExcwpaoBXmKx97otnY_O_Ir2r_H0htMQd1RHH2mg0nsfmRp5ZfnYJTUaShpzjXzb8F6GSbAzi5qvema92YzwLQjAlgnjYf8HGKBRnUFUqMO2C1n8m96lujlh-ysJJwfoSg2dIrW3GaozlZHPGw01w3h43w9gOz1Z-zCPo01atGuEaqLtvuXvIjzfGBxAxoKd7KjErBQNvDQq-rdE3VYthTIkxrgumJoGI4P_TQaSmD2ualQqSUivj42T0IaBUqobxBy4GLMUSAX8aU7ZdJo_GhzHNwNeAMDugn-KVtU4o5ANb4YXm2uHZXJdgRLK4-2faB_sRlJjqf4spxKCm7UClGT_OjgZ9nSSn-1CEVtOcZhapcnl-PAkWm_VAERSvxTxOtqNGymarjUxokvgLhJOuA%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7905523a828e4e72a7d9dfd36987a10f&_e=ExcwpaoBXmKx97otnY_O_Ir2r_H0htMQd1RHH2mg0nsfmRp5ZfnYJTUaShpzjXzb8F6GSbAzi5qvema92YzwLQjAlgnjYf8HGKBRnUFUqMO2C1n8m96lujlh-ysJJwfoSg2dIrW3GaozlZHPGw01w3h43w9gOz1Z-zCPo01atGuEaqLtvuXvIjzfGBxAxoKd7KjErBQNvDQq-rdE3VYthTIkxrgumJoGI4P_TQaSmD2P3VTvc2dDS5wwhO8c1POCJc2Hty6IneLQkAzlNQzcJLNYpflgTh1PNu1w5ec7g6DkgXDyOqm7cgkNl6Zuc3Hesu2DHDxa8guny3wHRCdiEebCka4cDiLSpXkV644i4dpiIyNkW3djKVC5vKA80jG8wnYrN7T_QjOG80aCT24phQ%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7905523a828e4e72a7d9dfd36987a10f&_e=ExcwpaoBXmKx97otnY_O_Ir2r_H0htMQd1RHH2mg0nsfmRp5ZfnYJTUaShpzjXzb8F6GSbAzi5qvema92YzwLQjAlgnjYf8HGKBRnUFUqMO2C1n8m96lujlh-ysJJwfoSg2dIrW3GaozlZHPGw01w3h43w9gOz1Z-zCPo01atGuEaqLtvuXvIjzfGBxAxoKd7KjErBQNvDQq-rdE3VYthTIkxrgumJoGI4P_TQaSmD3Si72Ep5HNJOMHKdoiCvgBlmPSwr9kPsCR5it9E3FrT6UeMDKaaIbQdbClwUrMe5Ly-M_2HL_UTQilL_0QitquxcjOCU6dY0c7J4T1irKPtummhIauSND5W3wu7cShtNkg4FFartOQqwNUEqKsiqdcQIKqLLV6JJzzRvBr6NUCyw%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---

clean_body: Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Friend, Today is Presidents Day, and activists across the country are protesting the current president. I will keep doing everything I can to defend working people, Black and brown people, immigrants, LGBTQ+ people, and other marginalized communities who are under attack from this presidential administration. In the past few weeks, I’ve spoken up against Trump and Musk’s illegal actions while outside our federal agencies and while inside congressional committees like the House Oversight Committee and the House Financial Services Committee. I won’t let the richest man on earth, who already gets $20 billion in government contracts, steal money from the most vulnerable among us. I will honor my oath to uphold the Constitution and protect our rights while holding these fascists accountable. I ran for Congress while Trump was president the first time, and despite facing pushback from members of both political parties, we impeached him twice. I will keep resisting the Trump administration’s efforts to push hateful culture wars that endanger millions of people, to cut taxes for billionaires, and to make deep cuts to the critical programs we rely on—like Medicaid, Medicare, SNAP, and Social Security.
