From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sun, Feb 16, 2025
Subject: Activists across the country are protesting on Presidents Day
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This Presidents Day, we’re resisting this President.
Activists are planning anti-Trump actions all over the country for Presidents Day, and organizations have already been blocking this lawless administration’s actions in the courts. Together we will boycott, march, litigate, mobilize, speak up, and come together in solidarity. We will out-work the hate and out-organize the billionaire class.
In Congress, I will keep doing everything in my power to push back against this administration’s attacks. In the past few weeks, I’ve joined local organizations to share information about immigrants’ rights, to fight for affordable health care, and to protect public education. I joined federal employees outside the Office of Personnel Management to protest the administration’s reckless efforts to dismantle our federal workforce.
In the House Oversight Committee, I voted to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress and explain why a billionaire who nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government. Republicans blocked that effort, but I will keep pushing to hold Musk accountable. We won’t let the richest man on earth, who gets $20 billion in government contracts, steal money from the most vulnerable among us.
[**Can you chip in today so we can keep fighting back against this president and his unelected billionaire friends?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtqTWUTlzrBoWw1uLeD1ZPKvpvWFyVv55UQVkFwxnDfqKILBgAOu6GPzLHwy5ztuKfRMAfQnFTHqx-NG57oa_DlFrgTNfDUztEn0gGVGH2dmjiZxx00rKby3P-bR2kRVWb6PW9L2mjZJCMcuYFyHYuPfXeGhAsm9F_z7dEnzp0EcsQD34jruAga5bNQenxjls7WWA9HbEcWzt2sagud9L3BZQWozu9zW-9MBk5b0D6W838TBqDff7ViAPz5Yn39FkoK1uDMaOVPpjsoGS_WS6aIIFIWkSN1jV3kalaULKrA3tAHoLcXEwBMDTo4IbfYVdu-wABXOvxVx-6qTHI9nxg0iQrqH9JU_JrzBTZldcJyadL5Ubn7nl__KFi2xF9-YmAkl4QBUIt7cZ5BLq7zw_0X/4e3/oYDWAQDfQ8uNoKif4b9lyQ/h8/h001.kqt2tjUjeXZIZUsVKLKKgTOVOGRuxtSGME0B31KNV0Y)
As a Congresswoman, I took an oath to uphold the Constitution, which gives Congress control over federal spending and oversight authority over the president. The Constitution lays out a balance of government, which is why the White House cannot dismantle federal agencies without the approval of Congress. By illegally seizing power over our federal agencies, this president and his unelected billionaire friends are creating a constitutional crisis.
I’m pushing back against attacks on agencies like the Department of Education and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, which protects working people from getting ripped off. In March, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau was set to eliminate $49 billion in medical debt from 15 million Americans’ credit reports. My team and I worked hard to help win this victory, and it’s one we must defend. In this new Congress, I was also appointed to serve on the House Financial Services Committee again, where I will keep demanding a government that puts people over profits.
I’m also fighting back against this presidential administration’s attempt to roll back protections for workers and marginalized communities. I will keep standing up for Black, brown, disabled, and LGBTQ+ Americans, and anyone else targeted by this administration.

clean_body: Together, we will keep demanding a government for the people, not for billionaires. | | | Friend, Today is Presidents Day, and activists across the country are protesting the current president. I will keep doing everything I can to defend working people, Black and brown people, immigrants, LGBTQ+ people, and other marginalized communities who are under attack from this presidential administration. In the past few weeks, I’ve spoken up against Trump and Musk’s illegal actions while outside our federal agencies and while inside congressional committees like the House Oversight Committee and the House Financial Services Committee. I won’t let the richest man on earth, who already gets $20 billion in government contracts, steal money from the most vulnerable among us. I will honor my oath to uphold the Constitution and protect our rights while holding these fascists accountable. I ran for Congress while Trump was president the first time, and despite facing pushback from members of both political parties, we impeached him twice. I will keep resisting the Trump administration’s efforts to push hateful culture wars that endanger millions of people, to cut taxes for billionaires, and to make deep cuts to the critical programs we rely on—like Medicaid, Medicare, SNAP, and Social Security. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your ongoing support and your efforts to build a better world. We deserve better than government leaders who profit off of war and pain. Together, we will keep demanding a government for the people, not for billionaires. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sun, Feb 16, 2025 Subject: Activists across the country are protesting on Presidents Day To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This Presidents Day, we’re resisting this President. Activists are planning anti-Trump actions all over the country for Presidents Day, and organizations have already been blocking this lawless administration’s actions in the courts. Together we will boycott, march, litigate, mobilize, speak up, and come together in solidarity. We will out-work the hate and out-organize the billionaire class. In Congress, I will keep doing everything in my power to push back against this administration’s attacks. In the past few weeks, I’ve joined local organizations to share information about immigrants’ rights, to fight for affordable health care, and to protect public education. I joined federal employees outside the Office of Personnel Management to protest the administration’s reckless efforts to dismantle our federal workforce. In the House Oversight Committee, I voted to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress and explain why a billionaire who nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government. Republicans blocked that effort, but I will keep pushing to hold Musk accountable. We won’t let the richest man on earth, who gets $20 billion in government contracts, steal money from the most vulnerable among us. As a Congresswoman, I took an oath to uphold the Constitution, which gives Congress control over federal spending and oversight authority over the president. The Constitution lays out a balance of government, which is why the White House cannot dismantle federal agencies without the approval of Congress. By illegally seizing power over our federal agencies, this president and his unelected billionaire friends are creating a constitutional crisis. I’m pushing back against attacks on agencies like the Department of Education and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, which protects working people from getting ripped off. In March, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau was set to eliminate $49 billion in medical debt from 15 million Americans’ credit reports. My team and I worked hard to help win this victory, and it’s one we must defend. In this new Congress, I was also appointed to serve on the House Financial Services Committee again, where I will keep demanding a government that puts people over profits. I’m also fighting back against this presidential administration’s attempt to roll back protections for workers and marginalized communities. Amid the GOP assault on our civil rights, I just re-introduced the Justice For All Act to give people of every background and identity the tools they need to fight discrimination in our communities. I will keep standing up for Black, brown, disabled, and LGBTQ+ Americans, and anyone else targeted by this administration. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together we will keep advocating for an economy that works for working people, health care for all, a livable environment for future generations, and civil rights that are guaranteed to everyone. Even if they try to silence us, we know that as oppression hardens, so does the resistance. With you in this fight, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
| | | Friend, it's Kirsten Gillibrand, your DSCC Chair.

**Trump's been back in office only 4 weeks, and from my front-row seat in the Senate, I can tell you it's every bit as bad as we thought it would be -- worse, even.**

**[We can't wait _another_ week to take action -- the fight to win back the majority and halt Trump's extreme agenda starts NOW. So please, will you donate $5 immediately to flip the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250217-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250217-KirstenGillibrand-HowItsGoing-Pros-sl1&akid=19517%2E9716520%2EQX2J7I)**

**We NEED a Democratic Senate majority to keep Trump in check -- and as DSCC Chair, it's my responsibility to deliver one.**

With our Social Security, our Medicare, our economy, our civil rights, our grocery bills, and so much more at stake, the moment demands that we act _now._ That's why I'm coming to you today to let you know: _I can't do it without your help._

name: Jeff Jackson
subject: Executive orders
body:
And walking to the legislature in the rain

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9qZWZmamFja3Nvbm5jLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dcd-zjuP0pRcRHsSAhJStmVv08x6HnlPtV10NI0OQhY?) for more
---
# [Executive orders](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=157327500&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzI3NTAwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MTE0NjAsImV4cCI6MTc0MjQwMzQ2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NmFpPYvfhRoQxXsutRjp-X2_22UX8zQDPtRsG4ULstw)
### And walking to the legislature in the rain
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Feb 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=157327500&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzI3NTAwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczOTgxMTQ2MCwiZXhwIjoxNzQyNDAzNDYwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.J1HLi4FN5XvomkLozNGR31IAl5BeghxrnkT7ONEgIQs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=157327500&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzI3NTAwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MTE0NjAsImV4cCI6MTc0MjQwMzQ2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NmFpPYvfhRoQxXsutRjp-X2_22UX8zQDPtRsG4ULstw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=157327500&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3MzI3NTAwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk4MTE0NjAsImV4cCI6MTc0MjQwMzQ2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NmFpPYvfhRoQxXsutRjp-X2_22UX8zQDPtRsG4ULstw)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamVmZmphY2tzb25uYy9wL2V4ZWN1dGl2ZS1vcmRlcnM_.6VYamNIYuvjETL4Tg-7DJB2Ov0VDzx4egNhrEjdqMQA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/executive-orders?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

It was cold, raining, and I was making the walk from my office at NCDOJ to the state legislature - something I've been doing a lot lately.
As Attorney General, it's important to have a working relationship with both parties, so I'm sitting down for as many one-on-one meetings as I can. I served in the legislature for four terms. I know the people. I know the institution. And I know how to be realistic about politics and policy.
The majority party wasn't exactly thrilled when I won this race. They've already passed a bill that attempts to strip power from my office, and they're about to vote on another one that would ban the Attorney General from suing over executive orders. So, yes - it's a complicated relationship.
But here's the thing: the meetings have gone better than you might think.
I respect the role these legislators play, and when we sit down, I make that clear. And I emphasize that the work of the Attorney General should be nonpartisan, which I truly believe.
Then we talk about the fentanyl epidemic, the massive amount of robocalls people are getting, the latest advances in DNA testing at crime scenes, and new scams targeting their constituents.
And despite everything, we find common ground.
Not with everyone. Some of them confront me in the hallway about lawsuits I've filed. Some won't take a meeting. I get it. That's politics, especially in a moment like this.
But my job isn't to take it personally. My job is to put the North Carolina Department of Justice - and the one thousand people who work there - in the strongest position to accomplish our mission of keeping you and your families safe. That means having real conversations, even with people who campaigned against me and will do it again next time.
The work is the work. I'll let you know how it goes.
Also, here's AI's version of me walking in the cold rain over to the state legislature.

_I gotta remember to bring an umbrella to work!_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dce3fac0-525e-4a57-9f12-dd525731a32e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Executive Orders**
By my count, the new administration has issued 65 executive orders so far.
A handful of them have been unlawful - mostly attempts to bypass Congress and push through policies that probably wouldn't pass as regular legislation.
I, along with a number of other AGs, have filed suit over four of them.
* _Birthright Citizenship:_ The executive order attempting to end birthright citizenship was flagrantly unconstitutional. Over a century of legal precedent would have to be overturned for it to stand. We won both the temporary restraining order and a preliminary injunction. It'll be appealed, but for now, the law holds.
* _Funding Freeze:_ The abrupt and vague freeze on federal funding was also not a close call. A president cannot unilaterally refuse to distribute funds that Congress has authorized - again, that's long-standing precedent. We won the temporary restraining order, with a full hearing coming soon.
* _Medical Research Cuts:_ The proposed cut to medical research would devastate North Carolina's public universities and the lifesaving research they're doing. But it also likely violates Article I of the Constitution and the Administrative Procedure Act. We secured a temporary restraining order, and the full hearing is coming up.
* _DOGE Personal Data:****_ There's nothing unlawful about trying to find efficiencies in government. But there are federal laws that protect your privacy, and in my view, the manner in which DOGE is accessing and downloading data - like Social Security numbers - violates those laws. I joined a group of AGs in challenging it, we secured a temporary restraining order, and we'll see it through in court.

### **Major Data Breach**
Every public school district in North Carolina uses a software system called PowerSchool. It handles student grades, assignments, and records.
Our son uses it every day.
Three months ago, it was hacked.
The personal information of roughly 60 million Americans - including as many as 4 million North Carolinians - was compromised.
Obviously, this was illegal, and law enforcement is working to bring those responsible to justice.
But my job isn't just to go after the hackers - it's also to hold companies accountable for protecting your data in the first place.
In North Carolina, companies that store sensitive personal information are required by law to take reasonable steps to safeguard it. That's not a suggestion. That's the law.
So I've launched an investigation into PowerSchool to determine whether those protections were in place. If they weren't, there will be consequences.
It'll take time to get to the bottom of this, but we'll get answers.
And I'll keep you posted.
Best,
Jeff Jackson

Then we talk about the fentanyl epidemic, the massive amount of robocalls people are getting, the latest advances in DNA testing at crime scenes, and new scams targeting their constituents. And despite everything, we find common ground. Not with everyone. Some of them confront me in the hallway about lawsuits I've filed. Some won't take a meeting. I get it. That's politics, especially in a moment like this. But my job isn't to take it personally. My job is to put the North Carolina Department of Justice - and the one thousand people who work there - in the strongest position to accomplish our mission of keeping you and your families safe. That means having real conversations, even with people who campaigned against me and will do it again next time. The work is the work. I'll let you know how it goes. Also, here's AI's version of me walking in the cold rain over to the state legislature. I gotta remember to bring an umbrella to work! | | ---|---|--- Executive Orders By my count, the new administration has issued 65 executive orders so far. A handful of them have been unlawful - mostly attempts to bypass Congress and push through policies that probably wouldn't pass as regular legislation. I, along with a number of other AGs, have filed suit over four of them. Birthright Citizenship: The executive order attempting to end birthright citizenship was flagrantly unconstitutional. Over a century of legal precedent would have to be overturned for it to stand. We won both the temporary restraining order and a preliminary injunction. It'll be appealed, but for now, the law holds. Funding Freeze: The abrupt and vague freeze on federal funding was also not a close call. A president cannot unilaterally refuse to distribute funds that Congress has authorized - again, that's long-standing precedent. We won the temporary restraining order, with a full hearing coming soon. Medical Research Cuts: The proposed cut to medical research would devastate North Carolina's public universities and the lifesaving research they're doing. But it also likely violates Article I of the Constitution and the Administrative Procedure Act. We secured a temporary restraining order, and the full hearing is coming up. DOGE Personal Data:** There's nothing unlawful about trying to find efficiencies in government. But there are federal laws that protect your privacy, and in my view, the manner in which DOGE is accessing and downloading data - like Social Security numbers - violates those laws. I joined a group of AGs in challenging it, we secured a temporary restraining order, and we'll see it through in court. Major Data Breach Every public school district in North Carolina uses a software system called PowerSchool. It handles student grades, assignments, and records. Our son uses it every day. Three months ago, it was hacked. The personal information of roughly 60 million Americans - including as many as 4 million North Carolinians - was compromised. Obviously, this was illegal, and law enforcement is working to bring those responsible to justice. But my job isn't just to go after the hackers - it's also to hold companies accountable for protecting your data in the first place. In North Carolina, companies that store sensitive personal information are required by law to take reasonable steps to safeguard it. That's not a suggestion. That's the law. So I've launched an investigation into PowerSchool to determine whether those protections were in place. If they weren't, there will be consequences. It'll take time to get to the bottom of this, but we'll get answers. And I'll keep you posted. Best, Jeff Jackson ? | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Jeff Jackson Jeff Jackson for Attorney General, P.O. Box 470882 Charlotte, NC 28226, United States ? ?

name: COURIER
subject: What's going on at CNN?
body:
As Trump returns to power, CNN is running scared from its journalistic mission.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102285691/528681544/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI5NTcwMWEtNTBlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q75GXBJoZ-A-8kCB_uPDiLLisvYlOyq0gboNO08llGE=&emci=f9be8e6b-49ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=6b95701a-50ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Something is very wrong at CNN.
In January, the network fired 6% of its staff. And after a public clash with Donald Trump, longtime anchor Jim Acosta left rather than accept a humiliating demotion.
**At a time when Trump and Elon Musk are dismantling the government and pushing the country toward a constitutional crisis, CNN is retreating—cutting resources and softening coverage. Few outlets have the reach and credibility to cover this moment as the emergency it is—but instead of rising to the occasion, CNN is backing down.**
[**If you value fearless, independent journalism that holds Trump accountable, chip in $25 today to help build the progressive alternative our democracy urgently needs.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102285692/528681545/2081197767?refcode=20250217-EM-CNN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI5NTcwMWEtNTBlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q75GXBJoZ-A-8kCB_uPDiLLisvYlOyq0gboNO08llGE=)
**CNN’s bias toward Trump is only getting worse.**
During the campaign, CNN admitted to holding Kamala Harris to a higher standard than Trump. COURIER and others called them out for the blatant bias. But since Election Day, that bias has only deepened:
* **Jim Acosta** was banned from the pressroom during Trump’s first term. Recently, CNN tried to push him to a midnight time slot to appease Trump. Rather than accept the demotion, Acosta left the network entirely.
* **Jake Tapper and Anderson Cooper** —two of CNN’s strongest Trump critics—were reportedly told to hold back their outrage during Inauguration Day coverage and approach Trump with an "open mind." Tapper’s noticeably muted coverage only seemed to reinforce those reports.
* **The deference to Trump isn’t working.** In January, CNN averaged just over half a million viewers—while Fox News pulled in 3 million. And Trump himself mocked CNN White House correspondent Kaitlan Collins at a press conference, sneering: “Nobody watches CNN anymore. Because they have no credibility.”

And now, when the country needs CNN to treat Trump and Musk’s dismantling of the federal government like the five-alarm fire that it is, they’re shrinking their newsroom and retreating.
**They have the platform and the resources, but instead they’re playing it scared and safe.**
**That’s where COURIER comes in.**
We don’t answer to billionaires, ratings, or clicks. We answer to facts, truth, and journalism's core mission of defending democracy.
[**_Can you chip in $25 today to help us counter disinformation and ensure that the truth has a voice in this critical moment for our country?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102285693/528681546/2081197767?refcode=20250217-EM-CNN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI5NTcwMWEtNTBlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q75GXBJoZ-A-8kCB_uPDiLLisvYlOyq0gboNO08llGE=)
**[Chip in $25 now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102285694/528681547/-1581427288?refcode=20250217-EM-CNN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI5NTcwMWEtNTBlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q75GXBJoZ-A-8kCB_uPDiLLisvYlOyq0gboNO08llGE=)**
While legacy media bends, COURIER stands firm. With your help, we can fill the void and ensure journalism stays true to its mission.
In solidarity,
The COURIER Team

Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)

[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102285697/528681550/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI5NTcwMWEtNTBlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Q75GXBJoZ-A-8kCB_uPDiLLisvYlOyq0gboNO08llGE=&emci=f9be8e6b-49ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=6b95701a-50ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=14016711)

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: Republicans are attacking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I’ll get straight to the point: **Republicans are up with attack ads right now because they know I’m a threat.**

[Will you split a contribution between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today to help us fight back?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86924?t=6&akid=18930%2E878179%2EcMQBwE) | [**DONATE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86924?t=7&akid=18930%2E878179%2EcMQBwE)
---
This is a race we _can_ win, and they’re scared. If we win all three special elections this spring, we can flip the House and stop the GOP’s agenda. So, they’re grasping at straws to stop our grassroots momentum in its tracks.

But, friend, I won’t stoop to their level. I’m laser-focused on the issues that actually matter to folks and ready to represent this district better than anyone else ever has.

[If you’re tired of the same old political playbook and ready to make real changes, I hope you’ll consider splitting a contribution between me and the Voter Protection Project today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86924?t=8&akid=18930%2E878179%2EcMQBwE)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Blake Gendebien and VPP will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18930%2E878179%2EcMQBwE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18930%2E878179%2EcMQBwE).**

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I went on Bill Maher’s show again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlek9gt24d31si0gl75kib6facjjgq42cu0a8v88_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h69or4chh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqh8clppmv3lndj1ajucrm7c5tnp4nhqchfln598_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h69or4chh2bs)
|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoi5mhon6dkltv0girmkbfna4ndmnlpaco70e0do_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h69or4chh2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|
---
[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd9459h8fnlt4nma2vc103qe32o4k2gtdgup3pg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3h69or4chh2bs)
|
---
Thank you and god bless,
Byron Donalds _****_

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: This is the NARROWEST MAJORITY in 100 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t play around!

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
| | Peter, we have the narrowest majority _**in nearly 100 YEARS.**_ And to make matters worse, the Democrats are wasting no time building their war chest to flip it.

Here’s what you need to know: ➔ GOP control could shrink to just 215 seats with upcoming vacancies.➔ Not a single defection can be afforded to pass President Trump’s bold America First agenda.➔ The Democrats are ready to exploit every crack in our defense to block Trump’s policies and derail the conservative movement.

_**We can’t let them win.**_

Democrats are already pouring MILLIONS into their efforts to undo everything we’ve fought for. If we don’t act NOW, we risk losing our ability to deliver the bold, conservative agenda voters demanded in November.

If we’re going to put up a fight, we need to get ahead of the Democrats on fundraising starting RIGHT NOW.**[**If you can, please consider chipping in to defend our slim majority. Every dollar counts in a fight as critical as this.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-O-Z9eREpUa3L8i5Zw)**
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

[ DEFEND THE MAJORITY](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Thank you,

Congressman Troy Downing

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: Elon Musk is the gun lobby’s new favorite puppet
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Elon Musk is an unelected fraud who has become one of Trump’s closest confidants
#

Want to know something that may surprise you?
After the horrific shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas, Elon Musk went on the record to say that he supported “tight background checks” on all gun sales and that he believed in limiting the sale of assault weapons.
But now that Musk has pledged his allegiance to Donald Trump and the MAGA right, he’s become the gun lobby’s new favorite puppet. During Trump’s campaign, Musk became a mouthpiece for the gun lobby’s classic fear-mongering tactics.
At a Trump rally in the fall, Musk peddled the lie that by advocating for commonsense gun safety legislation, our gun violence prevention movement is trying to take guns away from law-abiding citizens.
Now, Elon Musk has become one of the president’s closest confidants. Although he wasn’t elected by the American people, Musk has somehow wormed his way into our government and has been illegally cutting funding from critical government agencies like USAID. It’s absolutely terrifying, and it’s only a matter of time until our gun safety movement becomes Musk’s next object of fixation.
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us build the resources our gun violence prevention movement needs to fight back against the Trump-Musk regime?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250217-1-b&t=1&akid=9996%2E3935704%2EzHHb1O)

But now that Musk has pledged his allegiance to Donald Trump and the MAGA right, he’s become the gun lobby’s new favorite puppet. During Trump’s campaign, Musk became a mouthpiece for the gun lobby’s classic fear-mongering tactics. At a Trump rally in the fall, Musk peddled the lie that by advocating for commonsense gun safety legislation, our gun violence prevention movement is trying to take guns away from law-abiding citizens. Now, Elon Musk has become one of the president’s closest confidants. Although he wasn’t elected by the American people, Musk has somehow wormed his way into our government and has been illegally cutting funding from critical government agencies like USAID. It’s absolutely terrifying, and it’s only a matter of time until our gun safety movement becomes Musk’s next object of fixation. name: Jan Schakowsky
subject: A BIG night for one of our own!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102288445/528690717/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_170225_EVT_Ben-Head&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmJhMDM2ZGEtNTRlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wvSR9SinN_jRf7FojiOaLoVWSXxFucFbs0UG2yqq3oQ=)
Hi team,

I’m Congresswoman Schakowsky and I could not be prouder to announce that Ben Head, my dear friend and political director for the last decade, is being honored with the prestigious IDCCA Party Builder award in recognition of his lifetime of selfless and groundbreaking work on behalf of Illinois Democrats.
IDCCA Party Builder Award Ceremony
Monday, February 24
5:30-7:00
12 E Erie Chicago, IL
([Tickets available here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102288450/528690722/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_170225_EVT_Ben-Head&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmJhMDM2ZGEtNTRlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wvSR9SinN_jRf7FojiOaLoVWSXxFucFbs0UG2yqq3oQ=))
In Illinois and beyond, Ben Head’s tireless work and dedication have led to to be regarded as among the absolute best organizers in America. I can’t think of someone more deserving!

Ben has spent his entire adult life working to strengthen and mobilize our party – here in Illinois specifically, but also around the country. He has managed dozens of winning Democratic campaigns here in Illinois, including some of the toughest. For the last ten years, I have had the pleasure (and distinct advantage) of counting on Ben as my campaign manager and political director. In that time he has organized and trained the largest, most highly effective volunteer corps in Illinois through the Schakowsky Organizing Academy.

Ben’s passion for teaching and mentoring up and coming leaders doesn’t end with the hundreds of students that have graduated from the Schakowsky Organizing Academy.

Through Men4Choice, an organization Ben co-founded in 2015, the New Leaders Council, Democracy for America, Build the Bench, and the Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association, he has trained and mobilized over a thousand young leaders into concrete progressive action.

Most recently, Ben co-founded and managed Operation Swing State, a project that brought 80 partners in Illinois together to produce over 10,000 volunteer shifts in nearby swing states to knock over a quarter million doors, **making it the largest interstate volunteer mobilization in Illinois history.**

Join Ben and other awardees at IDCCA’s 2025 Party Builder Awards, happening on February 24th at 5:30pm. [**RSVP right now to secure your spot to join us in honoring all the folks who are hungry to get our party back and track.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102288455/528690727/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_170225_EVT_Ben-Head&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmJhMDM2ZGEtNTRlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wvSR9SinN_jRf7FojiOaLoVWSXxFucFbs0UG2yqq3oQ=)
[JOIN US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102288459/528690733/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_170225_EVT_Ben-Head&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmJhMDM2ZGEtNTRlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wvSR9SinN_jRf7FojiOaLoVWSXxFucFbs0UG2yqq3oQ=)If you’re able, please join and celebrate Ben’s fantastic accomplishments.

Congresswoman Jan Schakowsky

clean_body: = Hi team, I’m Congresswoman Schakowsky and I could not be prouder to announce that Ben Head, my dear friend and political director for the last decade, is being honored with the prestigious IDCCA Party Builder award in recognition of his lifetime of selfless and groundbreaking work on behalf of Illinois Democrats. IDCCA Party Builder Award Ceremony Monday, February 24 5:30-7:00 12 E Erie Chicago, IL (=) In Illinois and beyond, Ben Head’s tireless work and dedication have led to to be regarded as among the absolute best organizers in America. I can’t think of someone more deserving! Ben has spent his entire adult life working to strengthen and mobilize our party – here in Illinois specifically, but also around the country. He has managed dozens of winning Democratic campaigns here in Illinois, including some of the toughest. For the last ten years, I have had the pleasure (and distinct advantage) of counting on Ben as my campaign manager and political director. In that time he has organized and trained the largest, most highly effective volunteer corps in Illinois through the Schakowsky Organizing Academy. Ben’s passion for teaching and mentoring up and coming leaders doesn’t end with the hundreds of students that have graduated from the Schakowsky Organizing Academy. Through Men4Choice, an organization Ben co-founded in 2015, the New Leaders Council, Democracy for America, Build the Bench, and the Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association, he has trained and mobilized over a thousand young leaders into concrete progressive action. Most recently, Ben co-founded and managed Operation Swing State, a project that brought 80 partners in Illinois together to produce over 10,000 volunteer shifts in nearby swing states to knock over a quarter million doors, making it the largest interstate volunteer mobilization in Illinois history. Join Ben and other awardees at IDCCA’s 2025 Party Builder Awards, happening on February 24th at 5:30pm. = you’re able, please join and celebrate Ben’s fantastic accomplishments. Sarah Sanders unveiled details of her Arkansas ACCESS higher education reform plan on Friday...[it] would prohibit professors from indoctrinating students with forced statements in support of DEI and other beliefs held by the professor."_\- Talk Business & Politics Arkansas students go to college to be educated, not bombarded with anti-American, historically illiterate woke nonsense.

It's up to every American Patriot to make sure that NEVER HAPPENS. | | "PITCH IN 10 BUCKS" | "PITCH IN 25 BUCKS" | "PITCH IN 50 BUCKS" | "PITCH IN ANOTHER AMOUNT" We're not going to guilt you into chipping in. We won't question your loyalty if you choose to ignore this plea. But if you and your family can spare JUST a few bucks right here and right now, it would go a long way to help us out. We hold the House by the smallest margins in 100 YEARS. And even though we hold the Senate AND White House ... It could all be over for us if these anti-Trump radicals manage to barge back into power. "So we’re begging you – if there is ANYTHING you can spare – to chip in a few bucks to help save our fragile House Majority. Can we count on you?" Thanks for all you do, House Republicans | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Bernie - "Unacceptable"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Republicans
in Congress are trying to ram through legislation to massively cut
Medicaid and hand out more massive tax breaks for billionaires.
UNACCEPTABLE! We’re joining Bernie in the fight to protect it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21527?t=1011&akid=7714%2E5885482%2ENAPX0g ][IMG]

While the House GOP tries to destroy Medicaid, Elon Musk is coming for the
entire social safety net, making reckless unfounded claims about “fraud.”
This is Musk’s DOGE playbook: demonize and dismantle.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21527?t=1012&akid=7714%2E5885482%2ENAPX0g ][IMG]

The battle to save Medicaid and Medicare from the GOP’s Trump Tax Cut 2.0
bill is the legislative fight of 2025. It would be massively unpopular to
cut healthcare for seniors and people in need, so we have a chance to
pressure key members of Congress to stop this attack on the American
people. Our Citizen Army is fighting back right now — can you join them?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21527?t=1013&akid=7714%2E5885482%2ENAPX0g ]Will you add your name right now to stand with Bernie and Our
Revolution to save Medicare and Medicaid, and stop the GOP’s Trump Tax
bill 2.0?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21527?t=1014&akid=7714%2E5885482%2ENAPX0g ]ADD YOUR NAME

Trump has always sent mixed messages about cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and
Social Security, because these are some of the most popular programs in
America.

Trump’s Authoritarian Capitalism will be built on destroying the social
safety net. And Dr. Oz is ready to outright privatize Medicare as head of
CMS. But Trump can’t just come out and say he wants to cut these programs
without alienating a large part of his base who rely on them — which means
we have leverage.

It’s up to us to fight back,
Peter Willis. Our 30,000 Citizen Action
Team activists (and counting) are putting the pressure on Republicans and
Democrats to stand up against slashing Medicare and Medicaid to fund
trillions in tax cuts for the ultra-rich. Are you with us?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21527?t=1015&akid=7714%2E5885482%2ENAPX0g ]Add your name now to protect Medicare and Medicaid from Musk-Trump!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21527?t=1016&akid=7714%2E5885482%2ENAPX0g ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Susie Lee
subject: Lessons in Leadership: Presidents' Day Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102290430/528696721/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDgxODAwOS01OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYsYJvBerbgbsr-6Z3cUJE8uf5sRdpgXmB7bvpTI5WQ=)

| | Folks, As we celebrate Presidents' Day, I’m reminded of the moments in recent years that have tested the strength of our democracy. Yet, the very values upon which our country was founded have continued to guide us through times of turmoil and division. The legacies of George Washington and Abraham Lincoln, in particular, stand as timeless examples of leadership in the face of adversity. Washington led with unwavering integrity, setting a high standard for those who seek to lead our nation. He warned against the dangers of partisanship, reminding us that unity and cooperation are essential to preserving our democracy. Lincoln, leading the nation through its most profound division, proved that democracy—when harnessed as a force for progress—can change the course of history for the better. His leadership continues to inspire us to stand up for justice, equality, and the fundamental rights of all people. On this Presidents' Day, let’s recommit to the values that have carried us through history—integrity, unity, and the unwavering pursuit of a more perfect union. The best way to honor these presidents’ legacies is by working together, finding common ground, and empowering every American to reach new heights. As your Congresswoman, I’m committed to doing exactly that. With gratitude, Susie Lee | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102290433/528696725/670433136?refcode=EM_BNCC_LEE_250217_EN_PRESDAY_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDgxODAwOS01OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYsYJvBerbgbsr-6Z3cUJE8uf5sRdpgXmB7bvpTI5WQ=)

subject: Elon Musk pushes anti-Social Security agenda in the White House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Don’t let Musk’s plan to gut Social Security work! >>

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102290736/528697348/485427744?refcode=NDCAF_20250217_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjgxODAwOS01OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvN0GyZgYZramsM730mKOu2Z9a7NnoYQTFpzwlG_l9I=&emci=670275e3-07eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c2818009-59ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=48524772) | [SIGN NOW TO PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY FROM THE PROJECT 2025 AGENDA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102290745/528697372/485427744?refcode=NDCAF_20250217_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjgxODAwOS01OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvN0GyZgYZramsM730mKOu2Z9a7NnoYQTFpzwlG_l9I=&emci=670275e3-07eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c2818009-59ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=48524772)
---
Earlier this week, Elon Musk stood in the Oval Office and made a false claim that people 150 years old are receiving Social Security checks – **an absurd statement with no basis in reality.**

name: APL
subject: I will never lie to you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
MESSAGE FROM:

ANNA PAULINA LUNA

[https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-nolie-db?utm_term=db-luna-em21-006&source_code=db-luna-em21-006&utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=db&utm_campaign=20250210_apl_apl-prsp-email-nolie-db&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids]

Friend, I will never lie to you.

Washington is run by corrupt politicians who sell out America while
hardworking patriots like you get left behind. _THEY DON'T CARE ABOUT
YOU. BUT I DO._

I grew up in poverty, surrounded by crime, gangs, and violence. I
wasn't supposed to make it out. But I refused to be a victim.

I joined the United States Air Force and became the fighter I am
today-the woman who will never back down, never sell out, and never
stop fighting for YOU.

That's why the DC Swamp is coming after me and veterans like Pete
Hegseth.

They hate that I don't play their games. They hate that I expose their
corruption. AND THEY WILL DO WHATEVER IT TAKES TO DESTROY ME.

I'm fighting like hell to keep the House RED and stop the radical Left
from destroying America. But I can't do this alone.

_ THE SWAMP IS DUMPING MILLIONS TO TAKE ME OUT._ _ _

I need every patriot who cares about this country to step up right now
and join me in this fight.

If we don't hold the line, we lose everything.

_If you're struggling to make ends meet right now, please just
disregard the request and go about your day and know I'm fighting for
you._

_BUT IF YOU'RE NOT, I HOPE YOU'LL CONSIDER SPARING A FEW DOLLARS TO
STAND WITH ME TODAY>>
[https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-nolie-db?utm_term=db-luna-em21-006&source_code=db-luna-em21-006&utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=db&utm_campaign=20250210_apl_apl-prsp-email-nolie-db&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids]_

I'm not backing down. Will you stand with me?

_PLEASE, PLEASE RUSH YOUR SUPPORT NOW BEFORE IT'S TOO LATE>>
[https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-nolie-db?utm_term=db-luna-em21-006&source_code=db-luna-em21-006&utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=db&utm_campaign=20250210_apl_apl-prsp-email-nolie-db&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids]_

Thank you & God bless,

Anna Paulina Luna

Congresswoman (FL-13)
U.S. Air Force Veteran

PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=275107&trkid=615448736&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Elon Musk and Crypto are shutting down the CFPB
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) is a federal agency
designed to act as a financial watchdog for consumers and hold
corporations accountable.

Over the past 14 years of its existence, the agency has returned more than
$17 BILLION back to consumers from predatory institutions, big banks, and
other bad actors who ripped them off.

Of course, Elon Musk, Big Tech, and the Crypto Lobby want to stop that.

Last week, Musk tweeted, “CFPB RIP 🪦” and sent his DOGE goons into the
agency, accessing its systems, shutting down its Twitter account, and
sending its staff home. This happened just days before Musk revealed plans
to launch a new payment system on X/Twitter that the CFPB would have
regulated.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250217-1?refcode=em20250217-36438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36438_1203867_xEAROy&akid=36438%2E1203867%2ExEAROy ]A headline from The Washington Post reading 'The CFPB took aim at Big
Tech. Then Elon Musk moved to dismantle it. Days before Musk's DOGE effort
set its sights on the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, X revealed new
plans to launh a payments system the agency might have scrutinized.'

It’s not just Musk who wants to kill the CFPB. Coinbase CEO and Fairshake
(a Crypto Super PAC) megadonor Brian Armstrong is wrongly claiming the
agency is unconstitutional, even though the Supreme Court said otherwise.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250217-1?refcode=em20250217-36438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36438_1203867_xEAROy&akid=36438%2E1203867%2ExEAROy ]A screenshot of a post on X from Justice Democrats. It's reposting a
post from Brian Armstrong reading '100% the right call. The CFPB is
unconstitutional on the face of it. And even if it wasn’t, it should be
deleted as we already have DOJ to prosecute fraud, and (many) other
financial services regulators. It’s an activist organization that has
done...'. The post has a community note attached reading ' Readers added
context: The Supreme Court, ruled (7-2 decision) that the CFPB's funding
mechanism does not violate the Constitution. Justice Thomas wrote the
majority opinion, stating that the CFPB's funding fits w/in the framework
of congressional appropriations.' Justice Democrats posted 'Brian is the
CEO of Coinbase, which bankrolled Crypto Super PAC Fairshake with ~$150
million to spend on elections last cycle. Their reward? Ending the agency
that's supposed to protect consumers from Wall Street grifters like them
so they can keep making $ to buy politicians.

It’s completely obvious: billionaires like Musk, Big Tech, and the Crypto
Lobby want to dismantle the agency responsible for regulating them and
protecting consumers from them.

They dumped billions of dollars into last year’s elections to gain the
power necessary to gut it — but Justice Democrats like Reps. Ilhan Omar,
AOC, and Summer Lee are fighting back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250217-1?refcode=em20250217-36438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36438_1203867_xEAROy&akid=36438%2E1203867%2ExEAROy ]We need to elect more progressives from working-class backgrounds who
will firmly reject contributions from Crypto and other Super PACs while
fighting to protect consumers: pitch in $5 to help us
recruit them this year →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250217-1?refcode=em20250217-36438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36438_1203867_xEAROy&akid=36438%2E1203867%2ExEAROy ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250217-36438-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36438_1203867_xEAROy&akid=36438%2E1203867%2ExEAROy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36438%2E1203867%2ExEAROy

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: INDems
subject: What we can do to push back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, With the constant stream of concerning news from the Trump and Braun administrations, it can seem impossible to know what to do day to day. On this Presidents' Day, we wanted to gather a few easy but important actions that you can do today to push back against harmful and dangerous policies we are witnessing at the national and state levels:
* Call or write your representative in the US House and tell them to demand oversight of this administration. You can call the House switchboard line at 202-224-3121 to connect to your Member of Congress.
* Call Senator Todd Young at 202-224-5623 and Senator Jim Banks at 202-224-4814 and urge them to do their jobs and provide checks and balances on the Executive Branch.
* [_Click here to leave your comments to Sen. Banks in writing._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102291774/528700302/1183119500?refcode=250217what&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkxNWVkNS01YWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBBu5wOKZtQ3ddQKtsN4kvZa4S_gJ7GsDlWqmBbFUW4=&emci=cd615ff7-03eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=04915ed5-5aed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)
* [Follow this link to leave comments to Sen. Young in writing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102291775/528700312/1614428698?refcode=250217what&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkxNWVkNS01YWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBBu5wOKZtQ3ddQKtsN4kvZa4S_gJ7GsDlWqmBbFUW4=&emci=cd615ff7-03eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=04915ed5-5aed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)
* Call your State Representative at 317-232-9600 and your State Senator at 317-232-9400. Tell them to oppose any cuts to local services and to protect healthcare benefits for Hoosier families. Tell them to stop wasting time on childish legislation like annexing portions of Illinois (yes, this is a real bill).
* **[Chip in to our Reorganizational Fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102291776/528700378/1764064610?refcode=250217what&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkxNWVkNS01YWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBBu5wOKZtQ3ddQKtsN4kvZa4S_gJ7GsDlWqmBbFUW4=)** to help the next Chair and leadership team at IDP hit the ground running and tell Hoosiers of the disastrous things these administrations are doing to working families.
* Follow our INDems accounts on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102291777/528700397/-269844829?refcode=250217what&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkxNWVkNS01YWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBBu5wOKZtQ3ddQKtsN4kvZa4S_gJ7GsDlWqmBbFUW4=&emci=cd615ff7-03eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=04915ed5-5aed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535), [X (Twitter)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102291778/528700432/1525035779?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor&refcode=250217what&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkxNWVkNS01YWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBBu5wOKZtQ3ddQKtsN4kvZa4S_gJ7GsDlWqmBbFUW4=&emci=cd615ff7-03eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=04915ed5-5aed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535), clean_body: | Peter, With the constant stream of concerning news from the Trump and Braun administrations, it can seem impossible to know what to do day to day. On this Presidents' Day, we wanted to gather a few easy but important actions that you can do today to push back against harmful and dangerous policies we are witnessing at the national and state levels: Call or write your representative in the US House and tell them to demand oversight of this administration. You can call the House switchboard line at 202-224-3121 to connect to your Member of Congress. Call Senator Todd Young at 202-224-5623 and Senator Jim Banks at 202-224-4814 and urge them to do their jobs and provide checks and balances on the Executive Branch. Call your State Representative at 317-232-9600 and your State Senator at 317-232-9400. Tell them to oppose any cuts to local services and to protect healthcare benefits for Hoosier families. Tell them to stop wasting time on childish legislation like annexing portions of Illinois (yes, this is a real bill). = to help the next Chair and leadership team at IDP hit the ground running and tell Hoosiers of the disastrous things these administrations are doing to working families. Hi. I bet that's not what you were expecting on a big red hat these days

_(But don 't you worry, I'm about as pro-Trump as they come!)_

_My name 's Marlin Stutzman._ I'm a 4th-generation farmer raising the finest Wagyu cows this side of the Mississippi. When I'm not herding cattle and hauling hay, I'm fighting the good fight in the People's House.

I ran for office because the Democrats AND even some Republicans have stabbed farmers like me in the back for as long as I can remember.

Ask any farmer - they'll show you the scars.

**I swear elites in DC think meat and produce *magically appear* at Whole Foods - not because farmers devote their blood, sweat, and tears to their trade. **

That's how they can sleep at night knowing...
* China is buying up our farmland
* Democrats taxed us into oblivion
* Liberals want to replace beef with fake meat made from God knows what
* Politicians get rich at our expense
* We're left to pick up the scraps

My entire life is focused on bringing all that to a screeching halt. And the political class knows I can't be bought off or bribed. That's why they're mobilizing the powers-at-be to silence me so they can keep the gravy train rolling.

_And holding the line here will be tougher than a $3 steak._

**[That's why I'm left with no choice but to ask you for a small donation today to keep me in Congress. I don't care if it's $3 or $300 - the amount doesn't matter nearly as much as the number of people who give.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=28fe227cbde9418197180260fd7406ae&_e=ICUaPStCb1S-SbiHfJ37OS9inkCzjTrATiaECzOc52wNoMAOKJxdVVxo2O3owCp7FjrpZw6FZM9EjYzv54ph9gyql4LSSLX5LJGLNwThdU7EQ_xG1c29Dztju2DKPq7YdXpubZhyRDH2Bb2NmkQB0CfKPphOubw_VtwBs5MayzUAIRyI-VVkTBG3qmMd2HS4msqJvAK3Jlbkw4VeMmYEYH3vzUh0Gx-GVMOAN4hj0IuQ4Cg69hXyYsvgbkvnbnqNUPB2286K2pSj171L6RG2wWpNSSf1ekZ_wwPSrOIbF6K2jwhHwEERsVFmJFrrShClcgdr9VPcAuBsGE4IqfjQmGliPSZVbgn4HZRr9wGz1rKuBSOh0miViWuuKm4K_A3I88MtSjFRi6bInBRTzXrwRwHiJMX5pufSC6XeayvTkCQ%3D "That’s why I’m left with no choice but to ask you for a small donation today to keep me in Congress. subject: One question for you

body:
Add your name to the petition and demand Donald Trump fire Elon as soon as possible.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250217-4775-footer&t=1&akid=4775%2E420207%2EG-o2wg)
Peter, we have one question for you:
**Should Donald Trump FIRE Elon Musk?**
**[Yes](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em-20250217-fire-elon-petition?source=em20250217-4775&akid=4775%2E420207%2EG-o2wg)**
**[Yes But In Green](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em-20250217-fire-elon-petition?source=em20250217-4775&akid=4775%2E420207%2EG-o2wg)**
After Musk’s disastrous so-called “cost-cutting” rampage throughout the federal government, it’s clear he has one goal and one goal only: To enrich himself and his billionaire friends at the expense of working people.
**That’s why we’re calling for Musk to be immediately FIRED from the federal government.**
[**If you’re on board, add your name to the petition and demand Donald Trump fire Elon as soon as possible.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em-20250217-fire-elon-petition?source=em20250217-4775&akid=4775%2E420207%2EG-o2wg)
— Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250217-4775-footer&t=2&refcode2=4775_420207_G-o2wg&akid=4775%2E420207%2EG-o2wg)**

Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today? ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/EixHLE1-E1thxyA-991T2dCffsX_rwS3rt1akcsLrQ0PzAC2HJcxJw66bBYR1kFExazyh29keQN0zvc4KicRRWWbUBZt7Q8BziaRz2bVLL3E_rcxWkemIV0VNg80_iXMe4DxGapuIJO2KogDqqdHS7QrhuUwLW912E6WHuNUjCwIg0UzwBx-fDFIG65HjwVGQcBPBLM1yDLont5UXcKQ1MGYA6ZCmiGrwnt4ybin5XTSYgHGentC-e3xni4fILWHW1N1udmLS1Map9ehrcL9S-1paX-dmgJiQ1AvDznoydb5f06d4ZN_y-lAepymtyuwSuDCk4SZ2kiy7It6pGDRztGBRWI05jJkpGkwOX7UnqmTAGhWifh2ErsFXGWjwN4JqPl4N7q9ednPVUaIXjEsrdQ76JG0_EewNSgQw8gP-mXg7XVQBV2D-tKfoOXe8swLs4f55n9mq3oYco3FDCyZeR7Jx2CVhMeD8CbWYtAUo8JKnX89MfM1Qkq2IAw/hA88YANunRSbkUnb2eXma7KH1SWxi3Qb/6)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: the first state wide election since 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b22aef8-24f3-4d1d-ae5e-005ef14333df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. This year, the stakes are just as high. Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in — making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court. We can't let them win. We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got. [Can you split a donation between Susan Crawford’s campaign and Blue Amp Action? Your support is critical if we want Susan to win this race.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e5be5e0-8aba-4264-8f98-318eb95d9bec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8dd3e27d-30fe-46cb-b2e9-e059bd9d4bd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Reproductive rights, funding for public education, voting rights, and so much more is on the line in this race. It’s already clear that this will not only be one of the closest races in the country, but it will also be the biggest race of 2025 — and we know that every dollar makes a difference. If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent. [I hope you’ll join me in supporting Susan Crawford for Wisconsin Supreme Court by splitting a donation with Blue Amp Action. If you can, chip in $5, $10, or whatever you’re able to help keep our progressive majority.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T069a593d-a0a7-4066-b184-12418b974f96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Tammy
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7dc0a2b0-d351-4632-91cf-cf5f3ef41497/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got. | | | Reproductive rights, funding for public education, voting rights, and so much more is on the line in this race. It’s already clear that this will not only be one of the closest races in the country, but it will also be the biggest race of 2025 — and we know that every dollar makes a difference. If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent. Thank you, Tammy | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

Peter,

Presidents’ Day is a celebration of our democracy and the leaders who put the American people first.

It’s a time to reflect on what true leadership looks like – **decency, compassion, and a commitment to service.** But let’s be honest: Not every leader in Washington shares those values.

Too many are more focused on their own power than on doing what’s right for the people they were elected to serve. That’s why Kim is standing up and calling on this administration – _and every leader in Washington_ – to remember who they work for: **The American people.**

Kim will always fight for us, hold leaders accountable, and work to keep Congress focused on what matters – lowering costs, protecting our rights, and making government work for the people, not against them. subject: Quick poll: Musk’s "Department of Government Efficiency"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_2&amount=25]
CNN: DOGE seeks access to highly sensitive taxpayer data at IRS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/CNN_DOGE_IRS.png]
Elon Musk has taken a wrecking ball to the federal government -- with President Trump's approval -- with his “Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).
Funding has been frozen, key agencies are being shuttered, and recent reporting has even revealed that Musk has access to critical data like Social Security numbers. Updates on Musk’s actions are unfolding at rapid fire pace, now including taxpayer data at IRS.
We want to hear from our supporters in your area about DOGE's efforts. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you approve of Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=012625_2&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=012625_2&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012625_2&amount=25]

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/6h9ms9ILpBNzWK7U74LCFKTdFt6h6BDj_HeHA11MAQrE8Q8VCnLbWbZOwJDpAQ3Ikof0pxo-tRO2fXA8j25BBe0ZkPLOkrBewIh9lDRpsWSJ29ZQv85Y12-fNTuEFhs1uIV2jRnmNBMRNhuis-hd6PnmfB9DnBcvr3Mu2gsJD5VMaH_YnGc3ugOz7LscWr_VZN-iSUzPIdtkYYmzLsY6hWu2tLn67jLwXm8zJIPHEepGAqNoiqZQIZsQvUQOI8iJOvl2HTM5_yTWD-H0romxjgtMA_5h8PeGdeQpHy4AnZDASXH6tvDxWF4-8tK1Oe2erTtQ1EYSqjU0dtfX88GiEFZBS3lawk5gqXX2hctmaFR9uj_0KKPwGQ2JHGRlhZIrWiR4aaxQLDmeBQTVVhv4PVlfXQY1jrZVMsXgirfp60kcyn9Ydux3YVthlG8Ay8LUxnYc5Kq-3gCiSpL90RXTcpPcfMxuIlxzUjBI0I8_Wln3GW3k5MBHzXIDCdU/_0PBizTkLNZieHZagIASomnrKOV0qoDu/6)

Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today? ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/QQLK7KPR2eCvvVcfwFMcqtiwyw-rxC2Wz2E4m7ZeClDJA5qzV-JNdHAlJlFjiXe2I8ApUIYPbp9yKeuxY6DgbB1fXF5idlpagiSHjCi66hfY2Qn6xiQp2tJ-tKo8wZwM1sPlq0N8mOXPiPyG9f8vVlfbuFX6sAqJ59fQF6PG2YOpsdZ4NEveZyUhp9fpVgqlP5HD3ZCDbvHctExTworGxCLMl2NBxGa3SFQZE3OghGAI4xwdj4J7tNDdOGtjDeh4NgvJUo7b7uo2yuKq-Vyg-SlDkaFzbyXvSRJWEhWTEaa_MXa8x6FkJEWoDLBcPz0RoEdcMduwRLFtJFHFL_Lf8HyG-_yRGhTohRIqw-p1tpWv9UbDrLiDLlGpis6xgg97PwKSx9HBKtHePpk1gptY9uTp_aLHCisbgmIGuG_Qmgo4OAv4OQ4uu-hQe311vkdLGnCIgt_t7oKYFia26091iPmHKqHNhDpPunMl30rrKst1tpLpICK21KXiFtU/CD9-bCycJ2wPvkxf599fgq2znfXJ2LBK/6)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|

[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/2RsJ01ndbSjI76ZbIjsvWjBUmKuyKyzEX3Uca8VeDCMU84qhuYVL-wF4UDzZiw8ebCoIvM8_4o5ixm5PzeY3r0PDDy-SWXfqx7GtLD-TrVD-jt5qPNwyuYpHJsJUMQ58lyA8LQUV8hGj-X6pc_YCzm9XdUkIRgJGRBfX2wh_J3vi0hODoUGavbjabSJf4lH1UQ-9qsRzQMes5mLhjjEVi9htRlRGU06d168biZThEFbg19MuTeDvKSem4Q7_RjrO53zkd_p9KBsjplT3dfynWxLVJF1W0VCJse-70EFVLRlrAL6HgaDHhuE4rr98qr-6Xfllf2CVUmm_qaHH_HE0_1SIiRKMaJviLfWJ7YaQzqx4KCiak8Jo63NAab_1KTg0M8yWoAezbEOuydfAfPnB8M8M5LjmPJI0r3C2Xj-abnWeCsWSoGkYqXwxLk6PSowAPQuktZjZd2EKI0bcPilPn9G_CptruE_EdOfrxwf2lR-6-KgihFwoJLufSUc/zMQVYN7jlSehU2fbb-Nf_Goq7-2QseJ5/6)
