name: Hillsdale College via Victory News
subject: Explore these great works at home
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l91agochy4ea30sa514y2gh8trdaihu2nq27s6k5pqhzl604ix1zrn15ta5uqdvsr6jgeyfm3dqa57rvts&__stmp=srudhq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srudhq&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6daowskr3601ysy7znbs0uc2tm6aahiuq8ls78g67jiay38e7xdp7kruebyke8kkp00sywwd4eugn7aoufl0exdk49luue5iq16fpmrzca4s552rjj2ijw0b7rlmkhvncnv6f68fkrid7c1l1l71x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srudhq&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srudhq&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srudhq&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srudhq&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6daowskr3601ysy7znbs0uc2tvfd53as90izyk0vh49msjvu5nl0q4klmi62tbwpqhjukx46lh6ayve2pz44a8q7gkintb47pjja84jap0wtzs054l00w70nt4iwioohmzei5kbskmksj7d2oihtc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srudhq&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srudhq&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: We get it

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102295153/528711521/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDBiMmRlYi02NGVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPQtLdqPMCKAVdOYBlfxEtWcoWlubeDfo8TunU14TUE=)
---
Peter, Every day, it seems like Donald Trump and his far-right allies do something to advance their billionaire-first agenda and leave working families behind. Many people are exhausted by the constant barrage of news coming out of Washington right now. They’re discouraged, hopeless, and close to wanting to check out of this fight altogether. _We get it._ **But that’s exactly what we can’t do, Peter — especially not right now.** Republicans _want_ us to leave this fight so they have free reign to line the pockets of their wealthy donors and billionaires at the expense of the teachers, firefighters, small-business owners, nurses, and hundreds of millions of everyday Americans across the country. While they may have majorities in all three branches in Washington right now, we can’t stop fighting to hold the Trump administration accountable, flip the House blue, and ensure working families have a fair shot at success. That’s why we need you to resist the urge to give up. We need you to recommit to this work. And we need you to stand with us as we fight for what we know is right. **[So are you with us, Peter? Sign our pledge now to show that you’re still fighting with us>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102295154/528711522/-1993774226?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDBiMmRlYi02NGVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPQtLdqPMCKAVdOYBlfxEtWcoWlubeDfo8TunU14TUE=&emci=c7c24485-a5e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=6d0b2deb-64ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30620316)** | **[SIGN THE PLEDGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102295155/528711523/-1993774226?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDBiMmRlYi02NGVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPQtLdqPMCKAVdOYBlfxEtWcoWlubeDfo8TunU14TUE=&emci=c7c24485-a5e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=6d0b2deb-64ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30620316)**

Thank you.

clean_body: | | Trump's lawlessness makes winning this race more urgent than ever. | | | | | Team, This open GOP House seat is in play—and can be flipped red to blue in less than 45 days. Let me explain. Democrats have *overperformed in special elections like this one. And this team has built a formidable ground game to turnout more of our voters to defeat Trump's handpicked MAGA loyalist on the other side. We have a golden opportunity to stop Trump. And if we continue to do the work, we can win this thing. But your support—right now—is the key to winning this election. | | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ** | Thank you for showing up and doing the work to win. Friend,
**The Democrats in the Virginia House of Delegates are out of control.** For years the VADems have driven our beloved Commonwealth into the ditch, but now they're doing what they do best: blocking common-sense legislation.

body:

Friends, This open GOP House seat is in play—and can be flipped red to blue in less than 50 days. Let me explain. We have a rare opportunity to stop Trump from ripping up the Constitution and trampling law and order: Democrats have *_overperformed_ * in special elections like this one. Trump’s approval rating is dropping quickly as he continues to attack workers and undermine the rule of law. And Elon Musk has been allowed to run rampant throughout the Oval Office, acting as an unelected Shadow President. All of this means that **if we do the work to boost Democratic turnout, persuade undecided voters, and register new voters, we can win this thing.** Your support—right now—is the key to winning this election. [**Folks, can I rely on you to help us keep this incredible momentum going? This team has raised over $3 million since we launched in mid-December. name: Sarah McBride
subject: The truth about the GOP’s attacks on me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
They want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech.
#
You may have heard that I recently gave my first speech as Delaware’s Congresswoman on the floor of the House of Representatives. And you may have also heard that the Republican who recognized me when I came to the podium used the moment to refer to me as the “Gentleman” from Delaware, “Mr. McBride.” A thoroughly unoriginal schoolyard taunt against trans people.
In truth, they want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech: the MAGA effort to gut our government at the expense of working people and my focus on bringing down costs and building a government that respects everyone.
Really, their attacks are about more than just me. The truth is they are using trans people as a pawn in their scheme to gut the federal government and line the pockets of Donald Trump’s best friends.
**But I refuse to be a pawn. I refuse to give them that power. And I refuse to let them get away with it.**
That’s why I’m going to spend every day fighting against their attempts to dismantle the federal government, and fighting for the things Delawareans elected me for — regardless of what kind of personal insults Republicans want to throw my way.
Republicans know what they’re doing right now is unpopular, and that’s why they’re desperate to change the conversation. It’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it.
[**If you’re with me, my campaign could really use your support at this moment. Will you pitch in $5 today and help me keep up the fight, no matter what gets thrown my way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250217-1?refcode=em20250217-1763&amount=5&refcode2=1763_21716_f8Wpxn&akid=1763%2E21716%2Ef8Wpxn)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250217-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250217-1763&refcode2=1763_21716_f8Wpxn&akid=1763%2E21716%2Ef8Wpxn)**
Thank you again for all of the support,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250217-1&t=1&refcode2=1763_21716_f8Wpxn&akid=1763%2E21716%2Ef8Wpxn)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1763%2E21716%2Ef8Wpxn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1763%2E21716%2Ef8Wpxn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1763%2E21716%2Ef8Wpxn)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

subject: Sign NOW and be the FIRST signature, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
Offer available for one hour only

| |
---
| | | We're just over three weeks into the Trump Administration, Peter, and we only have one thing to say:

_We 're so thankful for everything that President Trump is doing to save our nation and are so grateful that we have many more weeks to come! _

When President Trump took office, he IMMEDIATELY started taking action to deliver on his promises to Americans and get our nation back on the right path.

**So, we are writing him a THANK YOU letter to show him our gratitude and send our support. And today, we want YOU to be the FIRST signature!**

Your continued dedication to our conservative movement played a HUGE part in our success in this past election and we want to thank you by making sure your name is at the very TOP when we send this letter to President Trump!

_**[We can only hold your spot for the next hour before we have to move on to the next top patriot on the list so act fast and be the very first signature on our thank you letter to President Trump!](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/iofLrAjAAgItw-afWtgw0hhRduG7JLfqVEElY-j40yIrQ4HrIHsqV4Rqw1KLe_sRFnuFz1jvemhN-cfN_1IVCJZHscE69FRIXUXMvWIS5A8l0bTYHZEFf00x1yqRN6SqcHbPkpixFZLy3MezsHOX44M4yYJ4OZt0Leu77opsHC55yH7-ue3B-DaluQ_9cnDkxtIAPZuwJom6B-zhV5OpiyOUfXcZYnwTYXZhzx6uqRC4BhsjtxhghPs8EDooZJ475E4W48BeaDIWh0BwczKHjiyXdQw5j_WnZaYK8GTWQDqCtc0LAs6hZze89i7zrw95J_mxX0nckz-C8CcPZingAIJf3FKD87gICbKrOi8PIQ5MKp2hIoJFHvTXYJ6aP1myB_Jdc5GlDG8DYQ0UWQWpeGMEY8JeCYegCGa2XAa3Y4HWELB7miKAaqaUM3VlB8iVSlxsvqZkgR8rQ-IB8TRi2EOx64mtCMvDvVB9K6CCuXD_qn7mAquNyaRoAqdtF3lod1lQc-mdE_B7Ia7UYg-Q2vS8lza2QkBTRRPWKld-k9cX1Fo/qavte1QbBTv0sOT8VMzZlnkztjUMUmSl/6 "We can only hold your spot for the next hour before we have to move on to the next top patriot on the list so act fast and be the very first signature on our thank you letter to President Trump!")**_
|
Dear President Trump,

_**THANK YOU!!**_

For the first time in four years, our nation is in the right hands and is finally headed on the right path.

**And it 's thanks to YOU!**

Our nation was in turmoil after the disastrous policies that the Biden Administration enacted. But after seeing your first days back in office, I have hope again for the future of our country.

Your never-ending dedication to see the American people and our nation thrive will never be forgotten and I want to make sure you know how grateful I am.

Thank you for everything and I know it's only a matter of time before you Make America Great Again!

From,

name: JanePAC
subject: Without NOAA, who will warn you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Trump and Musk are threatening the system that keeps you safe.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102295628/528713209/1328794144?refcode=ea.0fffd7fd-67ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.0fffd7fd-67ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZmZkN2ZkLTY3ZWQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B1JG4PXQWZyUJvUrZYMUjSV9-T4o_4unWKSgr0eMUMs=&emci=03ffd7fd-67ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0fffd7fd-67ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
When severe weather is on the horizon — a hurricane shifting course in the middle of the night, a fast-moving wildfire racing toward your town — how do you know it’s time to act? It’s the emergency alert on your phone. It’s the breaking news segment on TV. It’s the weather forecast that warns you days in advance. But here’s what most people don’t realize: that life-saving information comes from NOAA — the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Behind every weather alert is a vast network of satellites, airplanes, radar systems, and expert analysts working around the clock to track storms and predict disasters. **And right now, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are actively working to gut this federal agency.[Will you chip in to help us elect leaders who will fight tooth and nail to stop them?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102295629/528713210/2105508926?refcode=ea.0fffd7fd-67ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.0fffd7fd-67ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZmZkN2ZkLTY3ZWQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B1JG4PXQWZyUJvUrZYMUjSV9-T4o_4unWKSgr0eMUMs=)** Trump’s administration is working hand-in-glove with Musk, whose private satellite empire stands to profit from dismantling public weather services. Musk’s unelected team of operatives are already inside NOAA headquarters — accessing sensitive data, suspending key personnel, and laying the groundwork to privatize national weather forecasting. They’re even pushing to slash NOAA’s 12,000-employee workforce in half. If they succeed, it won’t just be scientists who suffer. It’ll be all of us. Imagine a world where you and your family’s safety depend on profit-driven corporations — where emergency weather alerts are delayed or even sold to the highest bidder because profits matter more than people. We are fighting back — organizing and working to elect leaders who will defend the critical institutions that protect our lives. But we can’t do it without you. **[Rush a donation now to help us fight back. clean_body: Trump and Musk are threatening the system that keeps you safe. | When severe weather is on the horizon — a hurricane shifting course in the middle of the night, a fast-moving wildfire racing toward your town — how do you know it’s time to act? It’s the emergency alert on your phone. It’s the breaking news segment on TV. It’s the weather forecast that warns you days in advance. But here’s what most people don’t realize: that life-saving information comes from NOAA — the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Behind every weather alert is a vast network of satellites, airplanes, radar systems, and expert analysts working around the clock to track storms and predict disasters. And right now, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are actively working to gut this federal agency.= Trump’s administration is working hand-in-glove with Musk, whose private satellite empire stands to profit from dismantling public weather services. Musk’s unelected team of operatives are already inside NOAA headquarters — accessing sensitive data, suspending key personnel, and laying the groundwork to privatize national weather forecasting. They’re even pushing to slash NOAA’s 12,000-employee workforce in half. If they succeed, it won’t just be scientists who suffer. It’ll be all of us. Imagine a world where you and your family’s safety depend on profit-driven corporations — where emergency weather alerts are delayed or even sold to the highest bidder because profits matter more than people. We are fighting back — organizing and working to elect leaders who will defend the critical institutions that protect our lives. But we can’t do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this. subject: They Want to Censure Me, But I Will Not Back Down

body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102296046/528714642/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQxOTMwNy02OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Er9Djfw_T4ETjZATHmzQ476f5vbN29zoqfKokgc9CA=)
Team,
Rep. Nancy Mace has filed her censure resolution against me. The so-called "party of free speech" is now ready to punish Members of Congress for calling out Elon Musk. But I will not be silenced.
This moment demands action — not just words. We must expose the corruption and hypocrisy of the right-wing MAGA agenda, and fight back with everything we’ve got. For too long, House Republicans have used extreme rhetoric to attack their opponents, while we’ve had to hold back. That stops now.
[If you stand with me in opposing the Trump/Musk agenda, please consider supporting my campaign with a contribution today. Every dollar helps us combat misinformation and defend Democrats from these relentless attacks. And I need your support because Elon Musk has said he’s coming after me and others who speak out against him.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102296047/528714643/-284373445?refcode2=15d19307-69ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=em250217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQxOTMwNy02OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Er9Djfw_T4ETjZATHmzQ476f5vbN29zoqfKokgc9CA=)
When I spoke during the House DOGE committee hearing last week, I wasn’t just calling out Elon Musk. I was exposing the hypocrisy of Marjorie Taylor Greene chairing any committee, and shining a light on the real harm Musk is causing to Americans: destroying our institutions, while profiting at the expense of working-class Americans.
Let’s not get distracted by the noise. Here’s what’s really happening: tens of thousands of newly unemployed federal workers, families struggling to make ends meet, cuts to vital services like education, Medicaid, veterans' benefits, and global health programs — all while your tax dollars are funneled to billionaires like Musk. It was recently reported that Musk will receive a $400 million contract from the Department of Defense for Tesla trucks. But don’t worry, there’s no conflict of interest here.
This is absolutely outrageous. The American people deserve better, and they demand better. We didn’t build the strongest democracy in the world just to watch it be dismantled by a billionaire from South Africa and a reality TV show president.
They can censure me. They can attack me. They can lie about me. But I will not back down. This fight is too important. And I promise you, I’m in it for the long haul.
[Can I count on your support as we stand up to Elon Musk and the MAGA extremists? Please make a contribution to my campaign today and let’s show them we won’t be intimidated — we’re going to fight like hell.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102296048/528714644/-284373445?refcode2=15d19307-69ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=em250217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQxOTMwNy02OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Er9Djfw_T4ETjZATHmzQ476f5vbN29zoqfKokgc9CA=)

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102296049/528714645/1521319987?refcode2=15d19307-69ed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=em250217&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQxOTMwNy02OWVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Er9Djfw_T4ETjZATHmzQ476f5vbN29zoqfKokgc9CA=)

I know things are overwhelming right now, and it’s hard to keep up with every attack the administration is launching. But I am here to fight for you. Together, we will push back — and together, we will win.
Let's Go,
Robert

clean_body: = Team, Rep. Nancy Mace has filed her censure resolution against me. The so-called "party of free speech" is now ready to punish Members of Congress for calling out Elon Musk. But I will not be silenced. This moment demands action — not just words. We must expose the corruption and hypocrisy of the right-wing MAGA agenda, and fight back with everything we’ve got. For too long, House Republicans have used extreme rhetoric to attack their opponents, while we’ve had to hold back. That stops now. = When I spoke during the House DOGE committee hearing last week, I wasn’t just calling out Elon Musk. I was exposing the hypocrisy of Marjorie Taylor Greene chairing any committee, and shining a light on the real harm Musk is causing to Americans: destroying our institutions, while profiting at the expense of working-class Americans. Let’s not get distracted by the noise. Here’s what’s really happening: tens of thousands of newly unemployed federal workers, families struggling to make ends meet, cuts to vital services like education, Medicaid, veterans' benefits, and global health programs — all while your tax dollars are funneled to billionaires like Musk. It was recently reported that Musk will receive a $400 million contract from the Department of Defense for Tesla trucks. But don’t worry, there’s no conflict of interest here. This is absolutely outrageous. The American people deserve better, and they demand better. We didn’t build the strongest democracy in the world just to watch it be dismantled by a billionaire from South Africa and a reality TV show president. They can censure me. They can attack me. They can lie about me. But I will not back down. This fight is too important. And I promise you, I’m in it for the long haul. = = I know things are overwhelming right now, and it’s hard to keep up with every attack the administration is launching. But I am here to fight for you. Together, we will push back — and together, we will win. Let's Go, Robert * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 2/17/2025 🇺🇸
body:
In letter to Mayor Mike Johnston, Denver restaurants say they’re now watching downtown ‘fall completely apart’
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**February 17, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Happy Presidents Day!
Today, we recognize the leaders who shaped our nation. From Washington’s steadfast resolve to Lincoln’s fight for unity, America’s greatest presidents have led with courage, conviction, and a deep love for our country. May we learn from their leadership as we work to restore prosperity and freedom in our own communities.
Denver’s small business community is at a breaking point, and it’s not hard to see why. In a scathing letter to Mayor Mike Johnston, local restaurant owners are sounding the alarm: [downtown is falling apart](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Crime, homelessness, rising costs, and disastrous city planning have left business owners struggling to survive.
Despite Johnston’s campaign promises to revitalize downtown, the situation has only deteriorated. Two fatal stabbings on 16th Street Mall in January, rampant drug use, and out-of-control homelessness have driven customers away. Restaurant owners—including those from Jax Fish House, Illegal Pete’s, and Union Station establishments—are frustrated by the city’s lack of action, even as over $500 million in taxpayer money has been poured into so-called "transformative investments."
Business owners describe an environment where employees feel unsafe, customers avoid the area, and even food trucks and bike lane expansions have made it harder for restaurants to stay afloat. Since 2022, over 425 restaurants have closed in Denver, and without urgent change, more closures will follow.
This isn’t just bad policy—it’s a betrayal of the businesses that make Denver vibrant. Leadership matters. Without a real plan to restore safety, reduce taxes, and support small businesses, our city’s economic future is in jeopardy.
Stay with Rocky Mountain Voice as we continue to expose the failures of Colorado’s leadership and fight for the businesses and communities they’re abandoning.
In liberty, Heidi
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[In a shifting of chairs, Republican parties have new leadership in many Colorado counties](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The only constant in life is said to be change. That certainly is the way it may feel for those in a number of county Republican parties around Colorado.
**[Ganahl: Parents speak up about rash of alleged sex crimes by staff in Jefferson County schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A letter sent by parent-led organization Jeffco Kids First (JKF) to the superintendent of Jefferson County schools and its board of education on Feb. 7, urges them to acknowledge shocking and dangerous issues in the district.

**[It’s take three for the unpopular, anti-gun SB 3 returning Thursday to the Colorado Senate floor](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) It’s a déjà vu moment in the Colorado Senate. Senate Bill 25-003 will be up for a second reading Thursday, Feb. 13, for the third time in three weeks.
|
---
**LEGISLATIVE SESSION**
**[Sponsors offer some concessions, but SB 3 still ‘infringement,’ Republicans argue](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Debate over Senate Bill 25-003, which began in the late afternoon Thursday and continued into the wee hours of Friday morning, ended with Democrats giving initial support to one of the country’s most extreme gun laws in a mostly party line voice vote in the Colorado Senate.
**[Sen. Rod Pelton asks Colorado lawmakers to ‘crack down on crime in this state’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The odds might not be ever in your favor in Colorado that if you operate a motor vehicle here, it won’t be stolen at some point.
**[In shift from ‘system of choice to coercion,’ Senate Republicans outnumbered in fight on SB 5](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A series of seven amendments were all lost Thursday as Colorado Senate Republicans were powerless to improve upon a partisan Democrat bill they say is in search of a problem.

**[Rep. Bottoms’ HB 1145, prohibiting trafficking of minors into state for reproductive services, killed in committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rep. Scott Bottoms may have learned Tuesday that perception is indeed reality. Despite multiple attempts to position his House Bill 25-1145 as another attempt to hold accountable child traffickers he has witnessed operating over two decades, his bill was shredded in the House’s Judiciary Committee for surface concerns it was rather an anti-abortion, anti-transgender bill.

**[HB 1098, the crime victim alert system bill, advances, but without Republican committee support. Here’s why.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) It would be difficult to say what turned Republican support against a bipartisan bill Tuesday in the House’s Judiciary Committee — the considerable expenditure required in a down fiscal year or the potential raised of harm to gun owners.

_**[READ MORE LEGISLATIVE SESSION UPDATES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**STATE**
**[Wolf 2307-OR died as a result of another wolf, not a gunshot wound as some theorized](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Despite allegations and innuendos from animal rights activists, wolf 2307-OR died as a result of a fight with another wolf, not a gunshot wound last September.

**[Rep. Ty Winter on leadership, rural values and politics: ‘Without your word, you’re nothing’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Leadership isn’t just about making deals and passing laws for state Rep. Ty Winter. As assistant minority leader, he helps shape the Republican Caucus, while ensuring the people of his Southeast Colorado District 47 have a voice in the Colorado House.

**[Three-term Republican state Rep. Rod Bockenfeld has died](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rod Bockenfeld, who served Colorado’s House District 56 for three terms, has died, Sen. Rod Pelton announced Thursday to the Colorado Senate.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Rep. Evans, the grandson of immigrants, joins U.S. House’s Hispanic Conference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) U.S. Rep. Gabe Evans, the grandson of Mexican immigrants, has joined the U.S. House’s Congressional Hispanic Conference, his office announced Wednesday.

**[Press, protesters, and politicians thwart ICE raids in Colorado. Homan promises to come back harder](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[NATIONAL REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ICE raids in Colorado were thwarted last week by media leaks. A massive raid targeting over 100 Tren de Aragua (TdA) gang members last week ended with only 30 arrests, and of those only one was TdA, as reported on X by Fox News’ Bill Melugin, who was embedded in a pre-dawn raid at the now-infamous Edge Apartments in Lowry, Colo.
**[Senate confirms Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as next HHS Secretary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DAILY CALLER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Senate voted to confirm Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as the next Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) on Thursday. He has received 51 votes as of publication.

**[Tulsi Gabbard confirmed as Director of National Intelligence; Sen. McConnell defects to oppose](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DAILY CALLER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Senate confirmed Director of National Intelligence (DNI) nominee Tulsi Gabbard along party lines early Wednesday morning.
**_[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Alexis Hitzeroth challenging Cody Kennedy for District A on Grand Junction City Council](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Grand Junction voters on April 8 will choose between incumbent Cody Kennedy and Alexis Hitzeroth for the District A seat on City Council.
**[Rick Dunlap, a Montrose Co. commissioner and longtime sheriff, mourned by Western Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Newly-elected Montrose County Commissioner, Rick Dunlap, died suddenly Feb. 8, 2025, leaving the Montrose community in grief and shock.
**[Marijuana repeal off Colorado Springs’ ballot after state Supreme Court stays out of the weeds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Springs has agreed to remove the ballot question asking voters to repeal the city’s new recreational marijuana ordinance, leaving the industry in place within the city limits for the first time.
**[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Garbo: The Party of spite (Democrats) betrayed their own promise on ‘No Tax on Tips’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In a stunning display of hypocrisy, the Democratic Party once again proved that their loyalty lies not with the American people but with their own desperate grip on power._
**[Rufo: How to dismantle the U.S. Department of Education](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[CITY JOURNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _There is a tingle of fear in any corporation whenever the words “restructuring,” “merger,” “acquisition,” or “hostile takeover” spread through the office. Employees work on their resumes, whisper about projected layoffs, and assess their options._ __
**[Fleetwood: Mitch McConnell has worn out his welcome in politics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE FEDERALIST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., may be nearing the end of his political career, but that doesn’t mean he’s done stabbing Republican voters in the back._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Just need a few minutes of your time

name: Jimmy Patronis [FL-01 Special Election GOP Nominee]
subject: I’m now OFFICIALLY the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family’s seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.
I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.
| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

**_[If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5785ce98d2ac4c418dc61164bfa2fcdf&_e=KvfXJsc_j-JVJtRVtROiIP6Ip-18iIqh-Nfnre4YJcl_ZWK1o_kSRH4cf80SIW1RY8fZ-5E0eWn0y0X29p2sradMs61BEpPZVtIlbrQNBAYdnymXm_dvyHAA3WfLe4HsYuwRXVxFi8gZ9IDJuvPTmlXrSyc0Be2yzNd5LLB54a7VFrLByTwS9QOnWqh_U9RAUnvY5eOvNyqfSjTPlVYvFOPc1hvQ6ZNvepXUaqEaUfdBuUx8oxrWe875Q2JCwdPL8h3UABP4SOfCLbp6zbYUkx_FUwRskcUhrFinfur2h48loBVOcsVge0A_Qrr3HNpTAs1xxIBXH-liWxf7tVbVwvARNmhut46qovSIB-CcXlUv_RXrJkirmZcPSuaakKZYg3vZ5Cuor8lg7kxf1xrtwHy2gIREt1fxLJpNSZyZ5RY%3D "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. ")_**

_Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? _

Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.

But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race.

Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. **_[That's why I'm teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5785ce98d2ac4c418dc61164bfa2fcdf&_e=KvfXJsc_j-JVJtRVtROiIP6Ip-18iIqh-Nfnre4YJcl_ZWK1o_kSRH4cf80SIW1RY8fZ-5E0eWn0y0X29p2sradMs61BEpPZVtIlbrQNBAYdnymXm_dvyHAA3WfLe4HsYuwRXVxFi8gZ9IDJuvPTmlXrSyc0Be2yzNd5LLB54a7VFrLByTwS9QOnWqh_U9RAUnvY5eOvNyqfSjTPlVYvFOPc1hvQ6ZNvepXUaqEaUfdBuUx8oxrWe875Q2JCwdPL_cqmvsCQnSLJRZwi1IP36myz7At4tlP7uyrK891QRtjGJs7NzCakM8ER0uxDkiRyt1WDFv0JrWCEGbF1iphXEYKjY_KVLyuTaHskQ3GJ16SlINv7W38QpyVmkdnb6KrH3pbKhze2kXp6Ff3d9A4WZYcazCT3-MpLVd0gLhXMRqQ%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.")_**

I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race.

**I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me?** ****[**YES >>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5785ce98d2ac4c418dc61164bfa2fcdf&_e=KvfXJsc_j-JVJtRVtROiIP6Ip-18iIqh-Nfnre4YJcl_ZWK1o_kSRH4cf80SIW1RY8fZ-5E0eWn0y0X29p2sradMs61BEpPZVtIlbrQNBAYdnymXm_dvyHAA3WfLe4HsYuwRXVxFi8gZ9IDJuvPTmlXrSyc0Be2yzNd5LLB54a7VFrLByTwS9QOnWqh_U9RAUnvY5eOvNyqfSjTPlVYvFOPc1hvQ6ZNvepXUaqEaUfdBuUx8oxrWe875Q2JCwdPLydJN9C-LQ8Lgc6fWEkHO5jJMTP0KDtPWLFPrgieBmtQGKADJVdnxSlJ1bDoWghwXnS8zrA7TyPuUATI8hVD7b8CdeRkqQj2eGnmPhYByEViNpnVHDLtvM_RqmMAPOTwFqKbSwOjY5L648a-vakXYtq3jYMyM2V2Ka3BVLZXbeG8%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5785ce98d2ac4c418dc61164bfa2fcdf&_e=KvfXJsc_j-JVJtRVtROiIP6Ip-18iIqh-Nfnre4YJcl_ZWK1o_kSRH4cf80SIW1RY8fZ-5E0eWn0y0X29p2sradMs61BEpPZVtIlbrQNBAYdnymXm_dvyHAA3WfLe4HsYuwRXVxFi8gZ9IDJuvPTmlXrSyc0Be2yzNd5LLB54a7VFrLByTwS9QOnWqh_U9RAUnvY5eOvNyqfSjTPlVYvFOPc1hvQ6ZNvepXUaqEaUfdBuUx8oxrWe875Q2JCwdPLuvWtwcaKoi_OEamgYmjpHq9keH_AeQQfR5uR6h-F9Mblcgq5B9oqMPoONNVFl2NKG5b1t1lm2L2AU_grgEke1daGbvjNvr95OFk34AW_90jtD2vSPDAJ-uzQiSWM5AQiz8F5v61THjk_mLvKF7V4C7mltSstQj1nUzGGTuHMNhw%3D)****Thank you for hearing me out.

I look forward to fighting for the America First values that you, me, President Trump, Leader Scalise, and Matt Gaetz believe in.

God bless you,

clean_body: I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family’s seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz. I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress. | | | | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis. As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress. I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top. While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election... House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR. That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda. "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. " Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? | "Jimmy Patronis and Donald Trump" Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz. But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race. Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours." I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race. I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me? ** you for hearing me out. I look forward to fighting for the America First values that you, me, President Trump, Leader Scalise, and Matt Gaetz believe in. God bless you, - Jimmy JIMMY PATRONIS GOP Nominee for the FL-01 Special Election | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. ---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102297731/528719212/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDczMmIyOC02ZGVkLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vIeIeGjCd5GmaKKDANYO_zqvACRzf4bj3750yD2oC0U=&emci=0f9e8a5e-6ae5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=dd732b28-6ded-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=7878003)

I wish I could say I’m surprised, but this is part of a larger pattern we’ve seen since Donald Trump took office the first time. **Trump turned dog whistles into megaphones, and now Musk is doing the same – saying the quiet part out loud for all of us to hear.**
Musk’s behavior isn’t just ignorant, but it’s _dangerous_. These comments embolden extremists and fuel the normalization of hate speech. The fact that it’s coming from one of the most influential billionaires in the world makes it even more chilling.
Far-right extremism has no place in America, but together, we can prove that hate will lose every time. **[I’m working around the clock in Congress to stamp out this rhetoric, but I can’t do it alone. name: Stevedaines.com
subject: Many Americans will sadly fail this test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Show Democrats that our Republican supporters are the most informed voters in the Country. |
---
Fellow American,

Today is Presidents Day, a day for our country to pause and celebrate the accomplishments of our nation’s greatest leaders.

Here’s the good news: The GOP’s majority in Congress is historically slim, which means we have a shot at stopping this dangerous legislation if we use our voices and take action to flip just a handful of Republican votes. In fact, we’ve already seen what we can accomplish when millions of Americans speak out against extremism. clean_body: We’ve already seen what we can accomplish when millions of Americans speak out against extremism = Hey, it’s Mohona, Sharice’s campaign manager. In just over a month, House Republicans have introduced an avalanche of extreme legislation in the new Congress — legislation to restrict abortion access, abolish the Department of Education, raise the cost of health care, eliminate common-sense gun safety laws, and so much more. Here’s the good news: The GOP’s majority in Congress is historically slim, which means we have a shot at stopping this dangerous legislation if we use our voices and take action to flip just a handful of Republican votes. In fact, we’ve already seen what we can accomplish when millions of Americans speak out against extremism. Following a public outcry, federal courts paused President Trump’s effort to freeze federal grants and loans last month. But I want to be clear: The best way to stop these radical proposals is by flipping the House next year — a task that starts with re-electing incumbents in competitive districts like Sharice. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being a part of this team. | 2025 SESSION Tuesday What can you expect today?
---
|
### SESSION BEGINS AT 11AM
---
|
# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello Session ends this Saturday.
There are no more official committee meetings for the remainder of the 2025 Legislative Session.
All House bills are now on the docket to be heard on the Senate floor. Please click on the link below to see the full listing of bills coming up on the Senate floor tomorrow.
There are quite a few bills that have to be heard. There are 64 bills on 3rd read on the regular calendar tomorrow alone. So it will be a long day. Plus, they have to approve the final budget. So still much to do between now and Saturday.
I hope you will take time to review the list of bills, too many to list here. At this point, public comment is over. If you see a bill that you want to support or oppose you will have to reach out to all 40 Senators and express your opinion there or contact the Governor's office and request that he veto or sign a particular bill. That information if below.
Please note the budget bill is in this listing of bills. You will want to spend time reviewing the budget bill for wasteful spending.

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION Tuesday What can you expect today? | SESSION BEGINS AT 11AM | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello Session ends this Saturday. There are no more official committee meetings for the remainder of the 2025 Legislative Session. All House bills are now on the docket to be heard on the Senate floor. Please click on the link below to see the full listing of bills coming up on the Senate floor tomorrow. There are quite a few bills that have to be heard. There are 64 bills on 3rd read on the regular calendar tomorrow alone. So it will be a long day. Plus, they have to approve the final budget. So still much to do between now and Saturday. I hope you will take time to review the list of bills, too many to list here. At this point, public comment is over. If you see a bill that you want to support or oppose you will have to reach out to all 40 Senators and express your opinion there or contact the Governor's office and request that he veto or sign a particular bill. That information if below. Please note the budget bill is in this listing of bills. You will want to spend time reviewing the budget bill for wasteful spending. | | | | | | | | | | | | == | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

name: GOP ON BLAST! (via VPP)
subject: Rep. Jeffries just broke his silence…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Read this NOW >>
| **_Team, Hakeem Jeffries just BROKE HIS SILENCE »_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86941?t=6&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_) THIS is the type of leadership Democrats need, _now more than ever._

Rep. Jeffries is working tirelessly to hold Trump, Elon Musk, and all of their MAGA buddies accountable, and we couldn’t be more grateful. [**So we’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. Claim your spot ASAP before we hit send: SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86941?t=7&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86941?t=8&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House THIS YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86941?t=9&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86941?t=10&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86941?t=11&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18939%2E878179%2E-c2Eh_)
---

# 2025 Freedom Fight Rally Guide
---
| |
---
| We cannot wait to see you **TOMORROW at TFVC’s 2025 Freedom Fight Rally!** We wanted to get this to you with plenty of time for you to plan your visit to your state Capitol. **Details: RAIN OR SHINE**
Tuesday, February 18
1pm
South Steps, Texas Capitol If this is going to be your first time visiting our state Capitol, take a few minutes to review our [Capitol Survival Guide](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ2NjE5MDEwMzYyOTAxNjc2LFwiclwiOjE0NjYxOTA1ODA1ODQzMDI0MH0iLCJzIjoiYTUyZGQxOTE5MmE5NzYwZSJ9) to become more familiar with the ins and outs of getting around, parking, restrooms, etc.! Now that we’ve got those basics out of the way, let’s talk about our phenomenal **line-up of speakers**! A truth-teller and medical liberty visionary, **Mikki Willis** has opened hearts and eyes with his various documentaries, such as the “Plandemic” series and “The Great Awakening,” along with his other endeavors. His dedication to amplifying the voices of the silenced is unmatched, and we are blessed to have him join us at the Freedom Fight this year. Bold and brash, **Sara Gonzales** is most widely known for her Blaze TV series “Unfiltered,” but few know that her roots are firmly planted in the medical liberty movement. Sara was a beloved OG volunteer who fearlessly called out legislators to their faces, and has been exposing medical tyranny ever since. **Congressman Chip Roy** (TX CD-21) is one of the most outspoken liberty lovers in Washington, DC, and he has never wavered in his commitment to holding people like Anthony Fauci accountable for COVID era misdeeds. From advocating on behalf of military service members who were subjected to experimental vaccine mandates to fighting to Make America Healthy Again, Congressman Roy is a true medical liberty champion for Texas. In addition, we will also be introducing you to the **dedicated legislators** who are working overtime to file legislation to protect you and your family from medical overreach! But, this event is truly all about YOU, our TFVC family! We want to honor your stories, celebrate your efforts, amplify your voices, and connect with you. To that end, we are encouraging attendees to arrive early on Tuesday **(around noon)**. Bring a picnic lunch to the South Lawn of the Capitol grounds and enjoy fellowship with other warriors for medical liberty! **Other important details for the day:** **Dress:** Wear your Freedom Fight shirt, any other TFVC shirt, or red for the rally. In case of a few sprinkles, bring your rain gear. **Signs:** We will have pre-made rally signs for you, but you’ll need to get there early to snag yours! You are welcome to bring your own rally signs, as well. **Moment of Silence:** As in years past, we will have a formal recognition of the impact of vaccine injuries on families across Texas by holding a moment of silence for those affected. We invite you to bring photos so we can honor your loved ones. **After the Rally:** You are invited to join us for TFVC’s birthday party happening inside the Capitol! To get to the party, enter the Capitol and make your way through security and look for a TFVC volunteer in the rotunda wearing a black “Come and Make Me” t-shirt. They will escort you to the party room where we’ll have birthday refreshments and hear from additional champion legislators. In the event that you miss the rally or can’t find a volunteer, the party will take place in the Legislative Conference Center located on E2.002.

clean_body: | | See you tomorrow! | | | | | | 2025 Freedom Fight Rally Guide | | | We cannot wait to see you TOMORROW at TFVC’s 2025 Freedom Fight Rally! We wanted to get this to you with plenty of time for you to plan your visit to your state Capitol. Details: RAIN OR SHINE Tuesday, February 18 1pm South Steps, Texas Capitol If this is going to be your first time visiting our state Capitol, take a few minutes to review our to become more familiar with the ins and outs of getting around, parking, restrooms, etc.! Now that we’ve got those basics out of the way, let’s talk about our phenomenal line-up of speakers! A truth-teller and medical liberty visionary, Mikki Willis has opened hearts and eyes with his various documentaries, such as the “Plandemic” series and “The Great Awakening,” along with his other endeavors. His dedication to amplifying the voices of the silenced is unmatched, and we are blessed to have him join us at the Freedom Fight this year. Bold and brash, Sara Gonzales is most widely known for her Blaze TV series “Unfiltered,” but few know that her roots are firmly planted in the medical liberty movement. Sara was a beloved OG volunteer who fearlessly called out legislators to their faces, and has been exposing medical tyranny ever since. Congressman Chip Roy (TX CD-21) is one of the most outspoken liberty lovers in Washington, DC, and he has never wavered in his commitment to holding people like Anthony Fauci accountable for COVID era misdeeds. From advocating on behalf of military service members who were subjected to experimental vaccine mandates to fighting to Make America Healthy Again, Congressman Roy is a true medical liberty champion for Texas. In addition, we will also be introducing you to the dedicated legislators who are working overtime to file legislation to protect you and your family from medical overreach! But, this event is truly all about YOU, our TFVC family! We want to honor your stories, celebrate your efforts, amplify your voices, and connect with you. To that end, we are encouraging attendees to arrive early on Tuesday (around noon). Bring a picnic lunch to the South Lawn of the Capitol grounds and enjoy fellowship with other warriors for medical liberty! Other important details for the day: Dress: Wear your Freedom Fight shirt, any other TFVC shirt, or red for the rally. In case of a few sprinkles, bring your rain gear. Signs: We will have pre-made rally signs for you, but you’ll need to get there early to snag yours! You are welcome to bring your own rally signs, as well. Moment of Silence: As in years past, we will have a formal recognition of the impact of vaccine injuries on families across Texas by holding a moment of silence for those affected. We invite you to bring photos so we can honor your loved ones. After the Rally: You are invited to join us for TFVC’s birthday party happening inside the Capitol! To get to the party, enter the Capitol and make your way through security and look for a TFVC volunteer in the rotunda wearing a black “Come and Make Me” t-shirt. They will escort you to the party room where we’ll have birthday refreshments and hear from additional champion legislators. In the event that you miss the rally or can’t find a volunteer, the party will take place in the Legislative Conference Center located on E2.002. | | | | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You are receiving this email because you donated or signed up. |

Peter, a few weeks ago, my team and I asked you to share what’s on your mind — and you didn’t hold back! Your responses made one thing clear: you want bold leadership to protect Oregon’s values, defend our democracy, and fight for progress. **You told us: ** 📢 “Fighting the immoral, and at times illegal, actions of the Trump administration should be a top priority.” 🏛️ “Protect Oregon’s sanctuary state status, health care coverage, LGBTQ rights and vote by mail.” 🌎 “Protect our forests, our water, and take action on climate change.” **I want you to know that I’m listening.** I read your responses, and I’m fighting every day to keep Oregon moving forward. But I need your help. The fight ahead is going to require all of us to stand united. We’ve got to push back against right-wing extremism and make sure Oregon remains a beacon of progress. name: Office of the Governor
subject: 📢 Recapping our State of the State Address
body:
Updates on the new Bridge redesign, job opportunities, and Service Year applications
---
| | | | | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/pwaKLHJIl8cl-Ns7RQnRx6ZLrcBOw2bVZ54bxMPEnZs=392)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Flive%2FoSCh7CtzkBg%3Fsi=eUlz2_aO8QORdEEW%26t=2/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/vCuAw7kwXNlDhAe_EPA70duVFGsha9pOuC9gq4_QlUE=392)
---
God Bless the State of Maryland
My fellow Marylanders,
At the start of this month, I had the honor of delivering my third State of the State Address before a joint session of the Maryland General Assembly.
In my address, I spoke about how we will invest in industries of the future, reform our tax code, and invest in Marylanders—while also meeting crises with courage, compassion, competence, and calm.
Marylanders deserve a government that looks every challenge in the face, and still delivers results. And we’ve made real progress in the last two years to doing exactly that.
Together, we have **created nearly 100,000 jobs.**
Together, we have**connected over 100,000 Marylanders to broadband** for the first time.
Together, we have **provided child care to 16,000 additional Maryland children**.
Together, we **raised the minimum wage**.
Together, we **brought the unemployment rate down****to one of the lowest rates in the country** – and we have seen women's labor force participation increase by more than almost any other state.
Together, we are breaking the back of violent crime. According to preliminary data,**homicides and non-fatal shootings are the lowest they have been statewide in a decade**.
Maryland is safer and more competitive today than when we took office,**but there's still much more to do.**
Right now, the people of Maryland are calling on us to meet the moment and prove we can stare down our greatest challenges—knowing we won’t flinch.
**And that includes supporting Maryland's public servants who have been impacted by recent federal actions.**
Days ago, our team launched a [website](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fresponse.maryland.gov%2Ffederalpublicservants%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/wApBsOWLgcq99DMfqG838Qe7shGTRjTXBvBOSCM-tic=392) with programs and resources to help public servants affected by actions taken by the Trump-Vance Administration.
My team is in constant communication with our state and local partners, as well as our Congressional delegation, and we will work to provide updates as readily as we can on.
Let's confront the challenges ahead with courage and emerge stronger—both as a state and as a people.
Your Governor,
Wes Moore
_The State of the State Address is available to watch on_[ _our YouTube channel_](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=oSCh7CtzkBg%26/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/co3Tlbd-nr56bfEs_ppeYIGuukT-UvOH-bjJBRsHeec=392) _and my remarks as scripted are available_[ _here_](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-wes-moore-delivers-2025-state-of-the-state-address.aspx/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/FsrGciqa5Yb_Skx2NhHJXul6EBDs-YvYfvua3J5fTDY=392) _._
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/2/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/W-qbb9Hxr7ivwwhOeeQQjZk0UM57b9uFE_FbqsXfCMw=392)
---
[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-unveils-design-for-francis-scott-key-bridge.aspx/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/E9CX337uQfE1WHPJ0gu3owrmOS8shRX01_RKOUEyWgY=392)
### [Unveiling the Design for Francis Scott Key Bridge](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-unveils-design-for-francis-scott-key-bridge.aspx/2/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/0dVxjP7Ty8nBgdrO7TM6O4VwraY1zhQ4kmynEGX7e-A=392)

While we mark the unveiling of the new bridge design, we continue to honor the six Marylanders who lost their lives while serving our state and their families, who carry their legacy forward.
This unveiling marked an important step toward recovering from the tragic Francis Scott Key Bridge collapse that has affected both Maryland’s economy and the nation’s economy.
|
### [JLG Industries to Expand Operations in Frederick County](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-announces-jlg-industries-to-expand-operations-in-frederick-county.aspx/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/4qJivCE40HZhzaUszdD4-Wty-UHvLD8XGEGDdBrBkJw=392)

JLG Industries has been a great partner to Maryland for many years, and they've chosen our state for their new research and development facility. We look forward to continuing to work with JLG Industries to create jobs and grow Maryland's economy.
---
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-celebrates-the-formation-of-the-enough-alliance-and-100-million-dollar-philanthropic-investment-to-end-child.aspx/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/UAQzZWEg2P5tnNNc6A6kS6PaUvcukj-h_7n2hNWqphk=392)[PwrQ's Expansion with 160 New Jobs in Anne Arundel County](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-announces-pwrq-expansion-with-160-new-jobs-in-anne-arundel-county.aspx/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/BfxVPN0qmSFIMG9w592IvDVfS5QhmWeQioPzM72qdAA=392)

Maryland continues to cultivate our epicenter of innovation, manufacturing, technology, and growth. We're proud that PwrQ will bring new jobs and new opportunities to Maryland.
---
|
### **[Applications to join Maryland Corps and the Maryland Service Year Option are now OPEN!](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fdsci.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx%3Futm_campaign=application_open_HL%26utm_medium=organic_newsletter%26utm_source=govnewsletter%26utm_term=02_13_2025%26utm_id=EXT-GOV/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/DSEv7kqo-DZ1qKzwgubeY20_f3jfPhVcgIGtmhOiB-8=392)**

Maryland Corps and the Maryland Service Year Option offer paid, 9-month service opportunities for eligible 18 to 21-year-olds to gain job skills, career training, and professional support—all while earning:

✅ $15/hour minimum wage
✅ $6,000 completion award
✅ Health care benefits
✅ Apprenticeship certification & mentorship

The deadline to apply is March 1. Get your application in now or pass this along to someone who you think would like to sign up: [serve.maryland.gov](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fdsci.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx%3Futm_campaign=application_open_HL%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=gov_delivery%26utm_content=gov_newsletter%26utm_term=02_11_2025%26utm_id=EXT-GOV/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/Ipl2dDbpo5Poio6YReYSKJm4psCZ18xr6LvoUh0v9vY=392) [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/HbNegbAkSaG0XFuDKxW1tvRCjYfP0m1apwt9YrdhB_g=392) | | |
## [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwtop.com%2Fmaryland%2F2025%2F01%2Fmaryland-enshrines-access-to-abortion-in-state-constitution-after-voters-approve-amendment%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/GxRCqwRP1GCfWLGpQ3eCl3joEGLoB2RWPfqNNvpUYI4=392)[**In State of the State, Gov. Moore Pledges to Shrink Deficit, Grow Maryland**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.mymcmedia.org%2Fin-state-of-the-state-gov-moore-pledges-to-shrink-deficit-grow-maryland%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/BhmdLnmrvLW7Vcs3OXZ5VKpa6hrjxj5qudwWWMO4giY=392)

The goal, according to Moore, is to close the deficit while “still growing the middle class.” He pledged to rein in spending but also said he was adding $750 million to boost the economic capacity of the workforce, especially in the IT, aerospace and defense and biotech industries.
---|---|---
| |
## [How Maryland can become a leader in the technology of the future | GUEST COMMENTARY](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.baltimoresun.com%2F2025%2F02%2F09%2Fhow-maryland-can-become-a-leader-in-the-technology-of-the-future-guest-commentary%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/paGjUOwX7VIN8cbJi--6mKlI7HzdHXDSMSPdtVYo0vE=392)

The University of Maryland is well positioned to be a leader in this field — which is projected to have a cumulative impact of $2 trillion in the next decade, according to a 2024 McKinsey analysis for the Quantum Technology Monitor — but we have to act now.
---|---|---
| |
## [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fmocoshow.com%2F2024%2F10%2F16%2Fmaryland-secures-13-9-million-in-federal-funding-to-boost-workforce-development-for-individuals-with-disabilities%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/UNJ7yBaMREVfEkEXYGmUMD41ZtazZExjLZbgh522U_4=392)**[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fthedailyrecord.com%2F2025%2F01%2F15%2Fmd-aspires-to-be-quantum-capital-of-the-world-one-day%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/yY9pO3js9o9fcwtwcCvrZr7VsaSeeo4cUepgNXURydI=392)[**Maryland saw sharp decline in fatal overdoses in 2024, Gov. Moore says**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.cbsnews.com%2Fbaltimore%2Fnews%2Fopioid-fatal-overdose-decline-maryland%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/jl8dKFIYS0rL7ksgEZA9efh4WDLTfYYOZI4upZUC3dM=392)**

Data from [Maryland's Overdose Data Dashboard](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fstopoverdose.maryland.gov%2Fdashboard%2F/1/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/mAuuIMiuzmq1Nb2IXaGX5_DZ1Kns6IHKSgWkk-D9DOs=392) shows 1,553 reported fatal overdoses in the state last year, which is a 38% decrease from the 2,511 fatal overdoses in 2023.
---|---|---
| [**More News**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx/2/0100019515cb860e-5eb05b10-0604-4bf1-8b0e-d59e6c2eb7af-000000/TbSSaozCDvOsQ_UwpLwkvyvytH-0H2bvCl-TNKiQt6I=392)

clean_body: Updates on the new Bridge redesign, job opportunities, and Service Year applications | | | | | | | God Bless the State of Maryland My fellow Marylanders, At the start of this month, I had the honor of delivering my third State of the State Address before a joint session of the Maryland General Assembly. In my address, I spoke about how we will invest in industries of the future, reform our tax code, and invest in Marylanders—while also meeting crises with courage, compassion, competence, and calm. Marylanders deserve a government that looks every challenge in the face, and still delivers results. And we’ve made real progress in the last two years to doing exactly that. Together, we have created nearly 100,000 jobs. Together, we haveconnected over 100,000 Marylanders to broadband for the first time. Together, we have provided child care to 16,000 additional Maryland children. Together, we raised the minimum wage. Together, we brought the unemployment rate downto one of the lowest rates in the country – and we have seen women's labor force participation increase by more than almost any other state. Together, we are breaking the back of violent crime. According to preliminary data,homicides and non-fatal shootings are the lowest they have been statewide in a decade. Maryland is safer and more competitive today than when we took office,but there's still much more to do. Right now, the people of Maryland are calling on us to meet the moment and prove we can stare down our greatest challenges—knowing we won’t flinch. And that includes supporting Maryland's public servants who have been impacted by recent federal actions. Days ago, our team launched a with programs and resources to help public servants affected by actions taken by the Trump-Vance Administration. My team is in constant communication with our state and local partners, as well as our Congressional delegation, and we will work to provide updates as readily as we can on. Let's confront the challenges ahead with courage and emerge stronger—both as a state and as a people. Your Governor, Wes Moore The State of the State Address is available to watch on and my remarks as scripted are available . | | While we mark the unveiling of the new bridge design, we continue to honor the six Marylanders who lost their lives while serving our state and their families, who carry their legacy forward. This unveiling marked an important step toward recovering from the tragic Francis Scott Key Bridge collapse that has affected both Maryland’s economy and the nation’s economy. | JLG Industries has been a great partner to Maryland for many years, and they've chosen our state for their new research and development facility. We look forward to continuing to work with JLG Industries to create jobs and grow Maryland's economy. Maryland continues to cultivate our epicenter of innovation, manufacturing, technology, and growth. We're proud that PwrQ will bring new jobs and new opportunities to Maryland. | Maryland Corps and the Maryland Service Year Option offer paid, 9-month service opportunities for eligible 18 to 21-year-olds to gain job skills, career training, and professional support—all while earning: ✅ $15/hour minimum wage ✅ $6,000 completion award ✅ Health care benefits ✅ Apprenticeship certification & mentorship The deadline to apply is March 1. Get your application in now or pass this along to someone who you think would like to sign up: | | | The goal, according to Moore, is to close the deficit while “still growing the middle class.” He pledged to rein in spending but also said he was adding $750 million to boost the economic capacity of the workforce, especially in the IT, aerospace and defense and biotech industries. ---|---|--- | | The University of Maryland is well positioned to be a leader in this field — which is projected to have a cumulative impact of $2 trillion in the next decade, according to a 2024 McKinsey analysis for the Quantum Technology Monitor — but we have to act now. ---|---|--- | | Data from shows 1,553 reported fatal overdoses in the state last year, which is a 38% decrease from the 2,511 fatal overdoses in 2023. ---|---|--- | | Update your subscriptions, modify your password or email address, or unsubscribe .

body:
This is Presidents Day

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_call_reminder&n=1)
---
| Join us Tonight, February 17th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. We hope everyone is having a great Presidents day. You may have celebrated with remembering Presidents from the past, getting politically active, or taking advantage of some special sale. No matter what it's a great day to reflect on what we as a country look for in an elected leader. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uwzIv1-f3NESnDnLhMSVNVbrinGFGWXaJHjQS_e6u38uWknuTwht0RoESFTDjEgObQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_call_reminder&n=2) Whether you're having trouble keeping up with recent events or if you're looking for a place to talk about what you're seeing, we'd love you to join our call. Call in to talk about how we're determined to keep PA moving Forward. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uwzIv1-f3NESnDnLhMSVNVbrinGFGWXaJHjQS_e6u38uWknuTwht0RoESFTDjEgObQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_call_reminder&n=3 "Click here to Join") [Click here to Join](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uwzIv1-f3NESnDnLhMSVNVbrinGFGWXaJHjQS_e6u38uWknuTwht0RoESFTDjEgObQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_call_reminder&n=3)
---
We're going to be talking about how we're all understanding recent events in our politics and how we might respond to the things the new administration is doing. However we also are keeping our main focus on the 2025 PA elections as well as some bills working through Harrisburg right now.
